    } = options;

    const provider = this.providers[providerName || this.defaultProvider];
    if (!provider) throw new Error('No LLM provider configured');

    const model = options.model || this.getModel(purpose);

    await this.rateLimiter.acquire(providerName || this.defaultProvider);

    const startTime = Date.now();

    try {
      let result;

      switch (provider.type) {
        case 'openai':
        case 'openrouter':
        case 'custom':
          result = await this.chatOpenAICompatible(provider, model, messages, {
            temperature, max_tokens, stream, response_format
          });
          break;
        case 'anthropic':
          result = await this.chatAnthropic(provider, model, messages, {
            temperature, max_tokens, stream
          });
          break;
        case 'ollama':
          result = await this.chatOllama(provider, model, messages, {
            temperature, max_tokens, stream
          });
          break;
        default:
          throw new Error(`Unknown provider type: ${provider.type}`);
      }

      this.requestLog.push({
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        provider: providerName || this.defaultProvider,
        model,
        purpose,
        duration: Date.now() - startTime,
        inputTokens: result.usage?.prompt_tokens || 0,
        outputTokens: result.usage?.completion_tokens || 0,
        stream
      });

      return result;
    } catch (error) {
      this.requestLog.push({
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        provider: providerName || this.defaultProvider,
        model,
        purpose,
        duration: Date.now() - startTime,
        error: error.message,
        stream
      });
      throw error;
    }
  }

  async chatOpenAICompatible(provider, model, messages, options) {
    const { temperature, max_tokens, stream, response_format } = options;

    const body = {
      model,
      messages,
      temperature,
      max_tokens
    };

    if (response_format) {
      body.response_format = response_format;
    }

    if (stream) {
      return this.streamOpenAICompatible(provider, body);
    }

    const response = await fetch(`${provider.baseUrl}/chat/completions`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${provider.apiKey}`,
        ...(provider.type === 'openrouter' ? {
          'HTTP-Referer': 'https://ghostwriter.app',
          'X-Title': 'Ghostwriter'
        } : {})
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body)
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const errorBody = await response.text();
      throw new Error(`LLM API error ${response.status}: ${errorBody}`);
    }

    const data = await response.json();

    return {
      content: data.choices[0].message.content,
      usage: data.usage,
      model: data.model
    };
  }

  async streamOpenAICompatible(provider, body) {
    body.stream = true;

    const response = await fetch(`${provider.baseUrl}/chat/completions`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${provider.apiKey}`
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body)
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const errorBody = await response.text();
      throw new Error(`LLM API error ${response.status}: ${errorBody}`);
    }

    const reader = response.body.getReader();
    const decoder = new TextDecoder();

    async function* generateChunks() {
      let buffer = '';
      let totalContent = '';
      let usage = null;

      while (true) {
        const { done, value } = await reader.read();
        if (done) break;

        buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
        const lines = buffer.split('\n');
        buffer = lines.pop() || '';

        for (const line of lines) {
          const trimmed = line.trim();
          if (!trimmed || trimmed === 'data: [DONE]') continue;
          if (!trimmed.startsWith('data: ')) continue;

          try {
            const data = JSON.parse(trimmed.slice(6));
            const delta = data.choices?.[0]?.delta?.content;
            if (delta) {
              totalContent += delta;
              yield { type: 'content', content: delta };
            }
            if (data.usage) {
              usage = data.usage;
            }
          } catch (e) {
            // Skip malformed chunks
          }
        }
      }

      yield { type: 'usage', usage: usage || { prompt_tokens: 0, completion_tokens: 0 } };
      yield { type: 'done', content: totalContent };
    }

    return { stream: generateChunks() };
  }

  async chatAnthropic(provider, model, messages, options) {
    const { temperature, max_tokens, stream } = options;

    // Anthropic uses a different message format — extract system from messages
    const systemMessage = messages.find(m => m.role === 'system');
    const nonSystemMessages = messages.filter(m => m.role !== 'system');

    const body = {
      model,
      max_tokens,
      temperature,
      messages: nonSystemMessages
    };

    if (systemMessage) {
      body.system = systemMessage.content;
    }

    if (stream) {

    }

    const data = await response.json();

    return {
      content: data.content[0].text,
      usage: {
        prompt_tokens: data.usage?.input_tokens || 0,
        completion_tokens: data.usage?.output_tokens || 0
      },
      model: data.model
    };
  }

  async streamAnthropic(provider, body) {
    body.stream = true;

    const response = await fetch(`${provider.baseUrl}/messages`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'x-api-key': provider.apiKey,
        'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
        'anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access': 'true'
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body)
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const errorBody = await response.text();
      throw new Error(`Anthropic API error ${response.status}: ${errorBody}`);
    }

    const reader = response.body.getReader();
    const decoder = new TextDecoder();

    async function* generateChunks() {
      let buffer = '';
      let totalContent = '';
      let usage = null;

      while (true) {
        const { done, value } = await reader.read();
        if (done) break;

        buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
        const lines = buffer.split('\n');
        buffer = lines.pop() || '';

        for (const line of lines) {
          const trimmed = line.trim();
          if (!trimmed || !trimmed.startsWith('data: ')) continue;

          try {
            const data = JSON.parse(trimmed.slice(6));

            if (data.type === 'content_block_delta' && data.delta?.text) {
              totalContent += data.delta.text;
              yield { type: 'content', content: data.delta.text };
            } else if (data.type === 'message_delta' && data.usage) {
              usage = {
                prompt_tokens: 0,
                completion_tokens: data.usage.output_tokens || 0
              };
            } else if (data.type === 'message_start' && data.message?.usage) {
              usage = {
                prompt_tokens: data.message.usage.input_tokens || 0,
                completion_tokens: 0
              };
            }
          } catch (e) {
            // Skip malformed chunks
          }
        }
      }

      yield { type: 'usage', usage: usage || { prompt_tokens: 0, completion_tokens: 0 } };
      yield { type: 'done', content: totalContent };
    }

    return { stream: generateChunks() };
  }

  async chatOllama(provider, model, messages, options) {
    const { temperature, max_tokens, stream } = options;

    const body = {
      model,
      messages,
      options: {
        temperature,
        num_predict: max_tokens
      },
      stream: false
    };

    if (stream) {
      return this.streamOllama(provider, body);
    }

    const response = await fetch(`${provider.baseUrl}/chat`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(body)
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const errorBody = await response.text();
      throw new Error(`Ollama API error ${response.status}: ${errorBody}`);
    }

    const data = await response.json();

    return {
      content: data.message.content,
      usage: {
        prompt_tokens: data.prompt_eval_count || 0,
        completion_tokens: data.eval_count || 0
      },
      model: data.model
    };
  }

  async streamOllama(provider, body) {
    body.stream = true;

    const response = await fetch(`${provider.baseUrl}/chat`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(body)
    });

      const errorBody = await response.text();

              yield { type: 'content', content: data.message.content };
            }

            if (data.done) {
              usage = {
                prompt_

  getUsageStats() {
    const stats = {
      totalRequests: this.requestLog.length,
      totalInputTokens: 0,
      totalOutputTokens: 0,
      totalDuration: 0,
      errors: 0,
      byPurpose: {},
      byProvider: {},
      byModel: {}
    };

    for (const entry of this.requestLog) {
      stats.totalInputTokens += entry.inputTokens || 0;
      stats.totalOutputTokens += entry.outputTokens || 0;
      stats.totalDuration += entry.duration || 0;
      if (entry.error) stats.errors++;

      // By purpose
      if (!stats.byPurpose[entry.purpose]) {
        stats.byPurpose[entry.purpose] = { requests: 0, tokens: 0 };
      }
      stats.byPurpose[entry.purpose].requests++;
      stats.byPurpose[entry.purpose].tokens += (entry.inputTokens || 0) + (entry.outputTokens || 0);

      // By provider
      if (!stats.byProvider[entry.provider]) {
        stats.byProvider[entry.provider] = { requests: 0, tokens: 0 };
      }
      stats.byProvider[entry.provider].requests++;
      stats.byProvider[entry.provider].tokens += (entry.inputTokens || 0) + (entry.outputTokens || 0);

      // By model
      if (!stats.byModel[entry.model]) {
        stats.byModel[entry.model] = { requests: 0, tokens: 0 };
      }
      stats.byModel[entry.model].requests++;
      stats.byModel[entry.model].tokens += (entry.inputTokens || 0) + (entry.outputTokens || 0);
    }

    return stats;
  }

  clearLog() {
    this.requestLog = [];
  }
}

class RateLimiter {
  constructor() {
    this.windows = {};
  }

  async acquire(provider) {
    if (!this.windows[provider]) {
      this.windows[provider] = {
        tokens: 10,
        maxTokens: 10,
        refillRate: 2, // tokens per second
        lastRefill: Date.now()
      };
    }

    const window = this.windows[provider];

    // Refill tokens
    const now = Date.now();
    const elapsed = (now - window.lastRefill) / 1000;
    window.tokens = Math.min(window.maxTokens, window.tokens + elapsed * window.refillRate);
    window.lastRefill = now;

    if (window.tokens < 1) {
      const waitTime = ((1 - window.tokens) / window.refillRate) * 1000;
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, waitTime));
      window.tokens = 0;
      window.lastRefill = Date.now();
    } else {
      window.tokens -= 1;
    }
  }
}
```

**Context Builder — assembles the optimal context window for generation.**

```js
// src/engine/context-builder.js

export class ContextBuilder {
  constructor(db) {
    this.db = db;
    this.maxContextTokens = 100000; // Conservative estimate for large context models
    this.charsPerToken = 4; // Rough approximation
  }

  setMaxTokens(tokens) {
    this.maxContextTokens = tokens;
  }

  estimateTokens(text) {
    if (!text) return 0;
    return Math.ceil(text.length / this.charsPerToken);
  }

  async buildContext(sceneId, options = {}) {
    const {
      includeVoiceProfile = true,
      includeOutline = true,
      includeEntityStates = true,
      includePreviousScenes = true,
      includeChapterSummaries = true,
      includeSceneNotes = true,
      maxPreviousScenes = 3,
      customInstructions = null
    } = options;

    const scene = await this.db.scenes.get(sceneId);
    if (!scene) throw new Error(`Scene not found: ${sceneId}`);

    const chapter = await this.db.chapters.get(scene.chapterId);
    const project = await this.db.projects.get(chapter.projectId);

    const contextParts = [];
    let tokenBudget = this.maxContextTokens;

    // 1. Voice profile (highest priority)
    if (includeVoiceProfile && project.voiceProfile) {
      const voiceText = typeof project.voiceProfile === 'string'
        ? project.voiceProfile
        : project.voiceProfile.profile || JSON.stringify(project.voiceProfile);

      const voiceSection = `## Voice Profile\n${voiceText}`;
      const tokens = this.estimateTokens(voiceSection);

      if (tokens < tokenBudget) {
        contextParts.push({ priority: 100, section: 'voice', content: voiceSection, tokens });
        tokenBudget -= tokens;
      }
    }

    // 2. Custom instructions
    if (customInstructions) {
      const section = `## Author Instructions\n${customInstructions}`;
      const tokens = this.estimateTokens(section);
      if (tokens < tokenBudget

---

      if (entities.length > 0) {

          if (e.description) entry += `: ${e.description}`;
          if (e.state && Object.keys(e.state).length > 0) {
            const stateStr = Object.entries(e.state)
              .map(([k, v]) => `  - ${k}: ${v}`)
              .join('\n');
            entry += `\n${stateStr}`;

          if (e.relationships && e.relationships.length > 0) {

          return entry;
        }).join('\n\n');

        const section = `## Entity States\n${entityText}`;

        if (tokens < tokenBudget) {
          contextParts.push({ priority: 85, section: 'entities', content: section, tokens });
          tokenBudget -= tokens;
        }
      }
    }

    // 5. Outline context
    if (includeOutline && project.outline) {
      const outlineText = typeof project.outline === 'string'
        ? project.outline
        : JSON.stringify(project.outline, null, 2);

      const section = `## Story Outline\n${outlineText}`;
      const tokens = this.estimateTokens(section);

      // Outline can be large; truncate if needed
      if (tokens < tokenBudget) {
        contextParts.push({ priority: 70, section: 'outline', content: section, tokens });
        tokenBudget -= tokens;
      } else {
        // Try to include just the current chapter's outline portion
        const truncated = this.truncateToTokens(section, Math.min(tokenBudget * 0.3, 5000));
        const truncTokens = this.estimateTokens(truncated);
        if (truncTokens < tokenBudget) {
          contextParts.push({ priority: 70, section: 'outline', content: truncated + '\n[...outline truncated...]', tokens: truncTokens });
          tokenBudget -= truncTokens;
        }
      }
    }

              const text = s.summary || `[Scene "${s.title}" — no summary available]`;
              return `[${s.title}]: ${text}`;
            })
            .join('\n\n');

```js
          if (olderSummaries) {
            const section = `## Earlier Scenes (Summaries)\n${olderSummaries}`;
            const tokens = this.estimateTokens(section);
            if (tokens < tokenBudget) {
              contextParts.push({ priority: 65, section: 'olderScenes', content: section, tokens });
              tokenBudget -= tokens;
            }
          }
        }

        // Recent scenes as full text
        for (let i = 0; i < recentScenes.length; i++) {
          const s = recentScenes[i];
          if (!s.content) continue;

          const isImmediatelyPrevious = i === recentScenes.length - 1;
          const priority = isImmediatelyPrevious ? 88 : 60 - i;

          const section = `## Previous Scene: "${s.title}"\n${s.content}`;
          const tokens = this.estimateTokens(section);

          if (tokens < tokenBudget) {
            contextParts.push({ priority, section: `prevScene_${i}`, content: section, tokens });
            tokenBudget -= tokens;
          } else if (isImmediatelyPrevious) {
            // For the immediately previous scene, include at least the last portion
            const lastPortion = s.content.slice(-8000);
            const truncSection = `## Previous Scene: "${s.title}" (ending)\n[...earlier content omitted...]\n${lastPortion}`;
            const truncTokens = this.estimateTokens(truncSection);
            if (truncTokens < tokenBudget) {
              contextParts.push({ priority, section: `prevScene_${i}`, content: truncSection, tokens: truncTokens });
              tokenBudget -= truncTokens;
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }

    // 8. Current scene content so far (if continuing)
    if (scene.content) {
      const section = `## Current Scene Content So Far\n${scene.content}`;
      const tokens = this.estimateTokens(section);
      if (tokens < tokenBudget) {
        contextParts.push({ priority: 99, section: 'currentContent', content: section, tokens });
        tokenBudget -= tokens;
      } else {
        // Include at least the tail
        const tail = scene.content.slice(-12000);
        const truncSection = `## Current Scene Content So Far\n[...earlier content omitted...]\n${tail}`;
        const truncTokens = this.estimateTokens(truncSection);
        contextParts.push({ priority: 99, section: 'currentContent', content: truncSection, tokens: truncTokens });
        tokenBudget -= truncTokens;
      }
    }

    // Sort by priority descending and assemble
    contextParts.sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority);

    return {
      parts: contextParts,
      totalTokens: contextParts.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.tokens, 0),
      remainingBudget: tokenBudget,
      assembled: contextParts.map(p => p.content).join('\n\n---\n\n')
    };
  }

  truncateToTokens(text, maxTokens) {
    const maxChars = maxTokens * this.charsPerToken;
    if (text.length <= maxChars) return text;
    return text.slice(0, maxChars);
  }

  async buildContinuationPrompt(sceneId, instructions = '') {
    const context = await this.buildContext(sceneId);
    const scene = await this.db.scenes.get(sceneId);

    const systemPrompt = `You are a fiction ghostwriter. Continue the scene exactly where it left off. Maintain the established voice, tone, and style. Do not repeat content already written. Do not add meta-commentary or notes — output only the story text.`;

    const userPrompt = instructions
      ? `Continue the scene. Additional guidance: ${instructions}`
      : `Continue the scene from where it left off.`;

    return {
      messages: [
        { role: 'system', content: systemPrompt + '\n\n' + context.assembled },
        { role: 'user', content: userPrompt }
      ],
      context
    };
  }

  async buildNewScenePrompt(sceneId, instructions = '') {
    const context = await this.buildContext(sceneId, {
      includePreviousScenes: true,
      maxPreviousScenes: 2
    });
    const scene = await this.db.scenes.get(sceneId);

    const systemPrompt = `You are a fiction ghostwriter. Write the opening of a new scene. Maintain the established voice, tone, and style throughout. Output only the story text — no meta-commentary, no scene headers, no notes.`;

    let userPrompt = `Write the scene: "${scene.title}"`;
    if (scene.notes) userPrompt += `\nScene notes: ${scene.notes}`;
    if (scene.beatSheet) userPrompt += `\nBeat sheet: ${scene.beatSheet}`;
    if (instructions) userPrompt += `\nAdditional guidance: ${instructions}`;

    return {
      messages: [
        { role: 'system', content: systemPrompt + '\n\n' + context.assembled },
        { role: 'user', content: userPrompt }
      ],
      context
    };
  }
}

    this.activeGenerations = new Map();
  }

  async continueScene(sceneId, options = {}) {
    const {
      instructions = '',
      stream = true,
      maxTokens = 4000,
      temperature = 0.7,
      onChunk = null,
      onComplete = null,
      onError = null
    } = options;

    if (this.activeGenerations.has(sceneId)) {
      throw new Error('Generation already in progress for this scene');
    }

    const generationId = crypto.randomUUID();
    this.activeGenerations.set(sceneId, generationId);

    try {
      const { messages, context } = await this.contextBuilder.buildContinuationPrompt(sceneId, instructions);

      if (stream) {
        return await this.streamGeneration(sceneId, generationId, messages, {
          maxTokens, temperature, onChunk, onComplete, onError
        });
      } else {
        return await this.blockGeneration(sceneId, generationId, messages, {
          maxTokens, temperature, onComplete, onError
        });
      }
    } catch (error) {
      this.activeGenerations.delete(sceneId);
      if (onError) onError(error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  async writeNewScene(sceneId, options = {}) {
    const {
      instructions = '',
      stream = true,
      maxTokens = 4000,
      temperature = 0.7,
      onChunk = null,
      onComplete = null,
      onError = null
    } = options;

    if (this.activeGenerations.has(sceneId)) {
      throw new Error('Generation already in progress for this scene');
    }

    const generationId = crypto.randomUUID();
    this.activeGenerations.set(sceneId, generationId);

    try {
      const { messages, context } = await this.contextBuilder.buildNewScenePrompt(sceneId, instructions);

      if (stream) {
        return await this.streamGeneration(sceneId, generationId, messages, {
          maxTokens, temperature, onChunk, onComplete, onError
        });
      } else {
        return await this.blockGeneration(sceneId, generationId, messages, {
          maxTokens, temperature, onComplete, onError
        });
      }
    } catch (error) {
      this.activeGenerations.delete(sceneId);
      if (onError) onError(error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  async streamGeneration(sceneId, generationId, messages, options) {
    const { maxTokens, temperature, onChunk, onComplete, onError } = options;

    const result = await this.llm.chat(messages, {
      purpose: 'generation',
      temperature,
      max_tokens: maxTokens,
      stream: true
    });

    let fullContent = '';

    try {
      for await (const chunk of result.stream) {
        // Check if generation was cancelled
        if (this.activeGenerations.get(sceneId) !== generationId) {
          break;
        }

        if (chunk.type === 'content') {
          fullContent += chunk.content;
          if (onChunk) onChunk(chunk.content, fullContent);
        } else if (chunk.type === 'done') {
          fullContent = chunk.content;
        }
      }

      if (this.activeGenerations.get(sceneId) === generationId) {
        await this.applyGeneration(sceneId, fullContent);
        if (onComplete) onComplete(fullContent);
      }

      return fullContent;
    } catch (error) {
      if (onError) onError(error);
      throw error;
    } finally {
      this.activeGenerations.delete(sceneId);
    }
  }

  async blockGeneration(sceneId, generationId, messages, options) {
    const { maxTokens, temperature, onComplete, onError } = options;

    try {
      const result = await this.llm.chat(messages, {
        purpose: 'generation',
        temperature,
        max_tokens: maxTokens,
        stream: false
      });

      const content = result.content;

      if (this.activeGenerations.get(sceneId) === generationId) {
        await this.applyGeneration(sceneId, content);
        if (onComplete) onComplete(content);
      }

      return content;
    } catch (error) {
      if (onError) onError(error);
      throw error;
    } finally {
      this.activeGenerations.delete(sceneId);
    }
  }

  async applyGeneration(sceneId, newContent) {
    const scene = await this.db.scenes.get(sceneId);
    if (!scene) return;

    const previousContent = scene.content || '';
    const updatedContent = previousContent + newContent;

    // Save to scene
    await this.db.scenes.update(sceneId, {
      content: updatedContent,
      lastModified: new Date().toISOString(),
      wordCount: this.countWords(updatedContent)
    });

    // Save generation record for undo/history
    await this.db.generations.add({
      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
      sceneId,
      previousContent,
      addedContent: newContent,
      resultContent: updatedContent,
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });

    // Invalidate summary since content changed
    if (this.sceneSummarizer) {
      await this.sceneSummarizer.invalidateSummary(sceneId);
    }

    // Update entity states based on new content
    if (this.entityTracker) {
      try {
        await this.entityTracker.updateFromContent(sceneId, newContent);
      } catch (e) {
        console.

        console.warn('Entity tracking failed (non-critical):', e.message);

  cancelGeneration(sceneId) {
    this.activeGenerations.delete(sceneId);
  }

  async undoLastGeneration(sceneId) {
    const generations = await this.db.generations
      .where('sceneId').equals(sceneId)
      .sortBy('timestamp');

    if (generations.length === 0) return null;

    const lastGen = generations[generations.length - 1];

    await this.db.scenes.update(sceneId, {
      content: lastGen.previousContent,
      lastModified: new Date().toISOString(),
      wordCount: this.countWords(lastGen.previousContent)
    });

    await this.db.generations.delete(lastGen.id);

    return lastGen.previousContent;
  }

  countWords(text) {
    if (!text) return 0;
    return text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length;
  }

  isGenerating(sceneId) {
    return this.activeGenerations.has(sceneId);
  }
}

**Voice Profile Analyzer — analyzes sample text to extract the author's voice fingerprint.**

```js
// src/engine/voice-analyzer.js

export class VoiceAnalyzer {
  constructor(llm) {
    this.llm = llm;
  }

  async analyzeVoice(sampleText, options = {}) {
    const { existingProfile = null, genre = null } = options;

    // First pass: statistical analysis (local, no LLM needed)
    const stats = this.computeStatistics(sampleText);

    // Second pass: LLM-based stylistic analysis
    const llmAnalysis = await this.llmAnalyze(sampleText, stats, genre);

    // Merge with existing profile if provided
    const profile = existingProfile
      ? this.mergeProfiles(existingProfile, llmAnalysis, stats)
      : this.buildProfile(llmAnalysis, stats);

    return profile;
  }

  computeStatistics(text) {
    const sentences = text.match(/[^.!?]+[.!?]+/g) || [];
    const words = text.trim().split(/\s+/);
    const paragraphs = text.split(/\n\s*\n/).filter(p => p.trim());

    // Sentence length distribution
    const sentenceLengths = sentences.map(s => s.trim().split(/\s+/).length);
    const avgSentenceLength = sentenceLengths.length > 0
      ? sentenceLengths.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / sentenceLengths.length
      : 0;
    const sentenceLengthVariance = sentenceLengths.length > 0
      ? sentenceLengths.reduce((sum, l) => sum + Math.pow(l - avgSentenceLength, 2), 0) / sentenceLengths.length
      : 0;

    // Paragraph length distribution
    const paragraphLengths = paragraphs.map(p => p.trim().split(/\s+/).length);
    const avgParagraphLength = paragraphLengths.length > 0
      ? paragraphLengths.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / paragraphLengths.length
      : 0;

    // Dialogue ratio
    const dialogueMatches = text.match(/[""\u201C\u201D][^""\u201C\u201D]*[""\u201C\u201D]/g) || [];
    const dialogueWords = dialogueMatches.join(' ').split(/\s+/).length;
    const dialogueRatio = words.length > 0 ? dialogueWords / words.length : 0;

    // Contraction usage
    const contractions = text.match(/\b\w+'\w+\b/g) || [];
    const contractionRate = words.length > 0 ? contractions.length / words.length : 0;

    // Adverb frequency (rough -ly count)
    const adverbs = words.filter(w => /ly$/i.test(w) && w.length > 3);
    const adverbRate = words.length > 0 ? adverbs.length / words.length : 0;

    // Question and exclamation frequency
    const questions = (text.match(/\?/g) || []).length;
    const exclamations = (text.match(/!/g) || []).length;
    const questionRate = sentences.length > 0 ? questions / sentences.length : 0;
    const exclamationRate = sentences.length > 0 ? exclamations / sentences.length : 0;

    // Em-dash and semicolon usage
    const emDashes = (text.match(/[—–-]{2,}|—/g) || []).length;
    const semicolons = (text.match(/;/g) || []).length;

    // Vocabulary richness (type-token ratio on first 1000 words)
    const sampleWords = words.slice(0, 1000).map(w => w.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z]/g, ''));
    const uniqueWords = new Set(sampleWords.filter(w => w.length > 0));
    const typeTokenRatio = sampleWords.length > 0 ? uniqueWords.size / sampleWords.length : 0;

    return {
      totalWords: words.length,
      totalSentences: sentences.length,
      totalParagraphs: paragraphs.length,
      avgSentenceLength: Math.round(avgSentenceLength * 10) / 10,
      sentenceLengthVariance: Math.round(sentenceLengthVariance * 10) / 10,
      avgParagraphLength: Math.round

      questionRate: Math.round(questionRate * 1000) / 1000,
      exclamationRate: Math.round(exclamationRate * 1000) / 1000,
      emDashesPerThousand: words.length > 0 ? Math.round((emDashes / words.length) * 1000 * 100) / 100 : 0,

  async llmAnalyze(sampleText, stats, genre) {
    // Truncate sample if too long
    const maxSampleChars = 12000;
    const sample = sampleText.length > maxSampleChars
      ? sampleText.slice(0, maxSampleChars) + '\n[...sample truncated...]'
      : sampleText;

    const systemPrompt = `You are an expert literary analyst specializing in authorial voice and style. Analyze the provided writing sample and produce a detailed voice profile that could be used to instruct an AI to replicate this style. Be specific and concrete — cite patterns, not vague impressions.

Output your analysis as JSON with the following structure:
{
  "narrative_perspective": "description of POV tendencies",
  "tense": "past/present/mixed",
  "tone": "description of overall tone",
  "sentence_style": "description of sentence construction patterns",
  "paragraph_style": "description of paragraph structure and transitions",
  "dialogue_style": "how dialogue is written, tagged, and integrated",
  "description_style": "approach to sensory detail, setting, and description",
  "interiority": "how internal thoughts and emotions are conveyed",
  "pacing": "description of pacing tendencies",
  "vocabulary_level": "simple/moderate/literary/dense",
  "figurative_language": "use of metaphor, simile, and other devices",
  "distinctive_patterns": ["list of unique stylistic fingerprints"],
  "avoids": ["things this author tends NOT to do"],
  "prose_rhythm": "description of the cadence and flow",
  "summary": "A 2-3 sentence overall characterization of this voice"
}`;

    const userPrompt = `Analyze this writing sample${genre ? ` (genre: ${genre})` : ''}:

Statistical profile:
- Avg sentence length: ${stats.avgSentenceLength} words
- Sentence length variance: ${stats.sentenceLengthVariance}
- Dialogue ratio: ${(stats.dialogueRatio * 100).toFixed(1)}%
- Contraction rate: ${(stats.contractionRate * 100).toFixed(1)}%
- Adverb rate: ${(stats.adverbRate * 100).toFixed(1)}%
- Type-token ratio: ${stats.typeTokenRatio}
- Em-dashes per 1000 words: ${stats.emDashesPerThousand}

Sample text:
---
${sample}
---

Produce the JSON voice profile.`;

    const result = await this.llm.chat([
      { role: 'system', content: systemPrompt },
      { role: 'user', content: userPrompt }
    ], {
      purpose: 'voice_analysis',
      temperature: 0.3,
      max_tokens: 2000
    });

    try {
      // Extract JSON from response
      const jsonMatch = result.content.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);
      if (jsonMatch) {
        return JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]);
      }
      throw new Error('No JSON found in response');
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('Failed to parse voice analysis JSON, using raw text');
      return { summary: result.content, raw: true };
    }
  }

  buildProfile(llmAnalysis, stats) {
    return {
      statistics: stats,
      analysis: llmAnalysis,
      profile: this.synthesizeProfileText(llmAnalysis, stats),
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      sampleWordCount: stats.totalWords
    };
  }

  mergeProfiles(existing, newAnalysis, newStats) {
    // Weight the new analysis with the existing one
    const merged = { ...existing };

    // Update statistics as weighted average
    if (existing.statistics) {
      const oldWeight = existing.sampleWordCount || 1000;
      const newWeight = newStats.totalWords;
      const totalWeight = oldWeight + newWeight;

      merged.statistics = {};
      for (const key of Object.keys(newStats)) {
        if (typeof newStats[key] === 'number' && typeof existing.statistics[key] === 'number') {
          merged.statistics[key] = (existing.statistics[key] * oldWeight + newStats[key] * newWeight) / totalWeight;
          merged.statistics[key] = Math.round(merged.statistics[key] * 1000) / 1000;
        } else {
          merged.statistics[key] = newStats[key];
        }
      }
    } else {
      merged.statistics = newStats;
    }

    // Merge analysis
    if (!newAnalysis.raw) {
      merged.analysis = newAnalysis;
    }

    merged.profile = this.synthesizeProfileText(merged.analysis, merged.statistics);
    merged.updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    merged.sampleWordCount

    if (analysis.dialogue_style) {
      profile += `**Dialogue:** ${analysis.dialogue_style}\n`;
    }
    if (analysis.description_style) {
      profile += `**Description:** ${analysis.description_style}\n`;
    }
    if (analysis.interiority) {
      profile += `**Interiority:** ${analysis.interiority}\n`;
    }
    if (analysis.pacing) {
      profile += `**Pacing:** ${analysis.pacing}\n`;
    }
    if (analysis.vocabulary_level) {
      profile += `**Vocabulary Level:** ${analysis.vocabulary_level}\n`;
    }
    if (analysis.figurative_language) {
      profile += `**Figurative Language:** ${analysis.figurative_language}\n`;
    }
    if (analysis.prose_rhythm) {
      profile += `**Prose Rhythm:** ${analysis.prose_rhythm}\n`;
    }

    if (analysis.distinctive_patterns && analysis.distinctive_patterns.length > 0) {
      profile += `\n**Distinctive Patterns:**\n`;
      for (const pattern of analysis.distinctive_patterns) {
        profile += `- ${pattern}\n`;
      }
    }

    if (analysis.avoids && analysis.avoids.length > 0) {
      profile += `\n**Avoids:**\n`;
      for (const item of analysis.avoids) {
        profile += `- ${item}\n`;
      }
    }

    // Add statistical anchors
    profile += `\n### Statistical Anchors\n`;
    profile += `- Average sentence length: ~${stats.avgSentenceLength} words\n`;
    profile += `- Dialogue ratio: ~${(stats.dialogueRatio * 100).toFixed(0)}%\n`;
    profile += `- Contraction rate: ${stats.contractionRate > 0.02 ? 'frequent' : stats.contractionRate > 0.005 ? 'moderate' : 'rare'}\n`;
    profile += `- Adverb usage: ${stats.adverbRate > 0.03 ? 'frequent' : stats.adverbRate > 0.015 ? 'moderate' : 'sparse'}\n`;
    profile += `- Vocabulary richness (TTR): ${stats.typeTokenRatio > 0.7 ? 'high' : stats.typeTokenRatio > 0.5 ? 'moderate' : 'conversational'}\n`;

    return profile;
  }
}

**Scene Summarizer — generates and caches summaries for completed scenes.**

```js
// src/engine/scene-summarizer.js

export class SceneSummarizer {
  constructor(llm, db) {
    this.llm = llm;
    this.db = db;
    this.pendingInvalidations = new Set();
  }

  async summarize(sceneId, options = {}) {
    const { force = false } = options;

    const scene = await this.db.scenes.get(sceneId);
    if (!scene) throw new Error(`Scene not found: ${sceneId}`);

    // Return cached summary if valid
    if (!force && scene.summary && !this.pendingInvalidations.has(sceneId)) {
      return scene.summary;
    }

    if (!scene.content || scene.content.trim().length < 50) {
      return null;
    }

    const systemPrompt = `You are a precise story summarizer. Produce a concise summary of the scene that captures:
1. Key plot events and their sequence
2. Character actions and decisions
3. Important revelations or information
4. Emotional beats and relationship changes
5. Setting details if they're significant

The summary should be useful as context for generating subsequent scenes. Be factual and specific. Keep it under 300 words.`;

    // Truncate very long scenes
    const maxContentChars = 20000;
    let content = scene.content;
    if (content.length > maxContentChars) {
      const head = content.slice(0, maxContentChars * 0.3);
      const tail = content.slice(-maxContentChars * 0.7);
      content = head + '\n\n[...middle section omitted...]\n\n' + tail;
    }

    const result = await this.llm.chat([
      { role: 'system', content: systemPrompt },
      { role: 'user', content: `Summarize this scene titled "${scene.title}":\n\n${content}` }
    ], {
      purpose: 'summarization',
      temperature: 0.2,
      max_tokens: 500
    });

    const summary = result.content.trim();

    // Cache the summary
    await this.db.scenes.update(sceneId, { summary });
    this.pendingInvalidations.delete(sceneId);

    return summary;
  }

  async

  async invalidateSummary(sceneId) {
    this.pendingInvalidations.add(sceneId);
  }

  async summarizeChapter(chapterId) {
    const scenes = await this.db.scenes
      .where('chapterId').equals(chapterId)
      .sortBy('order');

    if (scenes.length === 0) return null;

    // Ensure all scenes have summaries
    const sceneSummaries = [];
    for (const scene of scenes) {
      if (scene.content && scene.content.trim().length > 50) {
        const summary = await this.summarize(scene.id);
        if (summary) {
          sceneSummaries.push({ title: scene.title, summary });
        }
      }
    }

    if (sceneSummaries.length === 0) return null;

    const systemPrompt = `You are a precise story summarizer. Given summaries of individual scenes within a chapter, produce a cohesive chapter summary that captures the overall arc, key events, and character developments. Keep it under 400 words.`;

    const sceneSummaryText = sceneSummaries
      .map((s, i) => `Scene ${i + 1}: "${s.title}"\n${s.summary}`)
      .join('\n\n');

    const chapter = await this.db.chapters.get(chapterId);

    const result = await this.llm.chat([
      { role: 'system', content: systemPrompt },
      { role: 'user', content: `Summarize this chapter titled "${chapter.title}":\n\n${sceneSummaryText}` }
    ], {
      purpose: 'summarization',
      temperature: 0.2,
      max_tokens: 600
    });

    const summary = result.content.trim();

    await this.db.chapters.update(chapterId, { summary });

    return summary;
  }
}

// src/engine/entity-tracker.js

export class EntityTracker {
  constructor(llm, db) {
    this.llm = llm;
    this.db = db;
  }

  async updateFromContent(sceneId, newContent) {
    const scene = await this.db.scenes.get(sceneId);
    if (!scene) return;

    const chapter = await this.db.chapters.get(scene.chapterId);
    if (!chapter) return;

    const existingEntities = await this.db.entities
      .where('projectId').equals(chapter.projectId)
      .toArray();

    const entityNames = existingEntities.map(e => e.name);

    const systemPrompt = `You are a story continuity tracker. Given a passage of fiction and a list of known entities, identify any state changes. Output JSON only.

Known entities: ${entityNames.length > 0 ? entityNames.join(', ') : '(none yet)'}

Output format:
{
  "updates": [
    {
      "name": "Entity Name",
      "type": "character|location|object|faction",
      "stateChanges": { "key": "value" },
      "newRelationships": [{ "type": "relationship_type", "target": "Other Entity" }],
      "isNew": false
    }
  ]
}

Only include entities that actually appear or are meaningfully referenced. Only include state changes that are clearly established in the text. Do not speculate.`;

    // Only analyze if content is substantial enough
    if (newContent.trim().split(/\s+/).length < 30) return;

    // Truncate if very long
    const content = newContent.length > 8000 ? newContent.slice(-8000) : newContent;

    const result = await this.llm.chat([
      { role: 'system', content: systemPrompt },
      { role: 'user', content: `Analyze this passage:\n\n${content}` }
    ], {
      purpose: 'entity_tracking',
      temperature: 0.1,
      max_tokens: 1000
    });

    try {
      const jsonMatch = result.content.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);
      if (!jsonMatch) return;

      const parsed = JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]);
      if (!parsed.updates || !Array.isArray(parsed.updates)) return;

      for (const update of parsed.updates) {
        await this.applyEntityUpdate(chapter.projectId, update, existingEntities);
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('Entity tracking parse error (non-critical):', e.message);
    }
  }

  async applyEntityUpdate(projectId, update, existingEntities) {
    if (!update.name) return;

    const existing = existingEntities.find(
      e => e.name.toLowerCase() === update.name.toLowerCase()
    );

    if (existing) {
      const changes = {};

      if (update.stateChanges && Object.keys(update.stateChanges).length > 0) {
        changes.state = { ...(existing.state || {}), ...update.stateChanges };
      }

      if (update.newRelationships && update.newRelationships.length > 0) {
        const existingRels = existing.relationships || [];
        const newRels = update.newRelationships.filter(nr =>
          !existingRels.some(er => er.type === nr.type && er.target === nr.target)
        );
        if (newRels.length > 0) {
          changes.relationships = [...existingRels, ...newRels];
        }
      }

      if (Object.keys(changes).length > 0) {
        changes.lastUpdated = new Date().toISOString();
        await this.db.entities.update(existing.id, changes);
      }
    } else if (update.isNew) {
      await this.db.entities.add({

  async getEntityContext(projectId) {
    const entities = await this.db.entities
      .where('projectId').equals(projectId)
      .toArray();

    if (entities.length === 0) return null;

    const sections = [];

    const characters = entities.filter(e => e.type === 'character');
    const locations = entities.filter(e => e.type === 'location');
    const objects = entities.filter(e => e.type === 'object');
    const factions = entities.filter(e => e.type === 'faction');

    if (characters.length > 0) {
      let section = '### Characters\n';
      for (const c of characters) {
        section += `**${c.name}**`;
        if (c.state && Object.keys(c.state).length > 0) {
          const stateStr = Object.entries(c.state)
            .map(([k, v]) => `${k}: ${v}`)
            .join('; ');
          section += ` — ${stateStr}`;
        }
        if (c.relationships && c.relationships.length > 0) {
          const relStr = c.relationships
            .map(r => `${r.type} ${r.target}`)
            .join(', ');
          section += ` [${relStr}]`;
        }
        section += '\n';
      }
      sections.push(section);
    }

    if (locations.length > 0) {
      let section = '### Locations\n';
      for (const l of locations) {
        section += `**${l.name}**`;
        if (l.state && Object.keys(l.state).length > 0) {
          const stateStr = Object.entries(l.state)
            .map(([k, v]) => `${k}: ${v}`)
            .join('; ');
          section += ` — ${stateStr}`;
        }
        section += '\n';
      }
      sections.push(section);
    }

    if (objects.length > 0) {
      let section = '### Notable Objects\n';
      for (const o of objects) {
        section += `**${o.name}**`;
        if (o.state && Object.keys(o.state).length > 0) {
          const stateStr = Object.entries(o.state)
            .map(([k, v]) => `${k}: ${v}`)
            .join('; ');
          section += ` — ${stateStr}`;
        }
        section += '\n';
      }
      sections.push(section);
    }

    if (factions.length > 0) {
      let section = '### Factions/Groups\n';
      for (const f of factions) {
        section += `**${f.name}**`;
        if (f.state && Object.keys(f.state).length > 0) {
          const stateStr = Object.entries(f.state)
            .map(([k, v]) => `${k}: ${v}`)
            .join('; ');
          section += ` — ${stateStr}`;
        }
        section += '\n';
      }
      sections.push(section);
    }

    return sections.join('\n');
  }
}

**LLM Adapter — abstraction layer over different LLM providers with streaming support.**

```js
// src/llm/llm-adapter.js

export class LLMAdapter {
  constructor(config = {}) {
    this.provider = config.provider || 'openai';
    this.apiKey = config.apiKey || '';
    this.baseUrl = config.baseUrl || '';
    this.model = config.model || 'gpt-4o';
    this.defaultMaxTokens = config.defaultMaxTokens || 4000;

    // Per-purpose model overrides (use cheaper models for utility tasks)
    this.modelOverrides = config.modelOverrides || {
      generation: null,        // use default
      summarization: null,     // could use a cheaper model
      voice_analysis: null,
      entity_tracking: null,
      brainstorming: null
    };

    // Rate limiting
    this.requestQueue = [];
    this.activeRequests = 0;
    this.maxConcurrent = config.maxConcurrent || 3;
    this.requestsThisMinute = 0;
    this.maxRequestsPerMinute = config.maxRequestsPerMinute || 30;

    this.resetRateCounter();
  }

  resetRateCounter() {
    setInterval(() => {
      this.requestsThisMinute = 0;
    }, 60000);
  }

  getModelForPurpose(purpose) {
    return (this.modelOverrides && this.modelOverrides[purpose]) || this.model;
  }

  async chat(messages, options = {}) {
    const {
      purpose = 'generation',
      temperature = 0.7,
      max_tokens = this.defaultMaxTokens,
      stream = false,
      stop = null
    } = options;

    const model = this.getModelForPurpose(purpose);

    // Wait for rate limit clearance
    await this.waitForSlot();

    const requestBody = {
      model,
      messages,
      temperature,
      max_tokens,
      stream
    };

    if (stop) requestBody.stop = stop;

    const endpoint = this.getEndpoint();
    const headers = this.getHeaders();

    this.

```js
    this.activeRequests++;
    this.requestsThisMinute++;

    try {
      if (stream) {
        return await this.streamRequest(endpoint, headers, requestBody);
      } else {
        return await this.blockRequest(endpoint, headers, requestBody);
      }
    } finally {
      this.activeRequests--;
      this.processQueue();
    }
  }

  async waitForSlot() {
    if (this.activeRequests < this.maxConcurrent && this.requestsThisMinute < this.maxRequestsPerMinute) {
      return;
    }

    return new Promise(resolve => {
      this.requestQueue.push(resolve);
    });
  }

  processQueue() {
    while (
      this.requestQueue.length > 0 &&
      this.activeRequests < this.maxConcurrent &&
      this.requestsThisMinute < this.maxRequestsPerMinute
    ) {
      const next = this.requestQueue.shift();
      next();
    }
  }

  getEndpoint() {
    switch (this.provider) {
      case 'openai':
        return (this.baseUrl || 'https://api.openai.com/v1') + '/chat/completions';
      case 'anthropic':
        return (this.baseUrl || 'https://api.anthropic.com/v1') + '/messages';
      case 'openrouter':
        return (this.baseUrl || 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1') + '/chat/completions';
      case 'local':
        return (this.baseUrl || 'http://localhost:1234/v1') + '/chat/completions';
      default:
        // Assume OpenAI-compatible
        return (this.baseUrl || 'https://api.openai.com/v1') + '/chat/completions';
    }
  }

  getHeaders() {
    const headers = {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json'
    };

    switch (this.provider) {
      case 'anthropic':
        headers['x-api-key'] = this.apiKey;
        headers['anthropic-version'] = '2023-06-01';
        break;
      case 'openrouter':
        headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.apiKey}`;
        headers['HTTP-Referer'] = window.location.origin;
        break;
      default:
        headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.apiKey}`;
        break;
    }

    return headers;
  }

  async blockRequest(endpoint, headers, body) {
    if (this.provider === 'anthropic') {
      return this.blockRequestAnthropic(endpoint, headers, body);
    }

    const response = await fetch(endpoint, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers,
      body: JSON.stringify(body)
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const errorBody = await response.text();
      throw new LLMError(`LLM request failed: ${response.status}`, response.status, errorBody);
    }

    const data = await response.json();

    return {
      content: data.choices[0].message.content,
      usage: data.usage,
      model: data.model,
      finishReason: data.choices[0].finish_reason
    };
  }

  async blockRequestAnthropic(endpoint, headers, body) {
    const anthropicBody = this.convertToAnthropicFormat(body);

    const response = await fetch(endpoint, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers,
      body: JSON.stringify(anthropicBody)
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const errorBody = await response.text();
      throw new LLMError(`Anthropic request failed: ${response.status}`, response.status, errorBody);
    }

    const data = await response.json();

    return {
      content: data.content[0].text,
      usage: {
        prompt_tokens: data.usage.input_tokens,
        completion_tokens: data.usage.output_tokens,
        total_tokens: data.usage.input_tokens + data.usage.output_tokens
      },
      model: data.model,
      finishReason: data.stop_reason
    };
  }

  convertToAnthropicFormat(body) {
    const messages = [...body.messages];
    let system = '';

    // Extract system message
    if (messages.length > 0 && messages[0].role === 'system') {
      system = messages.shift().content;
    }

    const anthropicBody = {
      model: body.model,
      messages,
      max_tokens: body.max_tokens || 4000,
      temperature: body.temperature
    };

    if (system) {
      anthropicBody.system = system;
    }

    if (body.stream) {
      anthropicBody.stream = true;
    }

    if (body.stop) {
      anthropicBody.stop_sequences = Array.isArray(body.stop) ? body.stop : [body.stop];
    }

    return anthropicBody;
  }

  async streamRequest(endpoint, headers, body) {
    if (this.provider === 'anthropic') {
      return this.streamRequestAnthropic(endpoint, headers, body);
    }

    const response = await fetch(endpoint, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers,
      body: JSON.stringify(body)
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const errorBody = await response.text();
      throw new LLMError(`LLM stream request failed: ${response.status}`, response.status, errorBody);
    }

    const reader = response.body.getReader();
    const decoder = new TextDecoder();

    const stream = this.createOpenAIStream(reader, decoder);

    return { stream };
  }

  async *createOpenAIStream(reader, decoder) {

## [2026-05-07 12:45:28] Run

```js
  async *createOpenAIStream(reader, decoder) {
    let buffer = '';

    try {
      while (true) {
        const { done, value } = await reader.read();
        if (done) break;

        buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
        const lines = buffer.split('\n');
        buffer = lines.pop() || '';

        for (const line of lines) {
          const trimmed = line.trim();
          if (!trimmed || !trimmed.startsWith('data: ')) continue;

          const data = trimmed.slice(6);
          if (data === '[DONE]') return;

          try {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(data);
            const delta = parsed.choices?.[0]?.delta?.content;
            if (delta) {
              yield {
                type: 'content',
                content: delta
              };
            }

            const finishReason = parsed.choices?.[0]?.finish_reason;
            if (finishReason) {
              yield {
                type: 'finish',
                finishReason,
                usage: parsed.usage || null
              };
            }
          } catch (e) {
            // Skip malformed JSON chunks
          }
        }
      }
    } finally {
      reader.releaseLock();
    }
  }

  async streamRequestAnthropic(endpoint, headers, body) {
    const anthropicBody = this.convertToAnthropicFormat(body);

    const response = await fetch(endpoint, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers,
      body: JSON.stringify(anthropicBody)
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const errorBody = await response.text();
      throw new LLMError(`Anthropic stream request failed: ${response.status}`, response.status, errorBody);
    }

    const reader = response.body.getReader();
    const decoder = new TextDecoder();

    const stream = this.createAnthropicStream(reader, decoder);

    return { stream };
  }

  async *createAnthropicStream(reader, decoder) {
    let buffer = '';

    try {
      while (true) {
        const { done, value } = await reader.read();
        if (done) break;

        buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
        const lines = buffer.split('\n');
        buffer = lines.pop() || '';

        for (const line of lines) {
          const trimmed = line.trim();
          if (!trimmed || !trimmed.startsWith('data: ')) continue;

          try {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(trimmed.slice(6));

            if (parsed.type === 'content_block_delta' && parsed.delta?.text) {
              yield {
                type: 'content',
                content: parsed.delta.text
              };
            }

            if (parsed.type === 'message_stop') {
              yield {
                type: 'finish',
                finishReason: 'end_turn',
                usage: null
              };
            }

            if (parsed.type === 'message_delta' && parsed.usage) {
              yield {
                type: 'usage',
                usage: {
                  prompt_tokens: parsed.usage.input_tokens,
                  completion_tokens: parsed.usage.output_tokens,
                  total_tokens: (parsed.usage.input_tokens || 0) + (parsed.usage.output_tokens || 0)
                }
              };
            }
          } catch (e) {
            // Skip malformed chunks
          }
        }
      }
    } finally {
      reader.releaseLock();
    }
  }

  updateConfig(config) {
    if (config.provider !== undefined) this.provider = config.provider;
    if (config.apiKey !== undefined) this.apiKey = config.apiKey;
    if (config.baseUrl !== undefined) this.baseUrl = config.baseUrl;
    if (config.model !== undefined) this.model = config.model;
    if (config.modelOverrides !== undefined) this.modelOverrides = config.modelOverrides;
    if (config.maxConcurrent !== undefined) this.maxConcurrent = config.maxConcurrent;
    if (config.maxRequestsPerMinute !== undefined) this.maxRequestsPerMinute = config.maxRequestsPerMinute;
  }

  async testConnection() {
    try {
      const result = await this.chat([
        { role: 'user', content: 'Reply with exactly: CONNECTION_OK' }
      ], {
        purpose: 'generation',
        temperature: 0,
        max_tokens: 20
      });

      return {
        success: true,
        model: result.model,
        content: result.content
      };
    } catch (e) {
      return {
        success: false,
        error: e.message
      };
    }
  }
}

export class LLMError extends Error {
  constructor(message, status, body) {
    super(message);
    this.name = 'LLMError';
    this.status = status;
    this.body = body;
  }
}

  async createProject(data) {
    const project = {
      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
      title: data.title || 'Untitled Project',
      genre: data.genre || '',
      description: data.description || '',
      targetWordCount: data.targetWordCount || 80000,
      currentWordCount: 0,
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      lastModified: new Date().toISOString(),
      settings: {
        voiceProfileId: null,
        defaultTemperature: 0.8,
        defaultMaxTokens: 3000,
        ...data.settings
      }
    };

    await this.projects.add(project);
    return project;
  }

  async createChapter(projectId, data = {}) {
    const existingChapters = await this.chapters
      .where('projectId').equals(projectId)
      .count();

    const chapter = {
      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
      projectId,
      title: data.title || `Chapter ${existingChapters + 1}`,
      order: data.order !== undefined ? data.order : existingChapters,
      summary: data.summary || null,
      notes: data.notes || '',
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString()
    };

    await this.chapters.add(chapter);
    return chapter;
  }

  async createScene(chapterId, data = {}) {
    const chapter = await this.chapters.get(chapterId);
    if (!chapter) throw new Error(`Chapter not found: ${chapterId}`);

    const existingScenes = await this.scenes
      .where('chapterId').equals(chapterId)
      .count();

    const scene = {
      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
      chapterId,
      title: data.title || `Scene ${existingScenes + 1}`,
      order: data.order !== undefined ? data.order : existingScenes,
      content: data.content || '',
      status: data.status || 'outline', // outline | draft | revised | final
      summary: data.summary || null,
      notes: data.notes || '',
      outline: data.outline || '',
      pointOfView: data.pointOfView || '',
      location: data.location || '',
      characters: data.characters || [],
      wordCount: 0,
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      lastModified: new Date().toISOString()
    };

    await this.scenes.add(scene);
    return scene;
  }

  async updateSceneContent(sceneId, content) {
    const wordCount = content.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length;
    await this.scenes.update(sceneId, {
      content,
      wordCount,
      lastModified: new Date().toISOString()
    });

    // Update project word count
    const scene = await this.scenes.get(sceneId);
    const chapter = await this.chapters.get(scene.chapterId);
    await this.recalculateProjectWordCount(chapter.projectId);
  }

  async recalculateProjectWordCount(projectId) {
    const chapters = await this.chapters
      .where('projectId').equals(projectId)
      .toArray();

    const chapterIds = chapters.map(c => c.id);

    let totalWords = 0;
    for (const chapterId of chapterIds) {
      const scenes = await this.scenes
        .where('chapterId').equals(chapterId)
        .toArray();
      for (const scene of scenes) {
        totalWords += scene.wordCount || 0;
      }
    }

    await this.projects.update(projectId, {
      currentWordCount: totalWords,
      lastModified: new Date().toISOString()
    });

    return totalWords;
  }

  async logGeneration(sceneId, data) {
    const record = {
      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
      sceneId,
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      prompt: data.prompt || '',
      promptTokens: data.promptTokens || 0,
      completionTokens: data.completionTokens || 0,
      model: data.model || '',
      temperature: data.temperature || 0,
      generatedText: data.generatedText || '',
      accepted: data.accepted !== undefined ? data.accepted : null,
      editedText: data.editedText || null
    };

    await this.generations.add(record);
    return record;
  }

  async getProjectStructure(projectId) {
    const project = await this.projects.get(projectId);
    if (!project) throw new Error(`Project not found: ${projectId}`);

    const chapters = await this.chapters
      .where('projectId').equals(projectId)
      .sortBy('order');

    for (const chapter of chapters) {
      chapter.scenes = await this.scenes
        .where('chapterId').equals(chapter.id)
        .sortBy('order');
    }

    return { project, chapters };
  }

  async exportProject(projectId) {
    const structure = await this.getProjectStructure(projectId);
    const entities = await this.entities
      .where('projectId').equals(projectId)
      .toArray();
    const voiceProfile = await this.voiceProfiles
      .where('projectId').equals(projectId)
      .first();
    const worldN

```js
    const worldNotes = await this.worldNotes
      .where('projectId').equals(projectId)
      .toArray();

    return {
      version: 1,
      exportedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      project: structure.project,

      entities,

    };

  async importProject(data) {
    if (!data.project) throw new Error('Invalid import data');

    const newProjectId = crypto.randomUUID();
    const idMap = new Map();
    idMap.set(data.project.id, newProjectId);

    // Import project
    const project = {
      ...data.project,
      id: newProjectId,
      title: data.project.title + ' (imported)',
      lastModified: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    await this.projects.add(project);

    // Import chapters and scenes
    if (data.chapters) {
      for (const chapter of data.chapters) {
        const newChapterId = crypto.randomUUID();
        idMap.set(chapter.id, newChapterId);

        await this.chapters.add({
          ...chapter,
          id: newChapterId,
          projectId: newProjectId
        });

        if (chapter.scenes) {
          for (const scene of chapter.scenes) {
            const newSceneId = crypto.randomUUID();
            idMap.set(scene.id, newSceneId);

            await this.scenes.add({
              ...scene,
              id: newSceneId,
              chapterId: newChapterId
            });
          }
        }
      }
    }

    // Import entities
    if (data.entities) {
      for (const entity of data.entities) {
        await this.entities.add({
          ...entity,
          id: crypto.randomUUID(),
          projectId: newProjectId
        });
      }
    }

    // Import voice profile
    if (data.voiceProfile) {
      await this.voiceProfiles.add({
        ...data.voiceProfile,
        id: crypto.randomUUID(),
        projectId: newProjectId
      });
    }

    // Import world notes
    if (data.worldNotes) {
      for (const note of data.worldNotes) {
        await this.worldNotes.add({
          ...note,
          id: crypto.randomUUID(),
          projectId: newProjectId
        });
      }
    }

    return newProjectId;
  }

  async getSetting(key, defaultValue = null) {
    const record = await this.settings.get(key);
    return record ? record.value : defaultValue;
  }

  async setSetting(key, value) {
    await this.settings.put({ key, value });
  }
}

**Context Assembler — builds the prompt context window for generation, managing token budgets.**

```js
// src/engine/context-assembler.js

export class ContextAssembler {
  constructor(db, summarizer, entityTracker, voiceAnalyzer) {
    this.db = db;
    this.summarizer = summarizer;
    this.entityTracker = entityTracker;
    this.voiceAnalyzer = voiceAnalyzer;
  }

  async assembleContext(sceneId, options = {}) {
    const {
      maxContextTokens = 12000,
      includeVoice = true,
      includeEntities = true,
      includeWorldNotes = true,
      includePriorScenes = true,
      customInstructions = ''
    } = options;

    const scene = await this.db.scenes.get(sceneId);
    if (!scene) throw new Error(`Scene not found: ${sceneId}`);

    const chapter = await this.db.chapters.get(scene.chapterId);
    const project = await this.db.projects.get(chapter.projectId);

    // Token budget allocation (approximate, using ~4 chars per token)
    const tokenBudget = {
      system: Math.floor(maxContextTokens * 0.05),
      voice: Math.floor(maxContextTokens * 0.12),
      worldNotes: Math.floor(maxContextTokens * 0.08),
      entities: Math.floor(maxContextTokens * 0.08),
      priorContext: Math.floor(maxContextTokens * 0.30),
      sceneSetup: Math.floor(maxContextTokens * 0.07),
      recentContent: Math.floor(maxContextTokens * 0.25),
      instructions: Math.floor(maxContextTokens * 0.05)
    };

    const sections = [];

    // 1. System identity
    sections.push({
      role: 'system',
      key: 'identity',
      content: this.buildSystemIdentity(project),
      priority: 100
    });

    // 2. Voice profile
    if (includeVoice) {
      const voiceProfile = await this.db.voiceProfiles
        .where('projectId').equals(project.id)
        .first();

      if (voiceProfile && voiceProfile.profileText) {
        sections.push({
          role: 'system',
          key: 'voice',
          content: `## Voice Profile\n\n${voiceProfile.profileText}`,
          priority: 90,
          maxTokens: tokenBudget.voice
        });
      }
    }

    // 3. World notes
    if (includeWorldNotes) {
      const worldNotes = await this.db.worldNotes
        .where('projectId').equals(project.id)
        .toArray();

      if (worldNotes.length > 0) {
        const relevantNotes = this.filterRelevantNotes(worldNotes, scene);
        if (relevantNotes.length > 0) {
          const notesText = relevantNotes
            .map

            .map(n => `**${n.title}** (${n.category}): ${n.content}`)

          sections.push({
            role: 'system',
            key: 'worldNotes',
            content: `## World & Setting Notes\n\n${notesText}`,
            priority: 60,
            maxTokens: tokenBudget.worldNotes
          });
        }
      }
    }

    // 4. Entity state
    if (includeEntities) {
      const entityContext = await this.entityTracker.getEntityContext(project.id);
      if (entityContext) {
        sections.push({
          role: 'system',
          key: 'entities',
          content: `## Story Entities & Current State\n\n${entityContext}`,
          priority: 70,
          maxTokens: tokenBudget.entities
        });
      }
    }

    // 5. Prior scene context (summaries of earlier scenes)
    if (includePriorScenes) {
      const priorContext = await this.buildPriorContext(scene, chapter, project, tokenBudget.priorContext);
      if (priorContext) {
        sections.push({
          role: 'system',
          key: 'priorContext',
          content: priorContext,
          priority: 80,
          maxTokens: tokenBudget.priorContext
        });
      }
    }

    // 6. Scene setup
    const sceneSetup = this.buildSceneSetup(scene, chapter);
    sections.push({
      role: 'system',
      key: 'sceneSetup',
      content: sceneSetup,
      priority: 95,
      maxTokens: tokenBudget.sceneSetup
    });

    // 7. Custom instructions
    if (customInstructions) {
      sections.push({
        role: 'system',
        key: 'instructions',
        content: `## Additional Instructions\n\n${customInstructions}`,
        priority: 85,
        maxTokens: tokenBudget.instructions
      });
    }

    // 8. Recent content (the actual text leading up to the cursor)
    const recentContent = this.getRecentContent(scene.content, tokenBudget.recentContent);

    // Assemble into messages
    return this.assembleMessages(sections, recentContent, maxContextTokens);
  }

  buildSystemIdentity(project) {
    let identity = `You are a skilled fiction writer collaborating on a ${project.genre || 'fiction'} project titled "${project.title}".`;

    if (project.description) {
      identity += `\n\nProject description: ${project.description}`;
    }

    identity += `\n\nYour role is to continue the story naturally, maintaining consistency with established characters, plot, setting, and voice. Write prose only — no meta-commentary, no explanations, no markdown headers. Continue seamlessly from where the text leaves off.`;

    return identity;
  }

  buildSceneSetup(scene, chapter) {
    let setup = `## Current Scene\n\n`;
    setup += `**Chapter:** ${chapter.title}\n`;
    setup += `**Scene:** ${scene.title}\n`;

    if (scene.pointOfView) {
      setup += `**POV:** ${scene.pointOfView}\n`;
    }
    if (scene.location) {
      setup += `**Location:** ${scene.location}\n`;
    }
    if (scene.characters && scene.characters.length > 0) {
      setup += `**Characters present:** ${scene.characters.join(', ')}\n`;
    }
    if (scene.outline) {
      setup += `\n**Scene outline:** ${scene.outline}\n`;
    }
    if (scene.notes) {
      setup += `\n**Scene notes:** ${scene.notes}\n`;
    }

    return setup;
  }

  async buildPriorContext(scene, chapter, project, maxTokens) {
    const allChapters = await this.db.chapters
      .where('projectId').equals(project.id)
      .sortBy('order');

    const parts = [];
    let estimatedTokens = 0;
    const charsPerToken = 4;
    const maxChars = maxTokens * charsPerToken;

    // Get summaries of prior chapters
    for (const ch of allChapters) {
      if (ch.order >= chapter.order) break;

      if (ch.summary) {
        const entry = `**${ch.title}:** ${ch.summary}`;
        if (estimatedTokens + entry.length / charsPerToken > maxTokens) break;
        parts.push(entry);
        estimatedTokens += entry.length / charsPerToken;
      }
    }

    // Get scenes in current chapter before this scene
    const currentChapterScenes = await this.db.scenes
      .where('chapterId').equals(chapter.id)
      .sortBy('order');

    for (const s of currentChapterScenes) {
      if (s.order >= scene.order) break;

      if (s.summary) {
        const entry = `**${s.title}:** ${s.summary}`;
        if (estimatedTokens + entry.length / charsPerToken > maxTokens) break;
        parts.push(entry);
        estimatedTokens += entry.length / charsPerToken;
      } else if (s.content && s.content.trim().length > 0) {
        // If no summary, use truncated content
        const truncated = s.content.slice(-2000);
        const entry = `**${s.title} (excerpt):** ...${truncated}`;
        if (estimatedTokens + entry.length / charsPerToken > maxTokens) break;
        parts.push(entry);
        estimatedTokens += entry.length / charsPerToken;

```js
      }
    }

    if (parts.length === 0) return null;

    return `## Story So Far\n\n${parts.join('\n\n')}`;
  }

  getRecentContent(content, maxTokens) {
    if (!content || content.trim().length === 0) return '';

    const maxChars = maxTokens * 4;

    if (content.length <= maxChars) {
      return content;
    }

    // Take the tail end, but try to break at a paragraph boundary
    const truncated = content.slice(-maxChars);
    const paragraphBreak = truncated.indexOf('\n\n');

    if (paragraphBreak !== -1 && paragraphBreak < truncated.length * 0.3) {
      return truncated.slice(paragraphBreak + 2);
    }

    // Fall back to sentence boundary
    const sentenceBreak = truncated.indexOf('. ');
    if (sentenceBreak !== -1 && sentenceBreak < truncated.length * 0.2) {
      return truncated.slice(sentenceBreak + 2);
    }

    return truncated;
  }

  filterRelevantNotes(worldNotes, scene) {
    // Simple relevance: check if note title or content mentions scene characters/location
    const sceneTerms = new Set();

    if (scene.characters) {
      scene.characters.forEach(c => {
        sceneTerms.add(c.toLowerCase());
        // Also add first names
        const parts = c.split(' ');
        if (parts.length > 1) sceneTerms.add(parts[0].toLowerCase());
      });
    }

    if (scene.location) {
      sceneTerms.add(scene.location.toLowerCase());
    }

    if (scene.outline) {
      // Extract capitalized words as potential entity references
      const caps = scene.outline.match(/[A-Z][a-z]{2,}/g);
      if (caps) caps.forEach(w => sceneTerms.add(w.toLowerCase()));
    }

    if (sceneTerms.size === 0) {
      // No filtering possible, return all (up to a limit)
      return worldNotes.slice(0, 10);
    }

    const scored = worldNotes.map(note => {
      let score = 0;
      const noteText = `${note.title} ${note.content}`.toLowerCase();

      for (const term of sceneTerms) {
        if (noteText.includes(term)) score += 2;
      }

      // Boost certain categories
      if (note.category === 'character') score += 1;
      if (note.category === 'setting' && scene.location) score += 1;

      return { note, score };
    });

    return scored
      .filter(s => s.score > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
      .slice(0, 8)
      .map(s => s.note);
  }

  assembleMessages(sections, recentContent, maxContextTokens) {
    // Sort sections by priority (highest first)
    sections.sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority);

    // Truncate sections that exceed their token budget
    for (const section of sections) {
      if (section.maxTokens) {
        const maxChars = section.maxTokens * 4;
        if (section.content.length > maxChars) {
          section.content = section.content.slice(0, maxChars) + '\n[...truncated]';
        }
      }
    }

    // Combine all system sections
    const systemContent = sections
      .map(s => s.content)
      .join('\n\n---\n\n');

    const messages = [
      { role: 'system', content: systemContent }
    ];

    // Add recent content as the user message (the text to continue from)
    if (recentContent) {
      messages.push({
        role: 'user',
        content: `Continue the story from where it leaves off. Here is the recent text:\n\n---\n\n${recentContent}`
      });
    } else {
      messages.push({
        role: 'user',
        content: 'Begin writing the opening of this scene based on the scene setup and outline provided.'
      });
    }

    return messages;
  }

  estimateTokens(text) {
    if (!text) return 0;
    return Math.ceil(text.length / 4);
  }
}

// src/engine/generation-engine.js

export class GenerationEngine {
  constructor({ db, llm, contextAssembler, summarizer, entityTracker, voiceAnalyzer }) {
    this.db = db;
    this.llm = llm;
    this.contextAssembler = contextAssembler;
    this.summarizer = summarizer;
    this.entityTracker = entityTracker;
    this.voiceAnalyzer = voiceAnalyzer;

    this.activeGenerations = new Map();
  }

  async generate(sceneId, options = {}) {
    const {
      mode = 'continue',        // continue | rewrite | insert | brainstorm
      selectedText = null,       // for rewrite mode
      insertionPoint = null,     // for insert mode
      userPrompt = '',           // additional user instruction
      temperature = null,
      maxTokens = null,
      stream = true,
      onChunk = null,            // callback for streaming chunks
      onComplete = null,
      onError = null
    } = options;

    const generationId = crypto.randomUUID();

    // Abort controller for cancellation
    const abortController = new AbortController();
    this.activeGenerations.set(generationId, { abortController, sceneId });

    try {
      const scene
