  showCharacterModal() {
    const modal = new CharacterModal({
      store: this.props.store,
      onSave: async (character) => {
        const project = this.props.store.currentProject;
        if (!project.characters) project.characters = [];
        project.characters.push(character);
        await this.props.store.saveProject(project);
        this.refreshSidebar();
        modal.close();
      },
    });
    modal.open();
    this.children.push(modal);
  }

  showNoteModal() {
    const modal = new NoteModal({
      store: this.props.store,
      onSave: async (note) => {
        const project = this.props.store.currentProject;
        if (!project.notes) project.notes = [];
        project.notes.push(note);
        await this.props.store.saveProject(project);
        this.refreshSidebar();
        modal.close();
      },
    });
    modal.open();
    this.children.push(modal);
  }

  showExportModal() {
    const modal = new ExportModal({
      store: this.props.store,
      project: this.props.store.currentProject,
    });
    modal.open();
    this.children.push(modal);
  }

  refreshSidebar() {
    const sidebarEl = document.getElementById('sidebar');
    if (sidebarEl && sidebarEl.__component) {
      sidebarEl.__component.update({
        view: 'editor',
        project: this.props.store.currentProject,
        currentChapterId: this.props.store.currentProject.chapters?.[this.currentChapterIndex]?.id,
      });
    }
    // Fallback: emit event
    this.emit('project-updated');
  }

  handleKeyboard(e) {
    // Ctrl/Cmd + S to save
    if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key === 's') {
      e.preventDefault();
      this.saveCurrentChapter();
    }
    // Ctrl/Cmd + B for bold
    if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key === 'b') {
      e.preventDefault();
      this.handleToolbarAction('bold');
    }
    // Ctrl/Cmd + I for italic
    if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key === 'i') {
      e.preventDefault();
      this.handleToolbarAction('italic');
    }
    // Escape to close AI panel
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && this.aiPanelOpen) {
      this.toggleAIPanel();
    }
  }

  unmount() {
    this.saveCurrentChapter();
    super.unmount();
  }
}

```js
// src/ui/components/TextEditor.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class TextEditor extends Component {
  constructor(props) {
    super(props);
    this.undoStack = [];
    this.redoStack = [];
    this.undoTimer = null;
    this.focusMode = 'normal';
    this.lastContent = props.content || '';
  }

  template() {
    return `
      <div class="text-editor-wrapper">
        <textarea
          class="text-editor"
          id="text-editor-textarea"
          placeholder="${this.props.placeholder || 'Start writing...'}"
          spellcheck="true"
        ></textarea>
        <div class="text-editor-overlay" id="text-editor-overlay"></div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  afterMount() {
    this.textarea = this.$('#text-editor-textarea');
    if (!this.textarea) return;

    this.textarea.value = this.props.content || '';

    // Input handling
    this.on(this.textarea, 'input', () => {
      this.handleInput();
    });

    // Selection change
    this.on(this.textarea, 'select', () => {
      this.handleSelectionChange();
    });

    // Cursor position tracking
    this.on(this.textarea, 'click', () => this.emitCursorPos());
    this.on(this.textarea, 'keyup', () => this.emitCursorPos());

    // Tab key handling
    this.on(this.textarea, 'keydown', (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Tab') {
        e.preventDefault();
        this.insertAtCursor('    ');
      }
    });

    // Smart quotes and typography
    this.on(this.textarea, 'keypress', (e) => {
      this.handleSmartTypography(e);
    });

    // Push initial state to undo stack
    this.pushUndo(this.textarea.value);

    // Focus the editor
    this.textarea.focus();
  }

  handleInput() {
    const content = this.textarea.value;

    // Debounced undo snapshot
    clearTimeout(this.undoTimer);
    this.undoTimer = setTimeout(() => {
      this.pushUndo(content);
    }, 500);

    this

```js
    this.props.onChange?.(content);
  }

  handleSelectionChange() {
    const start = this.textarea.selectionStart;
    const end = this.textarea.selectionEnd;
    if (start !== end) {
      const selectedText = this.textarea.value.substring(start, end);
      this.props.onSelectionChange?.({ start, end, text: selectedText });
    }
  }

  emitCursorPos() {
    const pos = this.getCursorPosition();
    this.props.onCursorMove?.(pos);
  }

  getCursorPosition() {
    const text = this.textarea.value;
    const cursor = this.textarea.selectionStart;
    const lines = text.substring(0, cursor).split('\n');
    return {
      line: lines.length,
      col: lines[lines.length - 1].length + 1,
      offset: cursor,
    };
  }

  handleSmartTypography(e) {
    // Smart quotes
    if (e.key === '"') {
      e.preventDefault();
      const pos = this.textarea.selectionStart;
      const before = this.textarea.value[pos - 1];
      const isOpening = !before || /\s|[(\[{]/.test(before);
      this.insertAtCursor(isOpening ? '\u201C' : '\u201D');
    } else if (e.key === "'") {
      e.preventDefault();
      const pos = this.textarea.selectionStart;
      const before = this.textarea.value[pos - 1];
      const isOpening = !before || /\s|[(\[{]/.test(before);
      this.insertAtCursor(isOpening ? '\u2018' : '\u2019');
    } else if (e.key === '-') {
      const pos = this.textarea.selectionStart;
      const before = this.textarea.value[pos - 1];
      if (before === '-') {
        e.preventDefault();
        // Replace the previous hyphen + this one with em dash
        this.textarea.selectionStart = pos - 1;
        this.textarea.selectionEnd = pos;
        this.insertAtCursor('\u2014');
      }
    }
  }

  getContent() {
    return this.textarea?.value || '';
  }

  setContent(content) {
    if (this.textarea) {
      this.textarea.value = content;
      this.lastContent = content;
      this.undoStack = [content];
      this.redoStack = [];
    }
  }

  getSelection() {
    if (!this.textarea) return null;
    const start = this.textarea.selectionStart;
    const end = this.textarea.selectionEnd;
    return {
      start,
      end,
      text: this.textarea.value.substring(start, end),
    };
  }

  insertAtCursor(text) {
    if (!this.textarea) return;
    const start = this.textarea.selectionStart;
    const end = this.textarea.selectionEnd;
    const value = this.textarea.value;

    this.textarea.value = value.substring(0, start) + text + value.substring(end);
    this.textarea.selectionStart = this.textarea.selectionEnd = start + text.length;
    this.textarea.focus();
    this.handleInput();
  }

  replaceSelection(text) {
    this.insertAtCursor(text);
  }

  wrapSelection(before, after) {
    if (!this.textarea) return;
    const start = this.textarea.selectionStart;
    const end = this.textarea.selectionEnd;
    const value = this.textarea.value;
    const selected = value.substring(start, end);

    // If already wrapped, unwrap
    const textBefore = value.substring(Math.max(0, start - before.length), start);
    const textAfter = value.substring(end, end + after.length);
    if (textBefore === before && textAfter === after) {
      this.textarea.value =
        value.substring(0, start - before.length) +
        selected +
        value.substring(end + after.length);
      this.textarea.selectionStart = start - before.length;
      this.textarea.selectionEnd = end - before.length;
    } else {
      const replacement = before + (selected || 'text') + after;
      this.textarea.value = value.substring(0, start) + replacement + value.substring(end);
      this.textarea.selectionStart = start + before.length;
      this.textarea.selectionEnd = start + before.length + (selected || 'text').length;
    }

    this.textarea.focus();
    this.handleInput();
  }

  prefixLine(prefix) {
    if (!this.textarea) return;
    const start = this.textarea.selectionStart;
    const value = this.textarea.value;

    // Find the start of the current line
    const lineStart = value.lastIndexOf('\n', start - 1) + 1;
    const lineEnd = value.indexOf('\n', start);
    const actualEnd = lineEnd === -1 ? value.length : lineEnd;
    const line = value.substring(lineStart, actualEnd);

    // Toggle prefix
    if (line.startsWith(prefix)) {
      this.textarea.value = value.substring(0, lineStart) + line.substring(prefix.length) + value.substring(actualEnd);
      this.textarea.selectionStart = this.textarea.selectionEnd = start - prefix.length;
    } else {
      this.textarea.value = value.substring(0, lineStart) + prefix + line + value.substring(actualEnd);
      this.textarea.selectionStart = this.textarea.selectionEnd = start + prefix.length;
    }

    this.textarea.focus();
    this.handleInput();
  }

  pushUndo(content) {
    if (this.undoStack[this.

---

```js
    if (this.undoStack[this.undoStack.length - 1] === content) return;
    this.undoStack.push(content);
    if (this.undoStack.length > 100) this.undoStack.shift();
    this.redoStack = [];
  }

  undo() {
    if (this.undoStack.length <= 1) return;
    const current = this.undoStack.pop();
    this.redoStack.push(current);
    const previous = this.undoStack[this.undoStack.length - 1];
    this.textarea.value = previous;
    this.textarea.focus();
    this.props.onChange?.(previous);
  }

  redo() {
    if (this.redoStack.length === 0) return;
    const next = this.redoStack.pop();
    this.undoStack.push(next);
    this.textarea.value = next;
    this.textarea.focus();
    this.props.onChange?.(next);
  }

  setFocusMode(mode) {
    this.focusMode = mode;
    const wrapper = this.el?.querySelector('.text-editor-wrapper');
    if (!wrapper) return;
    wrapper.classList.remove('focus-mode', 'typewriter-mode');
    if (mode === 'focus') wrapper.classList.add('focus-mode');
    if (mode === 'typewriter') wrapper.classList.add('typewriter-mode');
  }
}

// src/ui/components/AIPanel.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class AIPanel extends Component {
  constructor(props) {
    super(props);
    this.messages = [];
    this.isLoading = false;
    this.activeTab = 'chat';
  }

  template() {
    return `
      <div class="ai-panel">
        <div class="ai-panel-header">
          <div class="ai-panel-tabs">
            <button class="ai-tab ${this.activeTab === 'chat' ? 'active' : ''}" data-tab="chat">Chat</button>
            <button class="ai-tab ${this.activeTab === 'suggest' ? 'active' : ''}" data-tab="suggest">Suggest</button>
            <button class="ai-tab ${this.activeTab === 'analyze' ? 'active' : ''}" data-tab="analyze">Analyze</button>
          </div>
          <button class="btn-icon btn-sm" id="btn-close-ai">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div class="ai-panel-body" id="ai-panel-body">
          ${this.renderTabContent()}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  renderTabContent() {
    switch (this.activeTab) {
      case 'chat':
        return this.renderChatTab();
      case 'suggest':
        return this.renderSuggestTab();
      case 'analyze':
        return this.renderAnalyzeTab();
      default:
        return '';
    }
  }

  renderChatTab() {
    return `
      <div class="ai-messages" id="ai-messages">
        ${this.messages.length === 0 ? `
          <div class="ai-welcome">
            <p>👋 I'm your writing assistant. I can help with:</p>
            <ul>
              <li>Continuing your story</li>
              <li>Character development</li>
              <li>Plot suggestions</li>
              <li>Editing and feedback</li>
              <li>World-building ideas</li>
            </ul>
            <p>Select text in the editor for context-aware help, or just ask me anything.</p>
          </div>
        ` : this.messages.map(msg => `
          <div class="ai-message ai-message-${msg.role}">
            <div class="ai-message-avatar">${msg.role === 'user' ? '👤' : '🤖'}</div>
            <div class="ai-message-content">
              <div class="ai-message-text">${this.formatMessage(msg.content)}</div>
              ${msg.role === 'assistant' ? `
                <div class="ai-message-actions">
                  <button class="btn-xs btn-ghost" data-action="insert" data-index="${this.messages.indexOf(msg)}">Insert at cursor</button>
                  <button class="btn-xs btn-ghost" data-action="replace" data-index="${this.messages.indexOf(msg)}">Replace selection</button>
                  <button class="btn-xs btn-ghost" data-action="copy" data-index="${this.messages.indexOf(msg)}">Copy</button>
                </div>
              ` : ''}
            </div>
          </div>
        `).join('')}
        ${this.isLoading ? `
          <div class="ai-message ai-message-assistant">
            <div class="ai-message-avatar">🤖</div>
            <div class="ai-message-content">
              <div class="ai-typing"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ` : ''}
      </div>
      <div class="ai-input-area">
        <div class="ai-quick-actions">
          <button class="btn-xs btn-outline" data-quick="continue">Continue writing</button>
          <button class="btn-xs btn-outline" data-quick="improve">Improve selection</button>
          <button class="btn-xs btn-outline" data-quick="dialogue">Write dialogue</button>
          <button class="btn-xs btn-outline" data-quick="describe">Describe scene</button>
        </div>
        <div class="ai-input-row">
          <textarea class="ai-input" id="ai-input" placeholder="Ask your writing assistant..." rows="2

  afterMount() {
    // Tab switching
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {

      const suggest = e.target.closest('[data-suggest]');
      if (suggest) this.handleSuggest(suggest.dataset.suggest);

      const analyze = e.target.closest('[data-analyze]');
      if (analyze) this.handleAnalyze(analyze.dataset.analyze);

      const action = e.target.closest('[data-action]');
      if (action) this.handleMessageAction(action.dataset.action, parseInt(action.dataset.index));
    });
  }

    const body = this.$('#ai-panel-body');
    if (body) {
      body.innerHTML = this.renderTabContent();

      // Re-bind input events
      const sendBtn = this.$('#btn-ai-send');
      if (sendBtn) {
        this.on(sendBtn, 'click', () => this.sendMessage());
      }
      const input = this.$('#ai-input');
      if (input) {
        this.on(input, 'keydown', (e) => {
          if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
            e.preventDefault();
            this.sendMessage();
          }
        });
      }
    }
  }

  formatMessage(text) {
    // Basic markdown-like formatting
    return text
      .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
      .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
      .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
      .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
      .replace(/\*(.*?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')
      .replace(/`(.*?)`/g, '<code>$1</code>')
      .replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
  }

  getEditorContext() {
    const editor = this.props.editor;
    if (!editor) return {};

    const content = editor.getContent();
    const selection = editor.getSelection();
    const project = this.props.store?.currentProject;

    return {
      fullText: content,
      selectedText: selection?.text || '',
      hasSelection: selection && selection.start !== selection.end,
      projectTitle: project?.title || '',
      genre: project?.genre || '',
      characters: project?.characters || [],
      notes: project?.notes || [],
    };
  }

  async sendMessage() {
    const input = this.$('#ai-input');
    if (!input) return;

    const text = input.value.trim();
    if (!text || this.isLoading) return;

    input.value = '';

    this.messages.push({ role: 'user', content: text });
    this.isLoading = true;
    this.refresh();
    this.scrollMessages();

    try {
      const context = this.getEditorContext();
      const response = await this.props.assistant.chat(text, context, this.messages.slice(0, -1));

      this.messages.push({ role: 'assistant', content: response });
    } catch (err) {
      this.messages.push({
        role: 'assistant',
        content: `Sorry, I encountered an error: ${err.message}. Please check your API key in settings.`,
      });
    }

    this.isLoading = false;
    this.refresh();
    this.scrollMessages();
  }

  async handleQuickAction(action) {
    const context = this.getEditorContext();
    let prompt = '';

    switch (action) {
      case 'continue':
        prompt = 'Continue writing from where the text left off. Match the existing style and tone. Write 2-3 paragraphs.';
        if (context.fullText) {
          prompt += `\n\nHere's the current text:\n\n${context.fullText.slice(-2000)}`;
        }
        break;
      case 'improve':
        if (!context.hasSelection) {
          this.messages.push({
            role: 'assistant',
            content: 'Please select some text in the editor first, then I can help improve it.',
          });
          this.refresh();
          return;
        }
        prompt = `Improve the following text. Enhance the prose, fix any issues, and make it more engaging while keeping the same meaning:\n\n"${context.selectedText}"`;
        break;
      case 'dialogue':
        prompt = 'Write a dialogue scene that fits the current story context.';
        if (context.characters.length > 0) {
          prompt += ` Available characters: ${context.characters.map(c => c.name).join(', ')}.`;
        }
        if (context.fullText) {
          prompt += `\n\nRecent context:\n\n${context.fullText.slice(-1000)}`;
        }
        break;
      case 'describe':
        prompt = 'Write a vivid scene description that fits the current story context. Focus on sensory details.';
        if (context.fullText) {
          prompt += `\n\nRecent context:\n\n${context.fullText.slice(-1000)}`;
        }
        break;
    }

    this.messages.push({ role: 'user', content: prompt });
    this.isLoading = true;
    this.refresh();
    this.scrollMessages();

    try {
      const response = await this.props.assistant.chat(prompt, context, this.messages.slice(0, -1));
      this.messages.push({ role: 'assistant', content: response });
    } catch (err) {
      this.messages.push({
        role: 'assistant',
        content: `Error: ${err.message}`,
      });
    }

    this.isLoading = false;
    this.refresh();
    this.scrollMessages();
  }

  async handleSuggest(type) {
    const context = this.getEditorContext();
    const resultEl = this.$('#ai-suggest-result');
    if (resultEl) resultEl.innerHTML = '<div class="ai-loading">Generating suggestions...</div>';

    let prompt = '';
    switch (type) {
      case 'plot':
        prompt = `Based on the following story, suggest 3 interesting plot directions or twists:\n\nTitle: ${context.projectTitle}\nGenre: ${context.genre}\n\n${context.fullText?.slice(-2000) || 'No content yet.'}`;
        break;
      case 'character':
        prompt = `Suggest character development ideas. Current characters: ${context.characters.map(c => `${c.name} (${c.role || 'unknown role'})`).join(', ') || 'None yet'}.\n\n

        prompt = `Suggest character development ideas. Current characters: ${context.characters.map(c => `${c.name} (${c.role || 'unknown role'})`).join(', ') || 'None yet'}.\n\nStory context:\n${context.fullText?.slice(-1500) || 'No content yet.'}`;
        break;
      case 'dialogue':
        prompt = `Write a sample dialogue exchange that could fit this story.\n\nCharacters: ${context.characters.map(c => c.name).join(', ') || 'Not defined yet'}.\n\nContext:\n${context.fullText?.slice(-1500) || 'No content yet.'}`;
        break;
      case 'worldbuilding':
        prompt = `Suggest world-building details for this story.\n\nTitle: ${context.projectTitle}\nGenre: ${context.genre}\n\nContext:\n${context.fullText?.slice(-1500) || 'No content yet.'}`;
        break;
      case 'names':
        prompt = `Generate 10 character names and 5 place names that would fit this story.\n\nGenre: ${context.genre || 'General fiction'}\nTitle: ${context.projectTitle}`;
        break;
    }

    try {
      const response = await this.props.assistant.chat(prompt, context, []);
      if (resultEl) {
        resultEl.innerHTML = `
          <div class="ai-suggest-response">
            <div class="ai-message-text">${this.formatMessage(response)}</div>
            <div class="ai-message-actions">
              <button class="btn-xs btn-ghost" onclick="navigator.clipboard.writeText(${JSON.stringify(response).replace(/"/g, '&quot;')})">Copy</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
      }
    } catch (err) {
      if (resultEl) {
        resultEl.innerHTML = `<div class="ai-error">Error: ${err.message}</div>`;
      }
    }
  }

  async handleAnalyze(type) {
    const context = this.getEditorContext();
    const text = context.hasSelection ? context.selectedText : context.fullText;
    const resultEl = this.$('#ai-analyze-result');

    if (!text || text.trim().length < 10) {
      if (resultEl) resultEl.innerHTML = '<div class="ai-error">Please write some text first or select text to analyze.</div>';
      return;
    }

    if (resultEl) resultEl.innerHTML = '<div class="ai-loading">Analyzing...</div>';

    let prompt = '';
    switch (type) {
      case 'pacing':
        prompt = `Analyze the pacing of the following text. Identify areas that feel too fast, too slow, or well-paced. Provide specific suggestions:\n\n${text.slice(-3000)}`;
        break;
      case 'tone':
        prompt = `Analyze the tone and mood of the following text. Describe the emotional atmosphere and whether it's consistent:\n\n${text.slice(-3000)}`;
        break;
      case 'consistency':
        prompt = `Check the following text for consistency issues - character behavior, timeline, setting details, point of view shifts, tense changes:\n\n${text.slice(-3000)}`;
        break;
      case 'readability':
        prompt = `Analyze the readability of the following text. Comment on sentence length variety, vocabulary level, paragraph structure, and overall clarity. Provide a rough readability assessment:\n\n${text.slice(-3000)}`;
        break;
      case 'feedback':
        prompt = `Provide constructive writing feedback on the following text. Cover strengths, weaknesses, and specific suggestions for improvement:\n\n${text.slice(-3000)}`;
        break;
    }

    try {
      const response = await this.props.assistant.chat(prompt, context, []);
      if (resultEl) {
        resultEl.innerHTML = `
          <div class="ai-analyze-response">
            <div class="ai-message-text">${this.formatMessage(response)}</div>
          </div>
        `;
      }
    } catch (err) {
      if (resultEl) {
        resultEl.innerHTML = `<div class="ai-error">Error: ${err.message}</div>`;
      }
    }
  }

  handleMessageAction(action, index) {
    const msg = this.messages[index];
    if (!msg || msg.role !== 'assistant') return;

    switch (action) {
      case 'insert':
        this.props.editor?.insertAtCursor(msg.content);
        break;
      case 'replace':
        this.props.editor?.replaceSelection(msg.content);
        break;
      case 'copy':
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(msg.content).catch(() => {});
        break;
    }
  }

  scrollMessages() {
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      const container = this.$('#ai-messages');
      if (container) {
        container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
      }
    });
  }
}

```js
  renderDashboardSidebar() {
    return `
      <nav class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
        <div class="sidebar-section">
          <div class="sidebar-title">Navigation</div>
          <a class="sidebar-link active" data-nav="projects">📁 Projects</a>
          <a class="sidebar-link" data-nav="templates">📋 Templates</a>
          <a class="sidebar-link" data-nav="settings">⚙️ Settings</a>
        </div>
        <div class="sidebar-section">
          <div class="sidebar-title">Recent</div>
          <div id="recent-projects"></div>
        </div>
      </nav>
    `;
  }

  renderEditorSidebar(project, currentChapterId) {
    if (!project) return '<nav class="sidebar" id="sidebar"></nav>';

    const chapters = project.chapters || [];
    const characters = project.characters || [];
    const notes = project.notes || [];

    return `
      <nav class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
        <div class="sidebar-header">
          <button class="btn-icon btn-sm" id="btn-back-dashboard" title="Back to Dashboard">←</button>
          <span class="sidebar-project-title" title="${this.escapeHtml(project.title)}">${this.escapeHtml(project.title)}</span>
        </div>

        <div class="sidebar-tabs">
          <button class="sidebar-tab ${this.activeSection === 'chapters' ? 'active' : ''}" data-section="chapters">Chapters</button>
          <button class="sidebar-tab ${this.activeSection === 'characters' ? 'active' : ''}" data-section="characters">Characters</button>
          <button class="sidebar-tab ${this.activeSection === 'notes' ? 'active' : ''}" data-section="notes">Notes</button>
        </div>

        <div class="sidebar-content">
          ${this.activeSection === 'chapters' ? this.renderChapters(chapters, currentChapterId) : ''}
          ${this.activeSection === 'characters' ? this.renderCharacters(characters) : ''}
          ${this.activeSection === 'notes' ? this.renderNotes(notes) : ''}
        </div>
      </nav>
    `;
  }

  renderChapters(chapters, currentChapterId) {
    return `
      <div class="sidebar-list">
        <div class="sidebar-list-header">
          <span>Chapters (${chapters.length})</span>
          <button class="btn-icon btn-xs" id="btn-add-chapter" title="Add Chapter">+</button>
        </div>
        <div class="chapter-list" id="chapter-list">
          ${chapters.length === 0 ? `
            <div class="sidebar-empty">No chapters yet. Click + to add one.</div>
          ` : chapters.map((ch, i) => `
            <div class="chapter-item ${ch.id === currentChapterId ? 'active' : ''}"
                 data-chapter-id="${ch.id}"
                 data-chapter-index="${i}"
                 draggable="true">
              <span class="chapter-drag-handle">⠿</span>
              <span class="chapter-title">${this.escapeHtml(ch.title || `Chapter ${i + 1}`)}</span>
              <span class="chapter-wordcount">${this.countWords(ch.content)} w</span>
              <button class="btn-icon btn-xs chapter-menu-btn" data-chapter-menu="${ch.id}">⋮</button>
            </div>
          `).join('')}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  renderCharacters(characters) {
    return `
      <div class="sidebar-list">
        <div class="sidebar-list-header">
          <span>Characters (${characters.length})</span>
          <button class="btn-icon btn-xs" id="btn-add-character" title="Add Character">+</button>
        </div>
        ${characters.length === 0 ? `
          <div class="sidebar-empty">No characters yet.</div>
        ` : characters.map((char, i) => `
          <div class="character-item" data-character-index="${i}">
            <div class="character-avatar">${char.name?.[0]?.toUpperCase() || '?'}</div>
            <div class="character-info">
              <div class="character-name">${this.escapeHtml(char.name)}</div>
              <div class="character-role">${this.escapeHtml(char.role || '')}</div>
            </div>
            <button class="btn-icon btn-xs" data-edit-character="${i}">✎</button>
            <button class="btn-icon btn-xs" data-delete-character="${i}">✕</button>
          </div>
        `).join('')}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  renderNotes(notes) {
    return `
      <div class="sidebar-list">
        <div class="sidebar-list-header">
          <span>Notes (${notes.length})</span>
          <button class="btn-icon btn-xs" id="btn-add-note" title="Add Note">+</button>
        </div>
        ${notes.length === 0 ? `
          <div class="sidebar-empty">No notes yet.</div>
        ` : notes.map((note, i) => `
          <div class="note-item" data-note-index="${i}">
            <div class="note-color" style="background:${note.color || '#ffd700'}"></div>
            <div class="note-info">
              <div class="note-title">${this.escapeHtml(note.title || 'Untitled')}</div>
              <div class="note-preview

  afterMount() {
    // Section tabs
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const tab = e.target.closest('.sidebar-tab');
      if (tab) {
        this.activeSection = tab.dataset.section;
        this.update(this.props);
      }
    });

    // Back to dashboard
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-back-dashboard')) {
        this.emit('navigate', { view: 'dashboard' });
      }
    });

    // Add chapter
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-add-chapter')) {
        this.emit('add-chapter');
      }
    });

    // Select chapter
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const item = e.target.closest('.chapter-item');
      if (item && !e.target.closest('.chapter-menu-btn')) {
        this.emit('select-chapter', { id: item.dataset.chapterId });
      }
    });

    // Chapter context menu
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const menuBtn = e.target.closest('[data-chapter-menu]');
      if (menuBtn) {
        e.stopPropagation();
        this.showChapterMenu(menuBtn.dataset.chapterMenu, menuBtn);
      }
    });

    // Add character
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-add-character')) {
        this.emit('add-character');
      }
    });

    // Edit character
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const btn = e.target.closest('[data-edit-character]');
      if (btn) this.emit('edit-character', { index: parseInt(btn.dataset.editCharacter) });
    });

    // Delete character
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const btn = e.target.closest('[data-delete-character]');
      if (btn) this.emit('delete-character', { index: parseInt(btn.dataset.deleteCharacter) });
    });

    // Add note
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-add-note')) {
        this.emit('add-note');
      }
    });

    // Edit note
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const btn = e.target.closest('[data-edit-note]');
      if (btn) this.emit('edit-note', { index: parseInt(btn.dataset.editNote) });
    });

    // Delete note
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const btn = e.target.closest('[data-delete-note]');
      if (btn) this.emit('delete-note', { index: parseInt(btn.dataset.deleteNote) });
    });

    // Drag and drop for chapters
    this.setupChapterDragDrop();
  }

  setupChapterDragDrop() {
    const list = this.$('#chapter-list');
    if (!list) return;

    this.on(list, 'dragstart', (e) => {
      const item = e.target.closest('.chapter-item');
      if (!item) return;
      e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move';
      e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', item.dataset.chapterIndex);
      item.classList.add('dragging');
      this.dragState = { fromIndex: parseInt(item.dataset.chapterIndex) };
    });

    this.on(list, 'dragover', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move';
      const item = e.target.closest('.chapter-item');
      if (item && !item.classList.contains('dragging')) {
        const rect = item.getBoundingClientRect();
        const midY = rect.top + rect.height / 2;
        if (e.clientY < midY) {
          item.classList.add('drag-above');
          item.classList.remove('drag-below');
        } else {
          item.classList.add('drag-below');
          item.classList.remove('drag-above');
        }
      }
    });

    this.on(list, 'dragleave', (e) => {
      const item = e.target.closest('.chapter-item');
      if (item) {
        item.classList.remove('drag-above', 'drag-below');
      }
    });

    this.on(list, 'drop', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const item = e.target.closest('.chapter-item');
      if (!item || !this.dragState) return;

      const toIndex = parseInt(item.dataset.chapterIndex);
      const fromIndex = this.dragState.fromIndex;

      if (fromIndex !== toIndex) {
        this.emit('reorder-chapters', { fromIndex, toIndex });
      }

      list.querySelectorAll('.chapter-item').forEach(el => {
        el.classList.remove('dragging', 'drag-above', 'drag-below');
      });
      this.dragState = null;
    });

    this.

```js
    this.on(list, 'dragend', () => {
      list.querySelectorAll('.chapter-item').forEach(el => {
        el.classList.remove('dragging', 'drag-above', 'drag-below');

  showChapterMenu(chapterId, anchorEl) {
    // Remove existing menu
    const existing = document.querySelector('.context-menu');
    if (existing) existing.remove();

    const menu = document.createElement('div');
    menu.className = 'context-menu';
    menu.innerHTML = `
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="rename">✎ Rename</button>
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="duplicate">📋 Duplicate</button>
      <div class="context-menu-divider"></div>
      <button class="context-menu-item danger" data-action="delete">🗑 Delete</button>
    `;

    const rect = anchorEl.getBoundingClientRect();
    menu.style.position = 'fixed';
    menu.style.top = `${rect.bottom + 4}px`;
    menu.style.left = `${rect.left}px`;
    menu.style.zIndex = '9999';

    document.body.appendChild(menu);

    const handleClick = (e) => {
      const item = e.target.closest('.context-menu-item');
      if (item) {
        const action = item.dataset.action;
        this.emit('chapter-action', { action, chapterId });
      }
      menu.remove();
      document.removeEventListener('click', handleClick);
    };

    // Delay to avoid immediate close
    setTimeout(() => {
      document.addEventListener('click', handleClick);
    }, 10);
  }

  countWords(text) {
    if (!text) return 0;
    return text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length;
  }

  escapeHtml(str) {
    if (!str) return '';
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }
}

// src/ui/components/Toolbar.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class Toolbar extends Component {
  constructor(props) {
    super(props);
  }

  template() {
    const { wordCount = 0, charCount = 0, goalProgress = 0, goalTarget = 0, isAIPanelOpen = false, isSidebarOpen = true } = this.props;

    return `
      <div class="toolbar">
        <div class="toolbar-left">
          <button class="btn-icon" id="btn-toggle-sidebar" title="Toggle Sidebar">
            ${isSidebarOpen ? '◀' : '▶'}
          </button>
          <div class="toolbar-divider"></div>
          <button class="btn-icon" id="btn-undo" title="Undo (Ctrl+Z)">↩</button>
          <button class="btn-icon" id="btn-redo" title="Redo (Ctrl+Y)">↪</button>
          <div class="toolbar-divider"></div>
          <button class="btn-icon" id="btn-find" title="Find & Replace (Ctrl+F)">🔍</button>
        </div>

        <div class="toolbar-center">
          <div class="word-count-display">
            <span class="wc-words">${wordCount.toLocaleString()} words</span>
            <span class="wc-chars">${charCount.toLocaleString()} chars</span>
            ${goalTarget > 0 ? `
              <div class="wc-goal">
                <div class="wc-goal-bar">
                  <div class="wc-goal-fill" style="width: ${Math.min(100, goalProgress)}%"></div>
                </div>
                <span class="wc-goal-text">${Math.round(goalProgress)}%</span>
              </div>
            ` : ''}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="toolbar-right">
          <button class="btn-icon ${isAIPanelOpen ? 'active' : ''}" id="btn-toggle-ai" title="AI Assistant">🤖</button>
          <div class="toolbar-divider"></div>
          <select class="toolbar-select" id="select-focus-mode" title="Focus Mode">
            <option value="none">Normal</option>
            <option value="focus">Focus Mode</option>
            <option value="typewriter">Typewriter</option>
          </select>
          <div class="toolbar-divider"></div>
          <button class="btn-icon" id="btn-export" title="Export">📤</button>
          <button class="btn-icon" id="btn-settings" title="Settings">⚙️</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  afterMount() {
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-toggle-sidebar')) this.emit('toggle-sidebar');
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-undo')) this.emit('undo');
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-redo')) this.emit('redo');
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-find')) this.emit('toggle-find');
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-toggle-ai')) this.emit('ai-panel-toggle');
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-export')) this.emit('show-export');
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-settings')) this.emit('show-settings');

// src/ui/components/Editor.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class Editor extends Component {
  constructor(props) {
    super(props);
    this.undoStack = [];
    this.redoStack = [];
    this.lastSave = '';
    this.saveTimeout = null;
    this.wordCountTimeout = null;
    this.focusMode = 'none';
    this.isComposing = false;
  }

  template() {
    const { chapter, focusMode = 'none' } = this.props;
    const content = chapter?.content || '';
    const title = chapter?.title || 'Untitled Chapter';

    return `
      <div class="editor-container ${focusMode !== 'none' ? 'focus-' + focusMode : ''}">
        <div class="editor-title-bar">
          <input class="editor-title-input" id="chapter-title-input"
                 value="${this.escapeAttr(title)}"
                 placeholder="Chapter Title" />
        </div>
        <div class="editor-wrapper" id="editor-wrapper">
          <textarea class="editor-textarea" id="editor-textarea"
                    placeholder="Start writing..."
                    spellcheck="true">${this.escapeHtml(content)}</textarea>
        </div>
        <div class="editor-find-bar hidden" id="find-bar">
          <input class="find-input" id="find-input" placeholder="Find..." />
          <input class="find-input" id="replace-input" placeholder="Replace..." />
          <button class="btn-xs" id="btn-find-prev">◀</button>
          <button class="btn-xs" id="btn-find-next">▶</button>
          <button class="btn-xs" id="btn-replace-one">Replace</button>
          <button class="btn-xs" id="btn-replace-all">All</button>
          <span class="find-count" id="find-count"></span>
          <button class="btn-icon btn-xs" id="btn-close-find">✕</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  afterMount() {
    const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
    const titleInput = this.$('#chapter-title-input');

    if (textarea) {
      this.lastSave = textarea.value;

      this.on(textarea, 'input', () => {
        if (this.isComposing) return;
        this.handleInput();
      });

      this.on(textarea, 'compositionstart', () => { this.isComposing = true; });
      this.on(textarea, 'compositionend', () => {
        this.isComposing = false;
        this.handleInput();
      });

      this.on(textarea, 'keydown', (e) => {
        this.handleKeydown(e);
      });

      // Tab key support
      this.on(textarea, 'keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Tab') {
          e.preventDefault();
          const start = textarea.selectionStart;
          const end = textarea.selectionEnd;
          textarea.value = textarea.value.substring(0, start) + '\t' + textarea.value.substring(end);
          textarea.selectionStart = textarea.selectionEnd = start + 1;
          this.handleInput();
        }
      });
    }

    if (titleInput) {
      this.on(titleInput, 'input', () => {
        this.emit('chapter-title-change', { title: titleInput.value });
      });
    }

    // Find bar
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-find-next')) this.findNext();
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-find-prev')) this.findPrev();
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-replace-one')) this.replaceOne();
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-replace-all')) this.replaceAll();
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-close-find')) this.toggleFind(false);
    });

    const findInput = this.$('#find-input');
    if (findInput) {
      this.on(findInput, 'input', () => this.updateFindCount());
      this.on(findInput, 'keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
          e.shiftKey ? this.findPrev() : this.findNext();
        }
        if (e.key === 'Escape') this.toggleFind(false);
      });
    }
  }

  handleInput() {
    const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
    if (!textarea) return;

    const content = textarea.value;

    // Push undo state (debounced)
    clearTimeout(this._undoTimeout);
    this._undoTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
      if (this.undoStack.length === 0 || this.undoStack[this.undoStack.length - 1] !== content) {
        this.undoStack.push(content);
        if (this.undoStack.length > 100) this.undoStack.shift();
        this.redoStack = [];
      }
    }, 500);

    // Auto-save (debounced)
    clearTimeout(this.saveTimeout);
    this.saveTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
      this.emit('content-change', { content });
      this.lastSave = content;
    }, 300);

    //

    // Word count update (debounced)
    clearTimeout(this.wordCountTimeout);
    this.wordCountTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
      const words = this.countWords(content);

      this.emit('word-count-update', { words, chars });
    }, 200);
  }

  handleKeydown(e) {
    // Ctrl+Z undo
    if (e.ctrlKey && e.key === 'z' && !e.shiftKey) {
      e.preventDefault();
      this.undo();
    }
    // Ctrl+Y or Ctrl+Shift+Z redo
    if ((e.ctrlKey && e.key === 'y') || (e.ctrlKey && e.shiftKey && e.key === 'z')) {
      e.preventDefault();
      this.redo();
    }
    // Ctrl+F find
    if (e.ctrlKey && e.key === 'f') {
      e.preventDefault();
      this.toggleFind(true);
    }
    // Ctrl+S save
    if (e.ctrlKey && e.key === 's') {
      e.preventDefault();
      const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
      if (textarea) {
        this.emit('content-change', { content: textarea.value });
        this.emit('force-save');
      }
    }
  }

  undo() {
    if (this.undoStack.length <= 1) return;
    const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
    if (!textarea) return;

    const current = this.undoStack.pop();
    this.redoStack.push(current);
    const prev = this.undoStack[this.undoStack.length - 1];
    textarea.value = prev;
    this.emit('content-change', { content: prev });
  }

  redo() {
    if (this.redoStack.length === 0) return;
    const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
    if (!textarea) return;

    const next = this.redoStack.pop();
    this.undoStack.push(next);
    textarea.value = next;
    this.emit('content-change', { content: next });
  }

  // Public API methods for AI integration
  getContent() {
    const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
    return textarea ? textarea.value : '';
  }

  getSelection() {
    const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
    if (!textarea) return { text: '', start: 0, end: 0 };
    return {
      text: textarea.value.substring(textarea.selectionStart, textarea.selectionEnd),
      start: textarea.selectionStart,
      end: textarea.selectionEnd,
    };
  }

  insertAtCursor(text) {
    const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
    if (!textarea) return;

    const start = textarea.selectionStart;
    const end = textarea.selectionEnd;
    const before = textarea.value.substring(0, end);
    const after = textarea.value.substring(end);

    // Add a newline separator if needed
    const separator = before.length > 0 && !before.endsWith('\n') ? '\n\n' : '';
    textarea.value = before + separator + text + after;
    textarea.selectionStart = textarea.selectionEnd = end + separator.length + text.length;
    textarea.focus();
    this.handleInput();
  }

  replaceSelection(text) {
    const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
    if (!textarea) return;

    const start = textarea.selectionStart;
    const end = textarea.selectionEnd;

    if (start === end) {
      // No selection, insert instead
      this.insertAtCursor(text);
      return;
    }

    textarea.value = textarea.value.substring(0, start) + text + textarea.value.substring(end);
    textarea.selectionStart = start;
    textarea.selectionEnd = start + text.length;
    textarea.focus();
    this.handleInput();
  }

  setContent(content) {
    const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
    if (!textarea) return;
    textarea.value = content;
    this.undoStack = [content];
    this.redoStack = [];
    this.lastSave = content;
  }

  // Find & Replace
  toggleFind(show) {
    const bar = this.$('#find-bar');
    if (!bar) return;

    if (show === undefined) {
      bar.classList.toggle('hidden');
    } else {
      bar.classList.toggle('hidden', !show);
    }

    if (!bar.classList.contains('hidden')) {
      const findInput = this.$('#find-input');
      if (findInput) {
        // Pre-fill with selection
        const sel = this.getSelection();
        if (sel.text) findInput.value = sel.text;
        findInput.focus();
        findInput.select();
      }
      this.updateFindCount();
    }
  }

  updateFindCount() {
    const findInput = this.$('#find-input');
    const countEl = this.$('#find-count');
    const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
    if (!findInput || !countEl || !textarea) return;

    const query = findInput.value;
    if (!query) {
      countEl.textContent = '';
      return;
    }

    const content = textarea.value;
    let count = 0;
    let pos = -1;
    const lowerContent = content.toLowerCase();
    const lowerQuery = query.toLowerCase();

    while ((pos = lowerContent.indexOf(lowerQuery, pos + 1)) !== -1) {
      count++;
    }

    countEl.textContent = `${count} match${count !== 1 ? 'es' : ''}`;
  }

  findNext() {
    const findInput = this.$('#find-input');

```js
  findNext() {
    const findInput = this.$('#find-input');
    const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
    if (!findInput || !textarea || !findInput.value) return;

    const query = findInput.value.toLowerCase();
    const content = textarea.value.toLowerCase();
    const startPos = textarea.selectionEnd;

    let pos = content.indexOf(query, startPos);
    if (pos === -1) {
      // Wrap around
      pos = content.indexOf(query, 0);
    }

    if (pos !== -1) {
      textarea.selectionStart = pos;
      textarea.selectionEnd = pos + findInput.value.length;
      textarea.focus();
      // Scroll into view - textarea doesn't have scrollIntoView for selection,
      // but we can approximate
      this.scrollToSelection(textarea, pos);
    }
  }

  findPrev() {
    const findInput = this.$('#find-input');
    const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
    if (!findInput || !textarea || !findInput.value) return;

    const query = findInput.value.toLowerCase();
    const content = textarea.value.toLowerCase();
    const startPos = textarea.selectionStart - 1;

    let pos = content.lastIndexOf(query, startPos);
    if (pos === -1) {
      // Wrap around
      pos = content.lastIndexOf(query);
    }

    if (pos !== -1) {
      textarea.selectionStart = pos;
      textarea.selectionEnd = pos + findInput.value.length;
      textarea.focus();
      this.scrollToSelection(textarea, pos);
    }
  }

  replaceOne() {
    const findInput = this.$('#find-input');
    const replaceInput = this.$('#replace-input');
    const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
    if (!findInput || !replaceInput || !textarea) return;

    const selected = textarea.value.substring(textarea.selectionStart, textarea.selectionEnd);
    if (selected.toLowerCase() === findInput.value.toLowerCase()) {
      const start = textarea.selectionStart;
      textarea.value = textarea.value.substring(0, start) + replaceInput.value + textarea.value.substring(textarea.selectionEnd);
      textarea.selectionStart = start;
      textarea.selectionEnd = start + replaceInput.value.length;
      this.handleInput();
      this.updateFindCount();
      this.findNext();
    } else {
      this.findNext();
    }
  }

  replaceAll() {
    const findInput = this.$('#find-input');
    const replaceInput = this.$('#replace-input');
    const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
    if (!findInput || !replaceInput || !textarea || !findInput.value) return;

    const query = findInput.value;
    const replacement = replaceInput.value;

    // Case-insensitive replace all
    const regex = new RegExp(query.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&'), 'gi');
    textarea.value = textarea.value.replace(regex, replacement);
    this.handleInput();
    this.updateFindCount();
  }

  scrollToSelection(textarea, pos) {
    // Approximate scroll position based on character position
    const textBefore = textarea.value.substring(0, pos);
    const lines = textBefore.split('\n').length;
    const lineHeight = parseInt(getComputedStyle(textarea).lineHeight) || 20;
    const scrollTarget = (lines - 3) * lineHeight;
    textarea.scrollTop = Math.max(0, scrollTarget);
  }

  setFocusMode(mode) {
    this.focusMode = mode;
    const container = this.$('.editor-container');
    if (container) {
      container.className = `editor-container ${mode !== 'none' ? 'focus-' + mode : ''}`;
    }
  }

  focus() {
    const textarea = this.$('#editor-textarea');
    if (textarea) textarea.focus();
  }

  countWords(text) {
    if (!text) return 0;
    return text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length;
  }

  escapeHtml(str) {
    if (!str) return '';
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;');
  }

  escapeAttr(str) {
    if (!str) return '';
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;');
  }
}
```

  renderProjectCard(project) {

    const modified = this.formatDate(project.modifiedAt);
    const progress = project.goalWordCount ? Math.min(100, Math.round((wordCount / project.goalWordCount) * 100)) : 0;
    const chapterCount = (project.chapters || []).length;

    return `
      <div class="project-card" data-project-id="${project.id}">
        <div class="project-card-header">
          <h3 class="project-card-title">${this.escapeHtml(project.title)}</h3>
          <button class="btn-icon btn-xs project-card-menu" data-project-menu="${project.id}">⋮</button>
        </div>
        <div class="project-card-meta">
          ${project.genre ? `<span class="project-genre-badge">${this.escapeHtml(project.genre)}</span>` : ''}
          <span>${chapterCount} chapter${chapterCount !== 1 ? 's' : ''}</span>
        </div>
        <p class="project-card-desc">${this.escapeHtml((project.description || '').substring(0, 120))}</p>
        <div class="project-card-footer">
          <span class="project-wordcount">${wordCount.toLocaleString()} words</span>
          <span class="project-modified">${modified}</span>
        </div>
        ${project.goalWordCount ? `
          <div class="project-progress">
            <div class="project-progress-bar">
              <div class="project-progress-fill" style="width: ${progress}%"></div>
            </div>
            <span class="project-progress-text">${progress}% of ${project.goalWordCount.toLocaleString()}</span>
          </div>
        ` : ''}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  renderTemplateCard(template) {
    return `
      <div class="template-card" data-template-id="${template.id}">
        <div class="template-icon">${template.icon || '📄'}</div>
        <h4 class="template-title">${this.escapeHtml(template.title)}</h4>
        <p class="template-desc">${this.escapeHtml(template.description || '')}</p>

    `;

```js
    // Filters
    const filterGenre = this.$('#filter-genre');
    if (filterGenre) {
      this.on(filterGenre, 'change', () => {
        this.filter = filterGenre.value;
        this.update(this.props);
      });
    }

    const sortSelect = this.$('#sort-projects');
    if (sortSelect) {
      this.on(sortSelect, 'change', () => {
        this.sortBy = sortSelect.value;
        this.update(this.props);
      });
    }
  }

  showProjectMenu(projectId, anchorEl) {
    const existing = document.querySelector('.context-menu');
    if (existing) existing.remove();

    const menu = document.createElement('div');
    menu.className = 'context-menu';
    menu.innerHTML = `
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="open">📂 Open</button>
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="duplicate">📋 Duplicate</button>
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="export">📤 Export</button>
      <div class="context-menu-divider"></div>
      <button class="context-menu-item danger" data-action="delete">🗑 Delete</button>
    `;

    const rect = anchorEl.getBoundingClientRect();
    menu.style.position = 'fixed';
    menu.style.top = `${rect.bottom + 4}px`;
    menu.style.left = `${rect.left}px`;
    menu.style.zIndex = '9999';

    document.body.appendChild(menu);

    const handleClick = (e) => {
      const item = e.target.closest('.context-menu-item');
      if (item) {
        this.emit('project-action', { action: item.dataset.action, projectId });
      }
      menu.remove();
      document.removeEventListener('click', handleClick);
    };

    setTimeout(() => {
      document.addEventListener('click', handleClick);
    }, 10);
  }

  filterProjects(projects) {
    if (this.filter === 'all') return projects;
    return projects.filter(p => (p.genre || '').toLowerCase() === this.filter);
  }

  sortProjects(projects) {
    const sorted = [...projects];
    switch (this.sortBy) {
      case 'modified':
        sorted.sort((a, b) => (b.modifiedAt || 0) - (a.modifiedAt || 0));
        break;
      case 'created':
        sorted.sort((a, b) => (b.createdAt || 0) - (a.createdAt || 0));
        break;
      case 'title':
        sorted.sort((a, b) => (a.title || '').localeCompare(b.title || ''));
        break;
      case 'wordcount':
        sorted.sort((a, b) => this.getProjectWordCount(b) - this.getProjectWordCount(a));
        break;
    }
    return sorted;
  }

  getProjectWordCount(project) {
    if (!project.chapters) return 0;
    return project.chapters.reduce((sum, ch) => {
      return sum + this.countWords(ch.content);
    }, 0);
  }

  countWords(text) {
    if (!text) return 0;
    return text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length;
  }

  formatDate(timestamp) {
    if (!timestamp) return 'Never';
    const d = new Date(timestamp);
    const now = new Date();
    const diff = now - d;

    if (diff < 60000) return 'Just now';
    if (diff < 3600000) return `${Math.floor(diff / 60000)}m ago`;
    if (diff < 86400000) return `${Math.floor(diff / 3600000)}h ago`;
    if (diff < 604800000) return `${Math.floor(diff / 86400000)}d ago`;
    return d.toLocaleDateString();
  }

  escapeHtml(str) {
    if (!str) return '';
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }
}

  renderAnalysis() {
    const { analysis = null } = this.props;

    if (!analysis && !this.isLoading) {
      return `
        <div class="ai-analysis-empty">
          <p>Select an analysis type below to get feedback on your writing.</p>
        </div>
      `;
    }

    if (this.isLoading) {
      return `<div class="ai-loading">Analyzing your text...</div>`;
    }

              <span>${analysis.score}</span>
            </div>
            <span class="score-label">${analysis.label || 'Score'}</span>
          </div>

        <div class="ai-analysis-details">
          ${(analysis.items || []).map(item => `
            <div class="ai-analysis-item ${item.type || 'info'}">
              <span class="ai-analysis-icon">${item.type === 'warning' ? '⚠️' : item.type === 'error' ? '❌' : item.type === 'success' ? '✅' : 'ℹ️'}</span>
              <span class="ai-analysis-text">${this.escapeHtml(item.text)}</span>
            </div>
          `).join('')}
        </div>
        ${analysis.summary ? `
          <div class="ai-analysis-summary">
            <p>${this.escapeHtml(analysis.summary)}</p>
          </div>
        ` : ''}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  afterMount() {
    // Tab switching
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const tab = e.target.closest('[data-ai-tab]');
      if (tab) {
        this.activeTab = tab.dataset.aiTab;
        this.update(this.props);
      }
    });

    // Close panel
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-close-ai')) {
        this.emit('close-ai-panel');
      }
    });

    // Send chat message
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-ai-send')) {
        this.sendMessage();
      }
    });

    const chatInput = this.$('#ai-chat-input');
    if (chatInput) {
      this.on(chatInput, 'keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
          e.preventDefault();
          this.sendMessage();
        }
      });
    }

    // Quick actions
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const quick = e.target.closest('[data-ai-quick]');
      if (quick) {
        this.emit('ai-quick-action', { action: quick.dataset.aiQuick });
      }
    });

    // Suggestion actions
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const suggest = e.target.closest('[data-ai-suggest]');
      if (suggest) {
        this.emit('ai-suggest', { type: suggest.dataset.aiSuggest });
      }

      const useSuggestion = e.target.closest('[data-ai-use-suggestion]');
      if (useSuggestion) {
        const idx = parseInt(useSuggestion.dataset.aiUseSuggestion);
        this.emit('ai-use-suggestion', { index: idx });
      }

      const expandSuggestion = e.target.closest('[data-ai-expand-suggestion]');
      if (expandSuggestion) {
        const idx = parseInt(expandSuggestion.dataset.aiExpandSuggestion);
        this.emit('ai-expand-suggestion', { index: idx });
      }
    });

    // Analysis actions
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const analyze = e.target.closest('[data-ai-analyze]');
      if (analyze) {
        this.emit('ai-analyze', { type: analyze.dataset.aiAnalyze });
      }
    });

    // Message actions (insert, replace, copy)
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const action = e.target.closest('[data-ai-action]');
      if (action) {
        const idx = parseInt(action.dataset.msgIdx);
        const msg = this.messages[idx];
        if (msg) {
          this.emit('ai-message-action', {
            action: action.dataset.aiAction,
            content: msg.content
          });
        }
      }
    });

    // Scroll chat to bottom
    this.scrollChatToBottom();
  }

  sendMessage() {

    this.addMessage('user', content);
    this.emit('ai-send-message', { content });
  }

    this.update(this.props);
    this.scrollChatToBottom();

    this.update(this.props);
  }

```js
  scrollChatToBottom() {
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      const container = this.$('#ai-chat-messages');
      if (container) {
        container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
      }
    });
  }

  formatMessage(content) {
    if (!content) return '';
    // Basic markdown-like formatting
    let html = this.escapeHtml(content);
    // Bold
    html = html.replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>');
    // Italic
    html = html.replace(/\*(.*?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>');
    // Code
    html = html.replace(/`(.*?)`/g, '<code>$1</code>');
    // Newlines
    html = html.replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
    return html;
  }

  clearChat() {
    this.messages = [];
    this.update(this.props);
  }

  escapeHtml(str) {
    if (!str) return '';
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }
}

// src/ui/components/ChapterList.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class ChapterList extends Component {
  constructor(props) {
    super(props);
    this.draggedId = null;
  }

  template() {
    const { chapters = [], activeChapterId = null, projectTitle = '' } = this.props;

    return `
      <div class="chapter-list">
        <div class="chapter-list-header">
          <button class="btn-icon btn-sm" id="btn-back-dashboard" title="Back to Dashboard">←</button>
          <h3 class="chapter-list-title" title="${this.escapeAttr(projectTitle)}">${this.escapeHtml(projectTitle)}</h3>
          <button class="btn-icon btn-sm" id="btn-project-settings" title="Project Settings">⚙</button>
        </div>

        <div class="chapter-list-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" id="btn-add-chapter" style="width:100%">+ Add Chapter</button>
        </div>

        <div class="chapter-list-items" id="chapter-list-items">
          ${chapters.length === 0 ? `
            <div class="chapter-list-empty">
              <p>No chapters yet.</p>
            </div>
          ` : chapters.map((ch, i) => this.renderChapterItem(ch, i, activeChapterId)).join('')}
        </div>

        <div class="chapter-list-footer">
          <div class="project-stats">
            <span>${this.getTotalWords(chapters).toLocaleString()} words</span>
            <span>${chapters.length} chapter${chapters.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  renderChapterItem(chapter, index, activeId) {
    const isActive = chapter.id === activeId;
    const wordCount = this.countWords(chapter.content);
    const status = chapter.status || 'draft';
    const statusIcons = {
      draft: '📝',
      'in-progress': '✏️',
      revision: '🔄',
      complete: '✅'
    };

    return `
      <div class="chapter-item ${isActive ? 'active' : ''}" 
           data-chapter-id="${chapter.id}" 
           draggable="true"
           data-chapter-index="${index}">
        <div class="chapter-item-drag-handle" title="Drag to reorder">⠿</div>
        <div class="chapter-item-content">
          <div class="chapter-item-title">
            <span class="chapter-item-number">${index + 1}.</span>
            <span class="chapter-item-name">${this.escapeHtml(chapter.title || 'Untitled')}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="chapter-item-meta">
            <span class="chapter-status" title="${status}">${statusIcons[status] || '📝'}</span>
            <span class="chapter-words">${wordCount.toLocaleString()} words</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <button class="btn-icon btn-xs chapter-item-menu" data-chapter-menu="${chapter.id}">⋮</button>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  afterMount() {
    // Select chapter
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const item = e.target.closest('.chapter-item');
      if (item && !e.target.closest('.chapter-item-menu') && !e.target.closest('.chapter-item-drag-handle')) {
        this.emit('select-chapter', { id: item.dataset.chapterId });
      }
    });

    // Add chapter
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-add-chapter')) {
        this.emit('add-chapter');
      }
    });

    // Back to dashboard
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-back-dashboard')) {
        this.emit('back-to-dashboard');
      }
    });

    // Project settings
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-project-settings')) {
        this.emit('project-settings');
      }
    });

    // Chapter context menu

```js
    // Chapter context menu
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const menuBtn = e.target.closest('[data-chapter-menu]');
      if (menuBtn) {
        e.stopPropagation();
        this.showChapterMenu(menuBtn.dataset.chapterMenu, menuBtn);
      }
    });

    // Drag and drop for reordering
    const listContainer = this.$('#chapter-list-items');
    if (listContainer) {
      this.on(listContainer, 'dragstart', (e) => {
        const item = e.target.closest('.chapter-item');
        if (item) {
          this.draggedId = item.dataset.chapterId;
          item.classList.add('dragging');
          e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move';
          e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', item.dataset.chapterId);
        }
      });

      this.on(listContainer, 'dragend', (e) => {
        const item = e.target.closest('.chapter-item');
        if (item) {
          item.classList.remove('dragging');
          this.draggedId = null;
        }
        // Remove all drag-over indicators
        listContainer.querySelectorAll('.drag-over').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('drag-over'));
      });

      this.on(listContainer, 'dragover', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move';
        const item = e.target.closest('.chapter-item');
        if (item && item.dataset.chapterId !== this.draggedId) {
          listContainer.querySelectorAll('.drag-over').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('drag-over'));
          item.classList.add('drag-over');
        }
      });

      this.on(listContainer, 'dragleave', (e) => {
        const item = e.target.closest('.chapter-item');
        if (item) {
          item.classList.remove('drag-over');
        }
      });

      this.on(listContainer, 'drop', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const targetItem = e.target.closest('.chapter-item');
        if (targetItem && this.draggedId && targetItem.dataset.chapterId !== this.draggedId) {
          const fromIndex = parseInt(this.el.querySelector(`[data-chapter-id="${this.draggedId}"]`)?.dataset.chapterIndex);
          const toIndex = parseInt(targetItem.dataset.chapterIndex);
          if (!isNaN(fromIndex) && !isNaN(toIndex)) {
            this.emit('reorder-chapters', { fromIndex, toIndex });
          }
        }
        listContainer.querySelectorAll('.drag-over').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('drag-over'));
        this.draggedId = null;
      });
    }
  }

  showChapterMenu(chapterId, anchorEl) {
    const existing = document.querySelector('.context-menu');
    if (existing) existing.remove();

    const menu = document.createElement('div');
    menu.className = 'context-menu';
    menu.innerHTML = `
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="rename">✏️ Rename</button>
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="duplicate">📋 Duplicate</button>
      <div class="context-menu-separator"></div>
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="status-draft">📝 Mark as Draft</button>
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="status-in-progress">✏️ Mark In Progress</button>
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="status-revision">🔄 Mark for Revision</button>
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="status-complete">✅ Mark Complete</button>
      <div class="context-menu-separator"></div>
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="move-up">⬆ Move Up</button>
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="move-down">⬇ Move Down</button>
      <div class="context-menu-separator"></div>
      <button class="context-menu-item danger" data-action="delete">🗑 Delete</button>
    `;

    const rect = anchorEl.getBoundingClientRect();
    menu.style.position = 'fixed';
    menu.style.top = `${rect.bottom + 4}px`;
    menu.style.left = `${rect.right}px`;
    menu.style.zIndex = '9999';

    document.body.appendChild(menu);

    // Ensure menu stays in viewport
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      const menuRect = menu.getBoundingClientRect();
      if (menuRect.right > window.innerWidth) {
        menu.style.left = `${rect.left - menuRect.width}px`;
      }
      if (menuRect.bottom > window.innerHeight) {
        menu.style.top = `${rect.top - menuRect.height}px`;
      }
    });

    const handleClick = (e) => {
      const item = e.target.closest('.context-menu-item');
      if (item) {
        const action = item.dataset.action;
        if (action.startsWith('status-')) {
          this.emit('chapter-status', { id: chapterId, status: action.replace('status-', '') });
        } else {
          this.emit('chapter-action', { action, id: chapterId });
        }
      }
      menu.remove();
      document.removeEventListener('click', handleClick);
    };

    setTimeout(() => {
      document.addEventListener('click', handleClick);
    }, 10);
  }

```js
  getTotalWords(chapters) {
    return chapters.reduce((sum, ch) => sum + this.countWords(ch.content), 0);
  }

  countWords(text) {
    if (!text) return 0;
    return text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length;
  }

  escapeHtml(str) {
    if (!str) return '';
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }

  escapeAttr(str) {
    return this.escapeHtml(str).replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
  }
}

```js
// src/ui/components/Modal.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class Modal extends Component {
  template() {
    const { title = '', body = '', footer = '', size = 'medium', closable = true } = this.props;

    return `
      <div class="modal-overlay" id="modal-overlay">
        <div class="modal modal-${size}">
          <div class="modal-header">
            <h3 class="modal-title">${title}</h3>
            ${closable ? '<button class="btn-icon btn-sm modal-close" id="modal-close">✕</button>' : ''}
          </div>
          <div class="modal-body">${body}</div>
          ${footer ? `<div class="modal-footer">${footer}</div>` : ''}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  afterMount() {
    // Close on overlay click
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.id === 'modal-overlay' && this.props.closable !== false) {
        this.emit('modal-close');
      }
    });

    // Close button
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#modal-close')) {
        this.emit('modal-close');
      }
    });

    // ESC key
    this._escHandler = (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Escape' && this.props.closable !== false) {
        this.emit('modal-close');
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener('keydown', this._escHandler);

    // Focus trap
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      const firstInput = this.el.querySelector('input, textarea, select, button:not(.modal-close)');
      if (firstInput) firstInput.focus();
    });
  }

  destroy() {
    if (this._escHandler) {
      document.removeEventListener('keydown', this._escHandler);
    }
    super.destroy();
  }
}
```

          <button class="btn-icon btn-sm toolbar-btn ${focusMode ? 'active' : ''}" id="btn-focus-mode" title="Focus Mode">🎯</button>
          <button class="btn-icon btn-sm toolbar-btn ${aiPanelOpen ? 'active' : ''}" id="btn-toggle-ai" title="AI Assistant">🤖</button>

  afterMount() {
    // Chapter title editing
    const titleInput = this.$('#chapter-title-input');
    if (titleInput) {
      this.on(titleInput, 'change', () => {
        this.emit('chapter-title-change', { title: titleInput.value });
      });
      this.on(titleInput, 'keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
          titleInput.blur();
        }
      });
    }

    // Formatting buttons
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const formatBtn = e.target.closest('[data-format]');
      if (formatBtn) {
        this.emit('format', { type: formatBtn.dataset.format });
      }
    });

    // Focus mode
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-focus-mode')) {
        this.emit('toggle-focus-mode');
      }
    });

    // AI panel toggle
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-toggle-ai')) {
        this.emit('toggle-ai-panel');
      }
    });

    // Export
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-export-chapter')) {
        this.emit('export-chapter');
      }
    });
  }

  escapeAttr(str) {
    if (!str) return '';
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;').replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
  }
}

```js
// src/ui/components/StatusBar.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class StatusBar extends Component {
  template() {
    const {
      wordCount = 0,
      charCount = 0,
      paragraphCount = 0,
      readingTime = 0,
      cursorPosition = { line: 1, col: 1 },
      dailyGoal = 0,
      dailyProgress = 0,
      sessionWords = 0
    } = this.props;

    const goalPercent = dailyGoal > 0 ? Math.min(100, Math.round((dailyProgress / dailyGoal) * 100)) : 0;

    return `
      <div class="status-bar">
        <div class="status-bar-left">
          <span class="status-item" title="Cursor position">Ln ${cursorPosition.line}, Col ${cursorPosition.col}</span>
          <span class="status-separator">|</span>
          <span class="status-item" title="Word count">${wordCount.toLocaleString()} words</span>
          <span class="status-item" title="Character count">${charCount.toLocaleString()} chars</span>
          <span class="status-item" title="Paragraphs">${paragraphCount} ¶</span>
          <span class="status-item" title="Estimated reading time">~${readingTime} min read</span>
        </div>
        <div class="status-bar-center">
          ${dailyGoal > 0 ? `
            <div class="daily-goal-bar" title="Daily goal: ${dailyProgress}/${dailyGoal} words (${goalPercent}%)">
              <div class="daily-goal-fill" style="width: ${goalPercent}%"></div>
              <span class="daily-goal-text">${dailyProgress}/${dailyGoal}</span>
            </div>
          ` : ''}
        </div>
        <div class="status-bar-right">
          ${sessionWords > 0 ? `<span class="status-item" title="Words written this session">+${sessionWords} this session</span>` : ''}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  afterMount() {
    // Click on daily goal to set/change it
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('.daily-goal-bar')) {
        this.emit('edit-daily-goal');
      }
    });
  }
}
```

    });

    // Spellcheck
    this.on(this.el, 'change', (e) => {
      if (e.target.id === 'setting-spellcheck') {
        this.emitChange('spellcheck', e.target.checked);
      }
    });

    // Daily goal
    this.on(this.el, 'change', (e) => {
      if (e.target.id === 'setting-daily-goal') {
        this.emitChange('dailyGoal', parseInt(e.target.value) || 0);
      }
    });

    // AI Provider
    this.on(this.el, 'change', (e) => {
      if (e.target.id === 'setting-ai-provider') {
        const provider = e.target.value;
        this.emitChange('aiProvider', provider);

        const apiKeyRow = this.$('#setting-api-key-row');
        const modelRow = this.$('#setting-model-row');
        if (apiKeyRow) {
          apiKeyRow.style.display = (provider === 'none' || provider === 'local') ? 'none' : '';
        }
        if (modelRow) {
          modelRow.style.display = provider === 'none' ? 'none' : '';
          const modelInput = this.$('#setting-ai-model');
          if (modelInput) modelInput.placeholder = this.getModelPlaceholder(provider);
        }
      }
    });

    // AI API Key
    this.on(this.el, 'change', (e) => {
      if (e.target.id === 'setting-ai-api-key') {
        this.emitChange('aiApiKey', e.target.value);
      }
    });

    // AI Model
    this.on(this.el, 'change', (e) => {
      if (e.target.id === 'setting-ai-model') {
        this.emitChange('aiModel', e.target.value);
      }
    });

    // Export all
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-export-all')) {
        this.emit('export-all');
      }
    });

    // Import
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-import-data')) {
        this.emit('import-data');
      }
    });

    // Clear data
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-clear-data')) {
        this.emit('clear-all-data');
      }
    });
  }

  emitChange(key, value) {
    this.emit('setting-change', { key, value });
  }

  getModelPlaceholder(provider) {
    switch (provider) {
      case 'openai': return 'gpt-4o-mini';
      case 'anthropic': return 'claude-3-haiku-20240307';
      case 'local': return 'llama3';
      default: return 'Select a provider first';
    }
  }
}
```
