// src/ui/components/Dashboard.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class Dashboard extends Component {
  template() {
    const { projects = [], recentFiles = [], stats = {} } = this.props;

    return `
      <div class="dashboard">
        <div class="dashboard-header">
          <div class="dashboard-brand">
            <h1 class="dashboard-title">📖 Quill</h1>
            <p class="dashboard-subtitle">Your distraction-free writing space</p>
          </div>
          <div class="dashboard-actions">
            <button class="btn btn-primary" id="btn-new-project">+ New Project</button>
            <button class="btn btn-sm" id="btn-open-settings" title="Settings">⚙ Settings</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dashboard-content">
          ${this.renderStats(stats)}

          <div class="dashboard-section">
            <h2 class="dashboard-section-title">Your Projects</h2>
            ${projects.length === 0 ? `
              <div class="dashboard-empty">
                <div class="dashboard-empty-icon">📝</div>
                <h3>No projects yet</h3>
                <p>Create your first project to start writing.</p>
                <button class="btn btn-primary" id="btn-new-project-empty">+ Create Project</button>
              </div>
            ` : `
              <div class="project-grid">
                ${projects.map(p => this.renderProjectCard(p)).join('')}
              </div>
            `}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  renderStats(stats) {
    const { totalWords = 0, totalProjects = 0, totalChapters = 0, streak = 0 } = stats;

    return `
      <div class="dashboard-stats">
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-value">${totalWords.toLocaleString()}</div>
          <div class="stat-label">Total Words</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-value">${totalProjects}</div>
          <div class="stat-label">Projects</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-value">${totalChapters}</div>
          <div class="stat-label">Chapters</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-value">${streak} 🔥</div>
          <div class="stat-label">Day Streak</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  renderProjectCard(project) {
    const wordCount = (project.chapters || []).reduce((sum, ch) => {
      return sum + this.countWords(ch.content);
    }, 0);
    const chapterCount = (project.chapters || []).length;
    const updatedAt = project.updatedAt ? this.formatDate(project.updatedAt) : 'Never';
    const genre = project.genre || '';

    return `
      <div class="project-card" data-project-id="${project.id}">
        <div class="project-card-header">
          <h3 class="project-card-title">${this.escapeHtml(project.title || 'Untitled')}</h3>
          <button class="btn-icon btn-xs project-card-menu" data-project-menu="${project.id}">⋮</button>
        </div>
        ${project.description ? `<p class="project-card-desc">${this.escapeHtml(project.description)}</p>` : ''}
        <div class="project-card-meta">
          ${genre ? `<span class="project-card-genre">${this.escapeHtml(genre)}</span>` : ''}
          <span>${chapterCount} chapter${chapterCount !== 1 ? 's' : ''}</span>
          <span>${wordCount.toLocaleString()} words</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-card-footer">
          <span class="project-card-date">Updated ${updatedAt}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  afterMount() {
    // New project buttons
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-new-project') || e.target.closest('#btn-new-project-empty')) {
        this.emit('new-project');
      }
    });

    // Settings
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-open-settings')) {
        this.emit('open-settings');
      }
    });

    // Open project
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const card = e.target.closest('.project-card');
      if (card && !e.target.closest('.project-card-menu')) {
        this.emit('open-project', { id: card.dataset.projectId });
      }
    });

    // Project context menu
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const menuBtn = e.target.closest('[data-project-menu]');
      if (menuBtn) {
        e.stopPropagation();
        this.showProjectMenu(menuBtn.dataset.projectMenu, menuBtn);
      }
    });
  }

  showProjectMenu(projectId, anchorEl) {
    const existing = document.querySelector('.context-menu');
    if (existing) existing.remove();

    const menu = document.createElement('div');
    menu.className = 'context-menu';
    menu.innerHTML = `
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="open">

---

```js
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="open">📂 Open</button>
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="rename">✏️ Rename</button>
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="duplicate">📋 Duplicate</button>
      <button class="context-menu-item" data-action="export">📤 Export</button>
      <div class="context-menu-separator"></div>
      <button class="context-menu-item danger" data-action="delete">🗑 Delete</button>
    `;

    const rect = anchorEl.getBoundingClientRect();
    menu.style.position = 'fixed';
    menu.style.top = `${rect.bottom + 4}px`;
    menu.style.left = `${rect.right}px`;
    menu.style.zIndex = '9999';

    document.body.appendChild(menu);

    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      const menuRect = menu.getBoundingClientRect();
      if (menuRect.right > window.innerWidth) {
        menu.style.left = `${rect.left - menuRect.width}px`;
      }
      if (menuRect.bottom > window.innerHeight) {
        menu.style.top = `${rect.top - menuRect.height}px`;
      }
    });

    const handleClick = (e) => {
      const item = e.target.closest('.context-menu-item');
      if (item) {
        this.emit('project-action', { action: item.dataset.action, id: projectId });
      }
      menu.remove();
      document.removeEventListener('click', handleClick);
    };

    setTimeout(() => {
      document.addEventListener('click', handleClick);
    }, 10);
  }

  countWords(text) {
    if (!text) return 0;
    return text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length;
  }

  formatDate(dateStr) {
    const date = new Date(dateStr);
    const now = new Date();
    const diffMs = now - date;
    const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / 60000);
    const diffHours = Math.floor(diffMs / 3600000);
    const diffDays = Math.floor(diffMs / 86400000);

    if (diffMins < 1) return 'just now';
    if (diffMins < 60) return `${diffMins}m ago`;
    if (diffHours < 24) return `${diffHours}h ago`;
    if (diffDays < 7) return `${diffDays}d ago`;
    return date.toLocaleDateString();
  }

  escapeHtml(str) {
    if (!str) return '';
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }
}

// src/ui/components/AIPanel.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class AIPanel extends Component {
  template() {
    const { messages = [], isLoading = false, provider = 'none', connected = false } = this.props;

    return `
      <div class="ai-panel">
        <div class="ai-panel-header">
          <h3 class="ai-panel-title">🤖 AI Assistant</h3>
          <div class="ai-panel-status">
            <span class="ai-status-dot ${connected ? 'connected' : 'disconnected'}"></span>
            <span class="ai-status-text">${connected ? provider : 'Not configured'}</span>
          </div>
          <button class="btn-icon btn-sm" id="btn-close-ai">✕</button>
        </div>

        <div class="ai-panel-presets">
          <button class="btn btn-xs ai-preset" data-preset="continue">Continue Writing</button>
          <button class="btn btn-xs ai-preset" data-preset="summarize">Summarize</button>
          <button class="btn btn-xs ai-preset" data-preset="improve">Improve Prose</button>
          <button class="btn btn-xs ai-preset" data-preset="dialogue">Fix Dialogue</button>
          <button class="btn btn-xs ai-preset" data-preset="describe">Add Description</button>
          <button class="btn btn-xs ai-preset" data-preset="brainstorm">Brainstorm</button>
          <button class="btn btn-xs ai-preset" data-preset="plot-hole">Find Plot Holes</button>
          <button class="btn btn-xs ai-preset" data-preset="character">Character Voice</button>
        </div>

        <div class="ai-panel-messages" id="ai-messages">
          ${messages.length === 0 ? `
            <div class="ai-welcome">
              <p>Select a preset or type a prompt below. The AI can see your current chapter for context.</p>
            </div>
          ` : messages.map(m => this.renderMessage(m)).join('')}
          ${isLoading ? `
            <div class="ai-message ai-message-assistant">
              <div class="ai-typing-indicator">
                <span></span><span></span><span></span>
              </div>
            </div>
          ` : ''}
        </div>

        <div class="ai-panel-input">
          <textarea class="ai-input-field" id="ai-input" placeholder="${connected ? 'Ask the AI anything about your writing...' : 'Configure AI in Settings first'}" 
                    ${!connected ? 'disabled' : ''} rows="2"></textarea>
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" id="btn-ai-send" ${!connected || isLoading ? 

---

```js
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" id="btn-ai-send" ${!connected || isLoading ? 'disabled' : ''}>
            ${isLoading ? '⏳' : '➤'}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  renderMessage(msg) {
    const roleClass = msg.role === 'user' ? 'ai-message-user' : 'ai-message-assistant';
    const content = this.formatMessageContent(msg.content);

    return `
      <div class="ai-message ${roleClass}">
        <div class="ai-message-content">${content}</div>
        ${msg.role === 'assistant' ? `
          <div class="ai-message-actions">
            <button class="btn-icon btn-xs ai-msg-action" data-action="copy" data-msg-id="${msg.id}" title="Copy">📋</button>
            <button class="btn-icon btn-xs ai-msg-action" data-action="insert" data-msg-id="${msg.id}" title="Insert into editor">📥</button>
            <button class="btn-icon btn-xs ai-msg-action" data-action="replace" data-msg-id="${msg.id}" title="Replace selection">🔄</button>
          </div>
        ` : ''}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  formatMessageContent(content) {
    if (!content) return '';
    // Basic markdown-like formatting
    let html = this.escapeHtml(content);
    // Bold
    html = html.replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>');
    // Italic
    html = html.replace(/\*(.*?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>');
    // Code blocks
    html = html.replace(/```([\s\S]*?)```/g, '<pre><code>$1</code></pre>');
    // Inline code
    html = html.replace(/`(.*?)`/g, '<code>$1</code>');
    // Line breaks
    html = html.replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
    return html;
  }

  afterMount() {
    // Close panel
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-close-ai')) {
        this.emit('close-ai-panel');
      }
    });

    // Presets
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const preset = e.target.closest('.ai-preset');
      if (preset) {
        this.emit('ai-preset', { preset: preset.dataset.preset });
      }
    });

    // Send message
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-ai-send')) {
        this.sendMessage();
      }
    });

    // Enter to send (Shift+Enter for newline)
    const input = this.$('#ai-input');
    if (input) {
      this.on(input, 'keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
          e.preventDefault();
          this.sendMessage();
        }
      });
    }

    // Message actions (copy, insert, replace)
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const actionBtn = e.target.closest('.ai-msg-action');
      if (actionBtn) {
        this.emit('ai-message-action', {
          action: actionBtn.dataset.action,
          messageId: actionBtn.dataset.msgId
        });
      }
    });

    // Scroll to bottom
    this.scrollToBottom();
  }

  sendMessage() {
    const input = this.$('#ai-input');
    if (!input) return;
    const text = input.value.trim();
    if (!text) return;
    input.value = '';
    this.emit('ai-send', { message: text });
  }

  scrollToBottom() {
    const container = this.$('#ai-messages');
    if (container) {
      container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
    }
  }

  escapeHtml(str) {
    if (!str) return '';
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }
}

// src/ui/components/Editor.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class Editor extends Component {
  template() {
    const {
      content = '',
      fontFamily = 'Georgia',
      fontSize = 16,
      lineHeight = 1.8,
      editorWidth = 700,
      spellcheck = true,
      focusMode = false,
      paragraphFocus = false
    } = this.props;

    return `
      <div class="editor-container ${focusMode ? 'focus-mode' : ''}"
           style="--editor-font: ${fontFamily}; --editor-size: ${fontSize}px; --editor-line-height: ${lineHeight}; --editor-width: ${editorWidth}px;">
        <div class="editor-scroll">
          <div class="editor-content-wrapper" style="max-width: ${editorWidth}px;">
            <div class="editor-area"
                 id="editor-area"
                 contenteditable="true"
                 spellcheck="${spellcheck}"
                 data-placeholder="Start writing..."
                 role="textbox"
                 aria-multiline="true"
                 aria-label="Chapter content editor"
            >${content}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;

```js
  }

  afterMount() {
    this.editorEl = this.$('#editor-area');
    if (!this.editorEl) return;

    // Track content changes
    this._lastContent = this.editorEl.innerHTML;
    this._changeTimer = null;

    this.on(this.editorEl, 'input', () => {
      this.handleInput();
    });

    // Track cursor position
    this.on(this.editorEl, 'keyup', () => this.emitCursorPosition());
    this.on(this.editorEl, 'click', () => this.emitCursorPosition());

    // Handle paste - strip formatting
    this.on(this.editorEl, 'paste', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const text = e.clipboardData.getData('text/plain');
      this.insertTextAtCursor(text);
      this.handleInput();
    });

    // Handle tab key
    this.on(this.editorEl, 'keydown', (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Tab') {
        e.preventDefault();
        this.insertTextAtCursor('\t');
        this.handleInput();
      }

      // Keyboard shortcuts
      if (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) {
        switch (e.key) {
          case 'b':
            e.preventDefault();
            this.applyFormat('bold');
            break;
          case 'i':
            e.preventDefault();
            this.applyFormat('italic');
            break;
          case 'u':
            e.preventDefault();
            this.applyFormat('underline');
            break;
          case 's':
            e.preventDefault();
            this.emit('save');
            break;
          case 'z':
            if (e.shiftKey) {
              // Let browser handle redo
            }
            // Let browser handle undo
            break;
        }
      }
    });

    // Focus mode: highlight current paragraph
    if (this.props.focusMode) {
      this.on(this.editorEl, 'keyup', () => this.updateFocusParagraph());
      this.on(this.editorEl, 'click', () => this.updateFocusParagraph());
    }

    // Focus the editor
    this.editorEl.focus();
  }

  handleInput() {
    clearTimeout(this._changeTimer);
    this._changeTimer = setTimeout(() => {
      const content = this.editorEl.innerHTML;
      if (content !== this._lastContent) {
        this._lastContent = content;
        const text = this.editorEl.innerText || '';
        const wordCount = this.countWords(text);
        const charCount = text.length;
        const paragraphCount = this.countParagraphs(text);
        const readingTime = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(wordCount / 250));

        this.emit('content-change', {
          html: content,
          text: text,
          wordCount,
          charCount,
          paragraphCount,
          readingTime
        });
      }
    }, 150);
  }

  emitCursorPosition() {
    const sel = window.getSelection();
    if (!sel.rangeCount) return;

    const range = sel.getRangeAt(0);
    const text = this.editorEl.innerText || '';
    const preCaretRange = range.cloneRange();
    preCaretRange.selectNodeContents(this.editorEl);
    preCaretRange.setEnd(range.startContainer, range.startOffset);
    const caretOffset = preCaretRange.toString().length;

    const textBeforeCaret = text.substring(0, caretOffset);
    const lines = textBeforeCaret.split('\n');
    const line = lines.length;
    const col = lines[lines.length - 1].length + 1;

    this.emit('cursor-position', { line, col });
  }

  applyFormat(type) {
    switch (type) {
      case 'bold':
        document.execCommand('bold', false);
        break;
      case 'italic':
        document.execCommand('italic', false);
        break;
      case 'underline':
        document.execCommand('underline', false);
        break;
      case 'strikethrough':
        document.execCommand('strikeThrough', false);
        break;
      case 'heading1':
        document.execCommand('formatBlock', false, '<h1>');
        break;
      case 'heading2':
        document.execCommand('formatBlock', false, '<h2>');
        break;
      case 'heading3':
        document.execCommand('formatBlock', false, '<h3>');
        break;
      case 'blockquote':
        document.execCommand('formatBlock', false, '<blockquote>');
        break;
      case 'ul':
        document.execCommand('insertUnorderedList', false);
        break;
      case 'ol':
        document.execCommand('insertOrderedList', false);
        break;
      case 'hr':
        document.execCommand('insertHorizontalRule', false);
        break;
      case 'clear':
        document.execCommand('removeFormat', false);
        document.execCommand('formatBlock', false, '<p>');
        break;
    }
    this.handleInput();
  }

  insertTextAtCursor(text) {
    const sel = window.getSelection();
    if (!sel.rangeCount) return;
    const range = sel.getRangeAt(0);
    range.deleteContents();
    const textNode = document.createTextNode(text);
    range.insertNode(textNode);
    range.setStartAfter(textNode);
    range.setEndAfter(textNode);
    sel.removeAllRanges();
    sel.addRange(range);
  }

  insertContent(html)

```js
  insertContent(html) {
    if (!this.editorEl) return;
    this.editorEl.focus();
    const sel = window.getSelection();
    if (!sel.rangeCount) return;
    const range = sel.getRangeAt(0);
    range.deleteContents();
    const frag = range.createContextualFragment(html);
    range.insertNode(frag);
    range.collapse(false);
    sel.removeAllRanges();
    sel.addRange(range);
    this.handleInput();
  }

  replaceSelection(html) {
    if (!this.editorEl) return;
    this.editorEl.focus();
    const sel = window.getSelection();
    if (!sel.rangeCount) return;
    const range = sel.getRangeAt(0);
    range.deleteContents();
    const frag = range.createContextualFragment(html);
    range.insertNode(frag);
    range.collapse(false);
    sel.removeAllRanges();
    sel.addRange(range);
    this.handleInput();
  }

  getSelectedText() {
    const sel = window.getSelection();
    if (!sel.rangeCount) return '';
    return sel.toString();
  }

  setContent(html) {
    if (!this.editorEl) return;
    this.editorEl.innerHTML = html;
    this._lastContent = html;
    this.handleInput();
  }

  getContent() {
    if (!this.editorEl) return '';
    return this.editorEl.innerHTML;
  }

  getText() {
    if (!this.editorEl) return '';
    return this.editorEl.innerText || '';
  }

  updateFocusParagraph() {
    if (!this.editorEl) return;
    const paragraphs = this.editorEl.querySelectorAll('p, div, h1, h2, h3, h4, blockquote, li');
    paragraphs.forEach(p => p.classList.remove('focused-paragraph'));

    const sel = window.getSelection();
    if (!sel.rangeCount) return;
    let node = sel.anchorNode;
    while (node && node !== this.editorEl) {
      if (node.nodeType === 1 && (node.matches('p, div, h1, h2, h3, h4, blockquote, li'))) {
        node.classList.add('focused-paragraph');
        break;
      }
      node = node.parentNode;
    }
  }

  countWords(text) {
    if (!text) return 0;
    return text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length;
  }

  countParagraphs(text) {
    if (!text) return 0;
    return text.split(/\n\s*\n/).filter(p => p.trim().length > 0).length || 1;
  }

  focus() {
    if (this.editorEl) this.editorEl.focus();
  }
}
```

        this.emit('chapter-settings');
      }
    });

        this.emit('rename-chapter');
      }
    });

  updateWordCount(count) {
    const el = this.$('#toolbar-word-count');
    if (el) el.textContent = `${count.toLocaleString()} words`;
  }

  updateChapterTitle(title) {
    const el = this.$('#toolbar-chapter-title');
    if (el) el.textContent = title;
  }

  escapeHtml(str) {
    if (!str) return '';
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }
}

Now the **StatusBar** component:

```js
// src/ui/components/StatusBar.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class StatusBar extends Component {
  template() {
    const {
      wordCount = 0,
      charCount = 0,
      paragraphCount = 0,
      readingTime = 0,
      line = 1,
      col = 1,
      saved = true,
      lastSaved = null,
      dailyGoal = 0,
      dailyWords = 0,
      sessionWords = 0
    } = this.props;

    const goalProgress = dailyGoal > 0 ? Math.min(100, Math.round((dailyWords / dailyGoal) * 100)) : 0;

    return `
      <div class="status-bar">
        <div class="status-bar-left">
          <span class="status-item" title="Save status">
            ${saved ? '✓ Saved' : '● Unsaved'}
            ${lastSaved ? ` · ${this.formatTime(lastSaved)}` : ''}
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="status-bar-center">
          <span class="status-item" title="Words">${wordCount.toLocaleString()} words</span>
          <span class="status-item" title="Characters">${charCount.toLocaleString()} chars</span>
          <span class="status-item" title="Paragraphs">${paragraphCount} ¶</span>
          <span class="status-item" title="Reading time">~${readingTime} min read</span>
        </div>

        <div class="status-bar-right">
          ${dailyGoal > 0 ? `
            <span class="status-item status-goal" title="Daily goal: ${dailyWords}/${dailyGoal}">
              <span class="goal-bar">
                <span class="goal-bar-fill" style="width: ${goalProgress}%"></span>
              </span>
              ${goalProgress}%
            </span>
          ` : ''}
          ${sessionWords > 0 ? `<span class="status-item" title="Session words">+${sessionWords} session</span>` : ''}
          <span class="status-item" title="Cursor position">Ln ${line}, Col ${col}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  afterMount() {
    // No interactive elements needed
  }

  update(props) {
    Object.assign(this.props, props);
    // Selective DOM updates for performance
    this.el.innerHTML = '';
    const temp = document.createElement('div');
    temp.innerHTML = this.template();
    while (temp.firstChild.firstChild) {
      this.el.appendChild(temp.firstChild.firstChild);
    }
  }

  formatTime(dateStr) {
    const date = new Date(dateStr);
    return date.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
  }
}
```

// src/ui/components/Sidebar.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class Sidebar extends Component {
  template() {
    const {
      project = {},
      chapters = [],
      activeChapterId = null,
      collapsed = false,
      notes = []
    } = this.props;

    return `
      <div class="sidebar ${collapsed ? 'collapsed' : ''}">
        <div class="sidebar-header">
          <div class="sidebar-project-info">
            <h2 class="sidebar-project-title" title="${this.escapeHtml(project.title || '')}">${this.escapeHtml(project.title || 'Untitled')}</h2>
            <button class="btn-icon btn-xs" id="btn-project-settings" title="Project Settings">⚙</button>
          </div>
          <button class="btn-icon btn-xs" id="btn-collapse-sidebar" title="${collapsed ? 'Expand' : 'Collapse'} sidebar">
            ${collapsed ? '→' : '←'}
          </button>
        </div>

        ${!collapsed ? `
          <div class="sidebar-tabs">
            <button class="sidebar-tab active" data-tab="chapters">Chapters</button>
            <button class="sidebar-tab" data-tab="notes">Notes</button>
            <button class="sidebar-tab" data-tab="outline">Outline</button>
          </div>

          <div class="sidebar-tab-content" id="sidebar-tab-content">
            ${this.renderChaptersTab(chapters, activeChapterId)}
          </div>

          <div class="sidebar-footer">
            <div class="sidebar-stats">
              <span>${chapters.length} chapters</span>
              <span>${this.totalWords(chapters).toLocaleString()} words</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        ` : ''}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  renderChaptersTab(chapters, activeChapterId) {
    return `
      <div class="sidebar-chapter-list" id="chapter-list">
        ${chapters.length === 0 ? `
          <div class="sidebar-empty">
            <p>No chapters yet.</p>
          </div>
        ` : chapters.map((ch, i) => `
          <div class="sidebar-chapter-item ${ch.id === activeChapterId ? 'active' : ''} ${ch.status || ''}"
               data-chapter-id="${ch.id}"
               draggable="true"
               data-index="${i}">
            <div class="chapter-drag-handle" title="Drag to reorder">⠿</div>
            <div class="chapter-item-info">
              <span class="chapter-item-number">${i + 1}.</span>
              <span class="chapter-item-title">${this.escapeHtml(ch.title || 'Untitled')}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="chapter-item-meta">
              <span class="chapter-item-words">${this.countWords(ch.content).toLocaleString()}</span>
              ${ch.status ? `<span class="chapter-status-badge status-${ch.status}">${ch.status}</span>` : ''}
            </div>
            <button class="btn-icon btn-xs chapter-item-menu" data-chapter-menu="${ch.id}">⋮</button>
          </div>
        `).join('')}
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-sm sidebar-add-btn" id="btn-add-chapter">+ Add Chapter</button>
    `;
  }

  renderNotesTab(notes) {

          </div>
        ` : (notes || []).map(note => `
          <div class="sidebar-note-item" data-note-id="${note.id}">

            <span class="note-item-preview">${this.escapeHtml((note.content || '').substring(0, 50))}</span>
          </div>
        `).join('')}
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-sm sidebar-add-btn" id="btn-add-note">+ Add Note</button>
    `;

        `).join('')}
      </div>

      const tab = e.target.closest('.sidebar-tab');
      if (tab) {

      if (item && !e.target.closest('.chapter-item-menu') && !e.target.closest('.chapter-drag-handle')) {
        this.emit('select-chapter', { id: item.dataset.chapterId });
      }
    });

    // Chapter context menu
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const menuBtn = e.target.closest('.chapter-item-menu');
      if (menuBtn) {
        e.stopPropagation();
        this.showChapterMenu(menuBtn.dataset.chapterMenu, menuBtn);
      }
    });

    // Add chapter
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-add-chapter')) {
        this.emit('add-chapter');
      }
    });

    // Add note
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-add-note')) {
        this.emit('add-note');
      }
    });

    // Note selection
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const noteItem = e.target.closest('.sidebar-note-item');
      if (noteItem) {
        this.emit('select-note', { id: noteItem.dataset.noteId });
      }
    });

    // Outline chapter click
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const outlineItem = e.target.closest('.outline-item');
      if (outlineItem) {
        this.emit('select-chapter', { id: outlineItem.dataset.chapterId });
      }
    });

    // Setup drag and drop for chapters
    this.setupDragDrop();
  }

  setupDragDrop() {
    const list = this.$('#chapter-list');
    if (!list) return;

    let draggedEl = null;
    let draggedIndex = -1;

    this.on(list, 'dragstart', (e) => {
      const item = e.target.closest('.sidebar-chapter-item');
      if (!item) return;
      draggedEl = item;
      draggedIndex = parseInt(item.dataset.index);
      item.classList.add('dragging');
      e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move';
      e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', item.dataset.chapterId);
    });

    this.on(list, 'dragover', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move';
      const item = e.target.closest('.sidebar-chapter-item');
      if (!item || item === draggedEl) return;

      const rect = item.getBoundingClientRect();
      const midY = rect.top + rect.height / 2;
      if (e.clientY < midY) {
        item.classList.add('drag-above');
        item.classList.remove('drag-below');
      } else {
        item.classList.add('drag-below');
        item.classList.remove('drag-above');
      }
    });

    this.on(list, 'dragleave', (e) => {
      const item = e.target.closest('.sidebar-chapter-item');
      if (item) {
        item.classList.remove('drag-above', 'drag-below');
      }
    });

    this.on(list, 'drop', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const targetItem = e.target.closest('.sidebar-chapter-item');
      if (!targetItem || !draggedEl) return;

      const targetIndex = parseInt(targetItem.dataset.index);
      const rect = targetItem.getBoundingClientRect();
      const midY = rect.top + rect.height / 2;
      const insertAfter = e.clientY >= midY;
      const newIndex = insertAfter ? targetIndex + 1 : targetIndex;

      if (newIndex !== draggedIndex && newIndex !== draggedIndex + 1) {
        this.emit('reorder-chapters', {
          fromIndex: draggedIndex,
          toIndex: newIndex > draggedIndex ? newIndex - 1 : newIndex
        });
      }

      list.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-chapter-item').forEach(item => {
        item.classList.remove('drag-above', 'drag-below');
      });
    });

    this.on(list, 'dragend', () => {
      if (draggedEl) {
        draggedEl.classList.remove('dragging');
        draggedEl = null;
      }
      list.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-chapter-item').forEach(item => {
        item.classList.remove('drag-above', 'drag-below');
      });
    });
  }

  showChapterMenu(chapterId, anchorEl) {

    document.querySelectorAll('.context-menu').forEach

          chapterId

        menu.remove();
        document.removeEventListener('click', handleOutside);
      }
    };

    menu.addEventListener('click', handleMenuClick);
    setTimeout(() => document.addEventListener('click', handleOutside), 0);

  totalWords(chapters) {

    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }
}

```js
// src/ui/components/Modal.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class Modal extends Component {
  template() {
    const {
      title = '',
      content = '',
      buttons = [],
      size = 'medium', // small, medium, large
      closable = true
    } = this.props;

    return `
      <div class="modal-overlay" id="modal-overlay">
        <div class="modal modal-${size}" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="${this.escapeHtml(title)}">
          <div class="modal-header">
            <h3 class="modal-title">${this.escapeHtml(title)}</h3>
            ${closable ? '<button class="btn-icon modal-close" id="modal-close" aria-label="Close">✕</button>' : ''}
          </div>
          <div class="modal-body" id="modal-body">
            ${content}
          </div>
          ${buttons.length > 0 ? `
            <div class="modal-footer">
              ${buttons.map(btn => `
                <button class="btn ${btn.primary ? 'btn-primary' : ''} ${btn.danger ? 'btn-danger' : ''}"
                        data-modal-action="${btn.action}"
                        ${btn.disabled ? 'disabled' : ''}>
                  ${this.escapeHtml(btn.label)}
                </button>
              `).join('')}
            </div>
          ` : ''}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  afterMount() {
    // Close button
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#modal-close')) {
        this.emit('modal-close');
        this.close();
      }
    });

    // Overlay click to close
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.id === 'modal-overlay' && this.props.closable !== false) {
        this.emit('modal-close');
        this.close();
      }
    });

    // Button actions
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const btn = e.target.closest('[data-modal-action]');
      if (btn) {
        this.emit('modal-action', { action: btn.dataset.modalAction });
      }
    });

    // Escape key
    this._escHandler = (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Escape' && this.props.closable !== false) {
        this.emit('modal-close');
        this.close();
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener('keydown', this._escHandler);

    // Focus trap
    this.trapFocus();
  }

  trapFocus() {
    const modal = this.el.querySelector('.modal');
    if (!modal) return;
    const focusable = modal.querySelectorAll('button, input, textarea, select, [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])');
    if (focusable.length === 0) return;
    focusable[0].focus();
  }

  close

  close() {
    if (this._escHandler) {
      document.removeEventListener('keydown', this._escHandler);
    }
    this.el.classList.add('modal-closing');
    setTimeout(() => {
      this.destroy();
    }, 200);
  }

  getBody() {
    return this.$('#modal-body');
  }

  escapeHtml(str) {
    if (!str) return '';
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }
}

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class AIPanel extends Component {
  template() {
    const { visible = false, provider = 'none', messages = [] } = this.props;

    return `
      <div class="ai-panel ${visible ? 'visible' : 'hidden'}">
        <div class="ai-panel-header">
          <h3>AI Assistant</h3>
          <div class="ai-panel-header-actions">
            <select class="ai-action-select" id="ai-action-select">
              <option value="freeform">Free Chat</option>
              <optgroup label="Writing">
                <option value="continue">Continue Writing</option>
                <option value="expand">Expand Selection</option>
                <option value="rewrite">Rewrite Selection</option>
                <option value="summarize">Summarize</option>
              </optgroup>
              <optgroup label="Editing">
                <option value="grammar">Fix Grammar</option>
                <option value="tone-formal">Make Formal</option>
                <option value="tone-casual">Make Casual</option>
                <option value="shorten">Shorten</option>
                <option value="lengthen">Lengthen</option>
              </optgroup>
              <optgroup label="Creative">
                <option value="dialogue">Generate Dialogue</option>
                <option value="description">Generate Description</option>
                <option value="brainstorm">Brainstorm Ideas</option>
                <option value="character">Character Development</option>
                <option value="plot">Plot Suggestions</option>
              </optgroup>
            </select>

                <button class="btn btn-sm ai-quick-btn" data-quick="brainstorm">Brainstorm</button>

        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

            </div>
          ` : ''}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;

```js
  formatMessageText(text) {
    if (!text) return '';
    return text
      .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
      .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
      .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
      .replace(/\n/g, '<br>')
      .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
      .replace(/\*(.*?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')
      .replace(/`(.*?)`/g, '<code>$1</code>');
  }

  afterMount() {
    const input = this.$('#ai-input');

    // Send message
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-send-ai')) {
        this.sendMessage();
      }
    });

    // Enter to send (Shift+Enter for newline)
    if (input) {
      this.on(input, 'keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
          e.preventDefault();
          this.sendMessage();
        }
      });
    }

    // Close panel
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-close-ai')) {
        this.emit('close-ai-panel');
      }
    });

    // Clear conversation
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-clear-ai')) {
        this.emit('clear-ai-conversation');
      }
    });

    // Quick actions
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const quickBtn = e.target.closest('.ai-quick-btn');
      if (quickBtn) {
        this.emit('ai-quick-action', { action: quickBtn.dataset.quick });
      }
    });

    // Message actions (insert, replace, copy)
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const actionBtn = e.target.closest('.ai-msg-action');
      if (actionBtn) {
        this.emit('ai-message-action', {
          action: actionBtn.dataset.msgAction,
          messageId: actionBtn.dataset.msgId
        });
      }
    });

    // Action select change
    this.on(this.el, 'change', (e) => {
      if (e.target.id === 'ai-action-select') {
        const action = e.target.value;
        if (action !== 'freeform') {
          this.emit('ai-quick-action', { action });
          e.target.value = 'freeform';
        }
      }
    });

    // Clear context
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-clear-context')) {
        this.clearContext();
      }
    });

    // Configure AI
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#btn-configure-ai')) {
        e.preventDefault();
        this.emit('configure-ai');
      }
    });
  }

  sendMessage() {
    const input = this.$('#ai-input');
    if (!input) return;
    const text = input.value.trim();
    if (!text) return;
    input.value = '';
    this.emit('ai-send', { text, context: this._context || null });
    this._context = null;
    this.hideContext();
  }

  addMessage(msg) {
    const container = this.$('#ai-messages');
    if (!container) return;
    // Remove welcome message if present
    const welcome = container.querySelector('.ai-welcome');
    if (welcome) welcome.remove();

    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.innerHTML = this.renderMessage(msg);
    container.appendChild(div.firstElementChild);
    container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
  }

  showLoading() {
    const container = this.$('#ai-messages');
    if (!container) return;
    const loader = document.createElement('div');
    loader.className = 'ai-message ai-message-loading';
    loader.id = 'ai-loading';
    loader.innerHTML = `
      <div class="ai-message-avatar">🤖</div>
      <div class="ai-message-content">
        <div class="ai-typing-indicator">
          <span></span><span></span><span></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    container.appendChild(loader);
    container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
  }

  hideLoading() {
    const loader = this.$('#ai-loading');
    if (loader) loader.remove();
  }

  setContext(text) {
    this._context = text;
    const indicator = this.$('#ai-context-indicator');
    const contextText = this.$('#ai-context-text');
    if (indicator && contextText) {
      indicator.style.display = 'flex';
      const preview = text.length > 60 ? text.substring(0, 60) + '...' : text;
      contextText.textContent = `Selected: "${preview}"`;
    }
  }

  clearContext() {
    this._context = null;
    this.hideContext();
  }

  hideContext() {
    const indicator = this.$('#ai-context-indicator');
    if (indicator) indicator.style.display = 'none';
  }

  clearMessages() {
    const container = this.$('#ai-messages');
    if (container) {
      container.innerHTML = `
        <div class="ai-welcome">
          <p>👋 I can help you with your writing!</p>
          <p>Select text in the editor and choose an

Now let's build the **Toast/Notification** component:

```js
// src/ui/components/Toast.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class Toast extends Component {
  template() {
    const { message = '', type = 'info', duration = 3000, action = null } = this.props;
    const icons = { info: 'ℹ️', success: '✅', warning: '⚠️', error: '❌' };

    return `
      <div class="toast toast-${type}" role="alert">
        <span class="toast-icon">${icons[type] || icons.info}</span>
        <span class="toast-message">${this.escapeHtml(message)}</span>
        ${action ? `<button class="btn btn-xs toast-action" id="toast-action">${this.escapeHtml(action.label)}</button>` : ''}
        <button class="btn-icon btn-xs toast-close" id="toast-close">✕</button>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  afterMount() {
    const { duration = 3000 } = this.props;

    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#toast-close')) {
        this.dismiss();
      }
    });

    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('#toast-action')) {
        this.emit('toast-action', { action: this.props.action });
        this.dismiss();
      }
    });

    if (duration > 0) {
      this._timeout = setTimeout(() => this.dismiss(), duration);
    }

    // Animate in
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      this.el.querySelector('.toast')?.classList.add('toast-enter');
    });
  }

  dismiss() {
    if (this._timeout) clearTimeout(this._timeout);
    const toast = this.el.querySelector('.toast');
    if (toast) {
      toast.classList.add('toast-exit');
      setTimeout(() => this.destroy(), 300);
    } else {
      this.destroy();
    }
  }

  escapeHtml(str) {
    if (!str) return '';
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;');
  }
}

// Toast container manager
export class ToastContainer {
  constructor() {
    this.container = document.createElement('div');
    this.container.className = 'toast-container';
    document.body.appendChild(this.container);
  }

  show(message, type = 'info', options = {}) {
    const toast = new Toast({
      message,
      type,
      duration: options.duration ?? 3000,
      action: options.action || null
    });
    toast.mount(this.container);
    return toast;
  }

  info(message, options) { return this.show(message, 'info', options); }
  success(message, options) { return this.show(message, 'success', options); }
  warning(message, options) { return this.show(message, 'warning', options); }
  error(message, options) { return this.show(message, 'error', options); }
}
```

// src/ui/components/ProjectCard.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class ProjectCard extends Component {
  template() {
    const {
      project = {},
      stats = {}
    } = this.props;

    const {
      id,
      title = 'Untitled',
      genre = '',
      updatedAt,
      createdAt,
      coverColor = '#6366f1'
    } = project;

    const wordCount = stats.wordCount || 0;
    const chapterCount = stats.chapterCount || 0;
    const lastEdited = updatedAt ? this.timeAgo(new Date(updatedAt)) : 'Never';

    return `
      <div class="project-card" data-project-id="${id}" tabindex="0" role="button" aria-label="Open ${this.escapeHtml(title)}">
        <div class="project-card-cover" style="background-color: ${coverColor}">
          <div class="project-card-cover-text">${this.escapeHtml(title.charAt(0).toUpperCase())}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="project-card-body">
          <h3 class="project-card-title">${this.escapeHtml(title)}</h3>
          ${genre ? `<span class="project-card-genre">${this.escapeHtml(genre)}</span>` : ''}
          <div class="project-card-meta">

          <div class="project-card-meta">
            <span>${chapterCount} chapter${chapterCount !== 1 ? 's' : ''}</span>
            <span>${wordCount.toLocaleString()} words</span>
          </div>
          <div class="project-card-footer">
            <span class="project-card-date">Edited ${lastEdited}</span>
            <button class="btn-icon btn-xs project-card-menu" data-project-menu="${id}" title="More options">⋮</button>
          </div>
        </div>

    `;

  afterMount() {
    // Open project
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (!e.target.closest('.project-card-menu')) {
        this.emit('open-project', { id: this.props.project.id });
      }
    });

    this.on(this.el, 'keydown', (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.target.closest('.project-card-menu')) {
        this.emit('open-project', { id: this.props.project.id });
      }
    });

    // Context menu
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const menuBtn = e.target.closest('.project-card-menu');
      if (menuBtn) {
        e.stopPropagation();
        this.showProjectMenu(menuBtn);
      }
    });
  }

  showProjectMenu(anchorEl) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.context-menu').forEach(m => m.remove());
    const rect = anchorEl.getBoundingClientRect();
    const menu = document.createElement('div');
    menu.className = 'context-menu';
    menu.style.top = `${rect.bottom + 4}px`;
    menu.style.left = `${rect.left}px`;
    menu.innerHTML = `
      <div class="context-menu-item" data-action="open">📂 Open</div>
      <div class="context-menu-item" data-action="rename">✏️ Rename</div>
      <div class="context-menu-item" data-action="duplicate">📄 Duplicate</div>
      <div class="context-menu-item" data-action="export">📤 Export</div>
      <div class="context-menu-separator"></div>
      <div class="context-menu-item context-menu-danger" data-action="delete">🗑️ Delete</div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(menu);

    const handleClick = (e) => {
      const item = e.target.closest('.context-menu-item');
      if (item) {
        this.emit('project-action', {
          action: item.dataset.action,
          projectId: this.props.project.id
        });
      }
      menu.remove();
      document.removeEventListener('click', handleOutside);
    };

    const handleOutside = (e) => {
      if (!menu.contains(e.target)) {
        menu.remove();
        document.removeEventListener('click', handleOutside);
      }
    };

    menu.addEventListener('click', handleClick);
    setTimeout(() => document.addEventListener('click', handleOutside), 0);
  }

  timeAgo(date) {
    const seconds = Math.floor((new Date() - date) / 1000);
    if (seconds < 60) return 'just now';
    const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
    if (minutes < 60) return `${minutes}m ago`;
    const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);
    if (hours < 24) return `${hours}h ago`;
    const days = Math.floor(hours / 24);
    if (days < 30) return `${days}d ago`;
    const months = Math.floor(days / 30);
    if (months < 12) return `${months}mo ago`;
    return `${Math.floor(months / 12)}y ago`;
  }

  escapeHtml(str) {
    if (!str) return '';
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }
}

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class StatusBar extends Component {
  template() {

      wordCount = 0,
      charCount = 0,

      saveStatus = 'saved', // saved, saving, unsaved, error
      sessionWords = 0,
      goalProgress = null
    } = this.props;

    const saveLabels = { saved: 'Saved', saving: 'Saving...', unsaved: 'Unsaved', error: 'Save Error' };

    return `
      <div class="status-bar">
        <div class="status-bar-left">
          <span class="status-item save-status save-status-${saveStatus}" title="${saveLabels[saveStatus]}">
            ${saveIcons[saveStatus]} ${saveLabels[saveStatus]}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="status-bar-center">
          <span class="status-item" title="Word count">${wordCount.toLocaleString()} words</span>
          <span class="status-separator">|</span>
          <span class="status-item" title="Character count">${charCount.toLocaleString()}

  afterMount() {

    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const item = e.target.closest('.status-item');
      if (item) {
        this.emit('status-bar-click', { target: item.title });
      }
    });
  }

  updateSaveStatus(status) {
    const el = this.el.querySelector('.save-status');
    if (!el) return;
    const saveIcons = { saved: '✓', saving: '⟳', unsaved: '●', error: '✕' };
    const saveLabels = { saved: 'Saved', saving: 'Saving...', unsaved: 'Unsaved', error: 'Save Error' };
    el.className = `status-item save-status save-status-${status}`;
    el.title = saveLabels[status];
    el.textContent = `${saveIcons[status]} ${saveLabels[status]}`;
  }

  updateWordCount(count) {
    // Quick update without full re-render
    const items = this.el.querySelectorAll('.status-item');
    items.forEach(item => {
      if (item.title === 'Word count') {
        item.textContent = `${count.toLocaleString()} words`;
      }
    });
  }
}

// src/ui/components/SettingsPanel.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class SettingsPanel extends Component {
  template() {
    const {
      settings = {},
      activeSection = 'general'
    } = this.props;

    const sections = [
      { id: 'general', label: '⚙️ General', icon: '⚙️' },
      { id: 'editor', label: '✏️ Editor', icon: '✏️' },
      { id: 'appearance', label: '🎨 Appearance', icon: '🎨' },
      { id: 'ai', label: '🤖 AI', icon: '🤖' },
      { id: 'export', label: '📤 Export', icon: '📤' },
      { id: 'backup', label: '💾 Backup', icon: '💾' },
      { id: 'about', label: 'ℹ️ About', icon: 'ℹ️' }
    ];

    return `
      <div class="settings-panel">
        <div class="settings-nav">
          ${sections.map(s => `
            <button class="settings-nav-item ${s.id === activeSection ? 'active' : ''}"
                    data-section="${s.id}">
              ${s.label}
            </button>
          `).join('')}
        </div>
        <div class="settings-content" id="settings-content">
          ${this.renderSection(activeSection, settings)}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  renderSection(section, settings) {
    switch (section) {
      case 'general': return this.renderGeneralSection(settings);
      case 'editor': return this.renderEditorSection(settings);
      case 'appearance': return this.renderAppearanceSection(settings);
      case 'ai': return this.renderAISection(settings);
      case 'export': return this.renderExportSection(settings);
      case 'backup': return this.renderBackupSection(settings);
      case 'about': return this.renderAboutSection();
      default: return '';
    }
  }

              <option value="60" ${settings.autoSaveInterval === 60 ? 'selected' : ''}>Every minute</option>
              <option value="300" ${settings.autoSaveInterval === 300 ? 'selected' : ''}>Every 5 minutes</option

  renderAIProviderConfig(ai) {
    const provider = ai.provider;
    const configs = {
      openai: {
        apiKeyField: 'ai.openaiKey',
        apiKeyValue: ai.openaiKey || '',
        placeholder: 'sk-...',
        models: ['gpt-4o', 'gpt-4o-mini', 'gpt-4-turbo', 'gpt-3.5-turbo'],
        currentModel: ai.model || 'gpt-4o-mini',
        helpUrl: 'https://platform.openai.com/api-keys'
      },
      anthropic: {
        apiKeyField: 'ai.anthropicKey',
        apiKeyValue: ai.anthropicKey || '',
        placeholder: 'sk-ant-...',
        models: ['claude-sonnet-4-20250514', 'claude-3-5-haiku-20241022', 'claude-3-opus-20240229'],
        currentModel: ai.model || 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',
        helpUrl: 'https://console.anthropic.com/'
      },
      openrouter: {
        apiKeyField: 'ai.openrouterKey',
        apiKeyValue: ai.openrouterKey || '',
        placeholder: 'sk-or-...',
        models: ['anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514', 'openai/gpt-4o', 'google/gemini-pro', 'meta-llama/llama-3-70b'],
        currentModel: ai.model || 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514',
        helpUrl: 'https://openrouter.ai/keys'
      },
      local: {
        apiKeyField: null,
        models: ['llama3', 'mistral', 'codellama', 'phi3'],
        currentModel: ai.model || 'llama3',
        endpointField: 'ai.localEndpoint',
        endpointValue: ai.localEndpoint || 'http://localhost:11434'
      }
    };

    const config = configs[provider];
    if (!config) return '';

    return `
      ${config.apiKeyField ? `
        <label class="settings-label">
          <span>API Key ${config.helpUrl ? `<a href="${config.helpUrl}" target="_blank" class="settings-link">(Get key)</a>` : ''}</span>
          <input type="password" class="settings-input" data-setting="${config.apiKeyField}"
                 value="${config.apiKeyValue}" placeholder="${config.placeholder}">
        </label>
      ` : ''}
      ${config.endpointField ? `
        <label class="settings-label">
          <span>Endpoint URL</span>
          <input type="text" class="settings-input" data-setting="${config.endpointField}"
                 value="${config.endpointValue}" placeholder="http://localhost:11434">
        </label>
      ` : ''}
      <label class="settings-label">
        <span>Model</span>
        <select class="settings-input" data-setting="ai.model">
          ${config.models.map(m => `
            <option value="${m}" ${m === config.currentModel ? 'selected' : ''}>${m}</option>
          `).join('')}
        </select>
      </label>
      <button class="btn btn-sm" id="btn-test-ai">Test Connection</button>
      <div id="ai-test-result" class="settings-hint"></div>
    `;
  }

  renderExportSection(settings) {
    return `
      <div class="settings-section">
        <h3>Export Settings</h3>
        <div class="settings-group">
          <label class="settings-label">
            <span>Default Export Format</span>
            <select class="settings-input" data-setting="defaultExportFormat">

              <option value="epub" ${settings.defaultExportFormat === 'epub' ? 'selected' : ''}>EPUB (.epub)</option>
              <option value="pdf" ${settings.defaultExportFormat === 'pdf' ? 'selected' : ''}>PDF (.pdf)</option>
            </select>
          </label>
          <label class="settings-label settings-checkbox">
            <input type="checkbox" data-setting="exportInclu

  afterMount() {
    // Section navigation
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const navItem = e.target.closest('.settings-nav-item');
      if (navItem) {
        const section = navItem.dataset.section;
        this.el.querySelectorAll('.settings-nav-item').forEach(n => n.classList.remove('active'));
        navItem.classList.add('active');
        const content = this.$('#settings-content');
        if (content) {
          content.innerHTML = this.renderSection(section, this.props.settings);
          this.bindSectionEvents(section);
        }
      }
    });

    // Theme picker
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const themeBtn = e.target.closest('.theme-option');
      if (themeBtn) {
        this.el.querySelectorAll('.theme-option').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
        themeBtn.classList.add('active');
        this.emitChange('theme', themeBtn.dataset.theme);
      }
    });

    // Settings changes - selects and inputs
    this.on(this.el, 'change', (e) => {
      const input = e.target.closest('[data-setting]');
      if (input) {
        const key = input.dataset.setting;

```js
        if (input.type === 'checkbox') {
          value = input.checked;
        } else if (input.type === 'number' || input.type === 'range') {
          value = parseFloat(input.value);
        } else {
          value = input.value;
        }
        this.emitChange(key, value);

        // Update range display values
        if (input.type === 'range') {
          const display = input.parentElement.querySelector('.settings-range-value');
          if (display) {
            display.textContent = key === 'fontSize' ? `${value}px` : value;
          }
        }

        // Handle AI provider change
        if (key === 'ai.provider') {
          const configEl = this.$('#ai-provider-config');
          if (configEl) {
            const ai = { ...this.props.settings.ai, provider: value };
            configEl.innerHTML = value !== 'none' ? this.renderAIProviderConfig(ai) : '<p class="settings-hint">Select an AI provider to configure it.</p>';
          }
        }
      }
    });

    // Input events for range sliders (live update)
    this.on(this.el, 'input', (e) => {
      const input = e.target.closest('[data-setting]');
      if (input && input.type === 'range') {
        const display = input.parentElement.querySelector('.settings-range-value');
        if (display) {
          const key = input.dataset.setting;
          display.textContent = key === 'fontSize' ? `${input.value}px` : input.value;
        }
      }
    });

    // Backup action buttons
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.id === 'btn-export-all') {
        this.emit('settings-action', { action: 'export-all' });
      } else if (e.target.id === 'btn-import-data') {
        this.emit('settings-action', { action: 'import-data' });
      } else if (e.target.id === 'btn-clear-data') {
        this.emit('settings-action', { action: 'clear-data' });
      } else if (e.target.id === 'btn-test-ai') {
        this.emit('settings-action', { action: 'test-ai' });
      }
    });

    this.bindSectionEvents(this.props.activeSection || 'general');
  }

  bindSectionEvents(section) {
    if (section === 'backup') {
      this.calculateStorageUsage();
    }
  }

  async calculateStorageUsage() {
    const infoEl = this.$('#storage-info');
    if (!infoEl) return;
    try {
      if (navigator.storage && navigator.storage.estimate) {
        const estimate = await navigator.storage.estimate();
        const used = (estimate.usage / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(2);
        const quota = (estimate.quota / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(0);
        infoEl.innerHTML = `<span class="settings-hint">Storage: ${used} MB used of ${quota} MB available</span>`;
      } else {
        infoEl.innerHTML = `<span class="settings-hint">Storage estimation not available in this browser.</span>`;
      }
    } catch (err) {
      infoEl.innerHTML = `<span class="settings-hint">Could not calculate storage usage.</span>`;
    }
  }

  emitChange(key, value) {
    this.emit('setting-changed', { key, value });
  }
}

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class Toolbar extends Component {
  template() {
    const { activeFormats = {}, mode = 'write' } = this.props;

    const isActive = (fmt) => activeFormats[fmt] ? 'active' : '';

            <strong>B</strong>
          </button>
          <button class="toolbar-btn ${isActive('italic')}" data-format="italic" title="Italic (Ctrl+I)" aria-pressed="${!!activeFormats.italic}">
            <em>I</em>
          </button>
          <button class="toolbar-btn ${isActive('underline')}" data-format="underline" title="Underline (Ctrl+U)" aria-pressed="${!!activeFormats.underline}">
            <u>U</u>
          </button>
          <button class="toolbar-btn ${isActive('strikethrough')}" data-format="strikethrough" title="Strikethrough" aria-pressed="${!!activeFormats.strikethrough}">
            <s>S</s>
          </button>
        </div>
        <div class="toolbar-separator"></div>
        <div class="toolbar-group">
          <button class="toolbar-btn" data-format="heading1" title="Heading 1">H1</button>
          <button class="toolbar-btn" data-format="heading2" title="Heading 2">H2</button>
          <button class="toolbar-btn" data-format="heading3" title="Heading 3">H3</button>
        </div>
        <div class="toolbar-separator"></div>
        <div class="toolbar-group">
          <button class="toolbar-btn ${isActive('blockquote')}" data-format="blockquote" title="Block Quote" aria-pressed="${!!activeFormats.blockquote}">

        <div class="toolbar-group">

        </div>

          <button class="toolbar-btn toolbar-mode-btn ${mode === 'write' ? 'active' : ''}" data-mode="write" title="Write mode">✏️ Write</button>
          <button class="toolbar-btn toolbar-mode-btn ${mode === 'edit' ? 'active' : ''}" data-mode="edit" title="Edit mode">📝 Edit</button>
          <button class="toolbar-btn toolbar-mode-btn ${mode === 'preview' ? 'active' : ''}" data-mode="preview" title="Preview mode">👁️ Preview</button>

  afterMount() {
    // Format buttons
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const btn = e.target.closest('[data-format]');
      if (btn) {
        e.preventDefault();
        this.emit('toolbar-format', { format: btn.dataset.format });
      }
    });

    // Action buttons
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const btn = e.target.closest('[data-action]');
      if (btn) {
        e.preventDefault();
        this.emit('toolbar-action', { action: btn.dataset.action });
      }
    });

    // Mode buttons
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const btn = e.target.closest('[data-mode]');
      if (btn) {
        e.preventDefault();
        this.el.querySelectorAll('.toolbar-mode-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
        btn.classList.add('active');
        this.emit('toolbar-mode', { mode: btn.dataset.mode });
      }
    });
  }

  updateActiveFormats(formats) {
    this.el.querySelectorAll('[data-format]').forEach(btn => {
      const fmt = btn.dataset.format;
      btn.classList.toggle('active', !!formats[fmt]);
      btn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', !!formats[fmt]);
    });
  }
}
```

// src/ui/components/FindReplace.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class FindReplace extends Component {
  setup() {
    this.state = {
      findText: '',
      replaceText: '',
      matchCase: false,
      wholeWord: false,
      useRegex: false,
      showReplace: false,
      matchCount: 0,
      currentMatch: 0
    };
  }

  template() {
    const { findText, replaceText, matchCase, wholeWord, useRegex, showReplace, matchCount, currentMatch } = this.state;

    return `
      <div class="find-replace-panel">
        <div class="find-row">
          <div class="find-input-wrapper">
            <input type="text" class="find-input" id="find-input"
                   placeholder="Find..." value="${this.escapeAttr(findText)}"
                   aria-label="Find text">
            <span class="find-count">${matchCount > 0 ? `${currentMatch}/${matchCount}` : 'No results'}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="find-buttons">
            <button class="find-btn" id="find-prev" title="Previous match (Shift+Enter)">▲</button>
            <button class="find-btn" id="find-next" title="Next match (Enter)">▼</button>
          </div>
          <div class="find-options">
            <button class="find-option-btn ${matchCase ? 'active' : ''}" id="opt-case" title="Match Case">Aa</button>
            <button class="find-option-btn ${wholeWord ? 'active' : ''}" id="opt-word" title="Whole Word">W</button>
            <button class="find-option-btn ${useRegex ? 'active' : ''}" id="opt-regex" title="Use Regex">.*</button>
          </div>
          <button class="find-btn" id="toggle-replace" title="Toggle Replace">${showReplace ? '▾' : '▸'}</button>
          <button class="find-btn find-close" id

---

**USER:** Continue from where you left off.

**AI:**


<thinking>
Continuing from the FindReplace component's template method.

```js
          <button class="find-btn find-close" id="find-close" title="Close (Escape)">✕</button>
        </div>
        ${showReplace ? `
          <div class="replace-row">
            <div class="find-input-wrapper">
              <input type="text" class="find-input" id="replace-input"
                     placeholder="Replace..." value="${this.escapeAttr(replaceText)}"
                     aria-label="Replace text">
            </div>
            <div class="find-buttons">
              <button class="find-btn" id="replace-one" title="Replace">Replace</button>
              <button class="find-btn" id="replace-all" title="Replace All">All</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ` : ''}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  escapeAttr(str) {
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;');
  }

  afterMount() {
    const findInput = this.$('#find-input');
    if (findInput) {
      findInput.focus();
      findInput.select();
    }

    // Find input keydown
    this.on(this.el, 'keydown', (e) => {
      if (e.target.id === 'find-input') {
        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
          e.preventDefault();
          if (e.shiftKey) {
            this.findPrev();
          } else {
            this.findNext();
          }
        } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
          this.close();
        }
      } else if (e.target.id === 'replace-input') {
        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
          e.preventDefault();
          this.replaceOne();
        } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
          this.close();
        }
      }
    });

    // Find input changes
    this.on(this.el, 'input', (e) => {
      if (e.target.id === 'find-input') {
        this.state.findText = e.target.value;
        this.performSearch();
      } else if (e.target.id === 'replace-input') {
        this.state.replaceText = e.target.value;
      }
    });

    // Buttons
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const id = e.target.id;
      switch (id) {
        case 'find-prev': this.findPrev(); break;
        case 'find-next': this.findNext(); break;
        case 'opt-case':
          this.state.matchCase = !this.state.matchCase;
          e.target.classList.toggle('active');
          this.performSearch();
          break;
        case 'opt-word':
          this.state.wholeWord = !this.state.wholeWord;
          e.target.classList.toggle('active');
          this.performSearch();
          break;
        case 'opt-regex':
          this.state.useRegex = !this.state.useRegex;
          e.target.classList.toggle('active');
          this.performSearch();
          break;
        case 'toggle-replace':
          this.state.showReplace = !this.state.showReplace;
          this.update();
          break;
        case 'replace-one': this.replaceOne(); break;
        case 'replace-all': this.replaceAll(); break;
        case 'find-close': this.close(); break;
      }
    });
  }

  performSearch() {
    this.emit('find-search', {
      text: this.state.findText,
      matchCase: this.state.matchCase,
      wholeWord: this.state.wholeWord,
      useRegex: this.state.useRegex
    });
  }

  findNext() {
    this.emit('find-next', { text: this.state.findText });
  }

  findPrev() {
    this.emit('find-prev', { text: this.state.findText });
  }

  replaceOne() {
    this.emit('find-replace-one', {
      find: this.state.findText,
      replace: this.state.replaceText
    });
  }

  replaceAll() {
    this.emit('find-replace-all', {
      find: this.state.findText,
      replace: this.state.replaceText
    });
  }

  close() {
    this.emit('find-close');
  }

  updateMatchInfo(current, total) {
    this.state.currentMatch = current;
    this.state.matchCount = total;
    const countEl = this.el.querySelector('.find-count');
    if (countEl) {
      countEl.textContent = total > 0 ? `${current}/${total}` : 'No results';
    }
  }
}

export class StatusBar extends Component {

      error

```js
    const saveIcon = {
      saved: '✓ Saved',
      saving: '⟳ Saving...',
      unsaved: '● Unsaved',
      error: '✕ Error'
    }[saveStatus] || '✓ Saved';

    const goalProgress = dailyGoal > 0 ? Math.min(100, Math.round((dailyWords / dailyGoal) * 100)) : 0;

    return `
      <div class="status-bar">
        <div class="status-left">
          <span class="status-item status-save ${saveStatus}" title="Save status">${saveIcon}</span>
          ${currentChapter ? `<span class="status-item status-chapter" title="Current chapter">${this.escapeHtml(currentChapter)}</span>` : ''}
        </div>
        <div class="status-center">
          ${dailyGoal > 0 ? `
            <div class="status-goal" title="Daily goal: ${dailyWords}/${dailyGoal} words">
              <div class="status-goal-bar">
                <div class="status-goal-fill" style="width: ${goalProgress}%"></div>
              </div>
              <span class="status-goal-text">${dailyWords}/${dailyGoal}</span>
            </div>
          ` : ''}
        </div>
        <div class="status-right">
          <span class="status-item" title="Session words">Session: ${sessionWords.toLocaleString()}</span>
          <span class="status-separator">|</span>
          <span class="status-item" title="Word count">${wordCount.toLocaleString()} words</span>
          <span class="status-separator">|</span>
          <span class="status-item" title="Character count">${charCount.toLocaleString()} chars</span>
          <span class="status-separator">|</span>
          <span class="status-item" title="Paragraphs">${paragraphCount} ¶</span>
          <span class="status-separator">|</span>
          <span class="status-item" title="Estimated reading time">${readingTime} min read</span>
          <span class="status-separator">|</span>
          <span class="status-item" title="Cursor position">Ln ${cursorPosition.line}, Col ${cursorPosition.col}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  escapeHtml(str) {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.textContent = str;
    return div.innerHTML;
  }

  updateWordCount(stats) {
    const items = this.el.querySelectorAll('.status-item');
    // Quick update without full re-render for performance
    this.props = { ...this.props, ...stats };
  }

  updateSaveStatus(status) {
    const saveEl = this.el.querySelector('.status-save');
    if (saveEl) {
      saveEl.className = `status-item status-save ${status}`;
      const labels = {
        saved: '✓ Saved',
        saving: '⟳ Saving...',
        unsaved: '● Unsaved',
        error: '✕ Error'
      };
      saveEl.textContent = labels[status] || labels.saved;
    }
  }

  updateCursorPosition(line, col) {
    // Direct DOM update for performance (called frequently)
    const items = this.el.querySelectorAll('.status-item');
    const cursorItem = items[items.length - 1];
    if (cursorItem) {
      cursorItem.textContent = `Ln ${line}, Col ${col}`;
    }
  }
}

  renderTab(tab) {
    switch (tab) {
      case 'chat': return this.renderChat();
      case 'suggest': return this.renderSuggest();
      case 'analyze': return this.renderAnalyze();
      default: return this.renderChat();
    }
  }

  renderChat() {
    const { messages, isLoading } = this.state;

    return `
      <div class="ai-chat">
        <div class="ai-messages" id="ai-messages">
          ${messages.length === 0 ? `
            <div class="ai-welcome">
              <p>👋 Hi! I'm your writing assistant. I can help with:</p>
              <ul>
                <li>Continuing your story</li>
                <li>Brainstorming ideas</li>
                <li>Editing and improving prose</li>
                <li>Character development</li>
                <li>Plot suggestions</li>
              </ul>
              <div class="ai-quick-prompts">
                <button class="ai-quick-prompt" data-prompt="Continue writing from where I left off">Continue writing</button>
                <button class="ai-quick-prompt" data-prompt="Suggest what could happen next in this scene">What happens next?</button>
                <button class="ai-quick-prompt" data-prompt="Help me improve the prose in the selected text">Improve prose</button>
                <button class="ai-quick-prompt" data-prompt="Describe the setting in more detail">Describe setting</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          ` : messages.map(msg => this.renderMessage(msg)).join('')}
          ${isLoading ? `
            <div class="ai-message ai-message-assistant">
              <div class="ai-message-avatar">🤖</div>
              <div class="ai-message-content">
                <div class="ai-typing">
                  <span></span><span></span><span></span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          ` : ''}
        </div>
        <div class="ai-input-area">
          <textarea class="ai-input" id="ai-input" placeholder="Ask me anything about your writing..."
                    rows="2"></textarea>
          <button class="ai-send-btn" id="ai-send" ${isLoading ? 'disabled' : ''} title="Send (Enter)">
            ${isLoading ? '⏳' : '➤'}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  renderMessage(msg) {
    const isUser = msg.role === 'user';
    return `
      <div class="ai-message ai-message-${msg.role}">
        <div class="ai-message-avatar">${isUser ? '👤' : '🤖'}</div>
        <div class="ai-message-content">
          <div class="ai-message-text">${this.formatMessageText(msg.content)}</div>
          ${!isUser ? `
            <div class="ai-message-actions">
              <button class="ai-msg-action" data-action="copy" data-msg-id="${msg.id}" title="Copy">📋</button>
              <button class="ai-msg-action" data-action="insert" data-msg-id="${msg.id}" title="Insert into document">📥</button>
              <button class="ai-msg-action" data-action="regenerate" data-msg-id="${msg.id}" title="Regenerate">🔄</button>
            </div>
          ` : ''}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  formatMessageText(text) {
    // Basic markdown-like formatting
    return text
      .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
      .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
      .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
      .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
      .replace(/\*(.*?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')
      .replace(/`(.*?)`/g, '<code>$1</code>')
      .replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
  }

  renderSuggest() {
    const { suggestions, isLoading } = this.state;

      <div class="ai-suggest">
        <div class="ai-suggest-actions">

          <button class="btn btn-sm" data-suggest="dialogue" ${isLoading ? 'disabled' : ''}>Write Dialogue</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" data-suggest="description" ${isLoading ? 'disabled' : ''}>Add Description</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" data-suggest="transition" ${isLoading ? 'disabled' : ''}>Scene Transition</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" data-suggest="conflict" ${isLoading ? 'disabled' : ''}>Add Conflict</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" data-suggest="ending" ${isLoading ? 'disabled' : ''}>Chapter Ending</button>
        </div>
        <div class="ai-suggest-options">

            <span>Tone</span>
            <select class="settings-input ai-tone-select" id="ai-tone">
              <option value="match">Match existing</option>
              <option value="dramatic">Dramatic</option>
              <option value="humorous">Humorous</option>
              <option value="dark">Dark</option>
              <option value="romantic">Romantic</option>
              <option value="suspenseful">Suspenseful</option>
              <option value="lyrical">Lyrical</option>
            </select>
          </label
