    // Message actions
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const action = e.target.closest('.ai-msg-action');
      if (action) {
        this.emit('ai-message-action', {
          action: action.dataset.action,
          messageId: action.dataset.msgId
        });
      }
    });

    // Suggestion actions
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const suggestBtn = e.target.closest('[data-suggest]');
      if (suggestBtn) {
        this.emit('ai-suggest', {
          type: suggestBtn.dataset.suggest,
          tone: this.el.querySelector('#ai-tone')?.value || 'match',
          length: this.el.querySelector('#ai-length')?.value || 'medium'
        });
      }

      const suggestionAction = e.target.closest('[data-action^="insert-suggestion"], [data-action^="copy-suggestion"], [data-action^="refine-suggestion"]');
      if (suggestionAction) {
        const idx = parseInt(suggestionAction.dataset.index);
        this.emit('ai-suggestion-action', {
          action: suggestionAction.dataset.action,
          index: idx,
          text: this.state.suggestions[idx]?.text || ''
        });
      }
    });

    // Analyze actions
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const analyzeBtn = e.target.closest('[data-analyze]');
      if (analyzeBtn) {
        this.emit('ai-analyze', { type: analyzeBtn.dataset.analyze });
      }
    });

    this.bindTabEvents();
  }

  bindTabEvents() {
    // Chat input handling
    const input = this.$('#ai-input');
    const sendBtn = this.$('#ai-send');

    if (input) {
      this.on(input, 'keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
          e.preventDefault();
          this.sendMessage(input.value.trim());
        }
      });

      // Auto-resize textarea
      this.on(input, 'input', () => {
        input.style.height = 'auto';
        input.style.height = Math.min(input.scrollHeight, 120) + 'px';
      });
    }

    if (sendBtn) {
      this.on(sendBtn, 'click', () => {
        const inp = this.$('#ai-input');
        if (inp) {
          this.sendMessage(inp.value.trim());
        }
      });
    }
  }

  sendMessage(text) {
    if (!text || this.state.isLoading) return;

    const msgId = Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 5);
    this.state.messages.push({
      id: msgId,
      role: 'user',
      content: text,
      timestamp: Date.now()
    });

    const input = this.$('#ai-input');
    if (input) {
      input.value = '';
      input.style.height = 'auto';
    }

    this.state.isLoading = true;
    this.renderMessages();

    this.emit('ai-send', {
      message: text,
      history: this.state.messages
    });
  }

  receiveMessage(content) {
    const msgId = Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 5);
    this.state.messages.push({
      id: msgId,
      role: 'assistant',
      content: content,
      timestamp: Date.now()
    });
    this.state.isLoading = false;
    this.renderMessages();
  }

  renderMessages() {
    const container = this.$('#ai-messages');
    if (!container) return;

    container.innerHTML = this.state.messages.map(msg => this.renderMessage(msg)).join('') +
      (this.state.isLoading ? `
        <div class="ai-message ai-message-assistant">
          <div class="ai-message-avatar">🤖</div>
          <div class="ai-message-content">
            <div class="ai-typing"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      ` : '');

    // Scroll to bottom
    container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
  }

  setSuggestions(suggestions) {
    this.state.suggestions = suggestions;
    this.state.isLoading = false;
    if (this.state.activeTab === 'suggest') {
      const list = this.$('#ai-suggestions');
      if (list) {
        list.innerHTML = suggestions.map((s, i) => `
          <div class="ai-suggestion-card" data-index="${i}">
            <div class="ai-suggestion-text">${this.formatMessageText(s.text)}</div>
            <div class="ai-suggestion-actions">
              <button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" data-action="insert-suggestion" data-index="${i}">Insert</button>
              <button class="btn btn-sm" data-action="copy-suggestion" data-index="${i}">Copy</button>
              <button class="btn btn-sm" data-action="refine-suggestion" data-index="${i}">Refine</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        `).join('');
      }
    }
  }

  setAnalysis(analysis) {
    this.state.analysis = analysis;
    this.state.isLoading = false;
    if (this.state.activeTab === 'analyze') {
      const container = this.$('#ai-analysis');
      if (container) {
        container.innerHTML = `
          <div class="ai-analysis-card

---

  setAnalysis(analysis) {
    this.state.analysis = analysis;
    this.state.isLoading = false;
    if (this.state.activeTab === 'analyze') {
      const container = this.$('#ai-analysis');
      if (container) {
        container.innerHTML = `
          <div class="ai-analysis-card">
            <h4>${analysis.title}</h4>
            ${analysis.score !== undefined ? `
              <div class="ai-analysis-score">
                <div class="ai-score-bar">
                  <div class="ai-score-fill" style="width: ${analysis.score}%"></div>
                </div>
                <span>${analysis.score}/100</span>
              </div>
            ` : ''}
            <div class="ai-analysis-body">${this.formatMessageText(analysis.body)}</div>
            ${analysis.suggestions ? `
              <div class="ai-analysis-suggestions">
                <h5>Suggestions</h5>
                <ul>
                  ${analysis.suggestions.map(s => `<li>${this.formatMessageText(s)}</li>`).join('')}
                </ul>
              </div>
            ` : ''}
          </div>
        `;
      }
    }
  }

  setLoading(loading) {
    this.state.isLoading = loading;
  }

  clearChat() {
    this.state.messages = [];
    this.renderMessages();
  }
}

// src/ui/components/SettingsPanel.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class SettingsPanel extends Component {
  setup() {
    this.state = {
      activeSection: 'editor',
      settings: this.props.settings || {}
    };
  }

  template() {
    const { activeSection } = this.state;

    return `
      <div class="settings-overlay">
        <div class="settings-panel">
          <div class="settings-header">
            <h2>Settings</h2>
            <button class="settings-close-btn" id="settings-close">✕</button>
          </div>
          <div class="settings-body">
            <nav class="settings-nav">
              <button class="settings-nav-item ${activeSection === 'editor' ? 'active' : ''}" data-section="editor">Editor</button>
              <button class="settings-nav-item ${activeSection === 'appearance' ? 'active' : ''}" data-section="appearance">Appearance</button>
              <button class="settings-nav-item ${activeSection === 'writing' ? 'active' : ''}" data-section="writing">Writing</button>
              <button class="settings-nav-item ${activeSection === 'ai' ? 'active' : ''}" data-section="ai">AI</button>
              <button class="settings-nav-item ${activeSection === 'backup' ? 'active' : ''}" data-section="backup">Backup</button>
              <button class="settings-nav-item ${activeSection === 'shortcuts' ? 'active' : ''}" data-section="shortcuts">Shortcuts</button>
              <button class="settings-nav-item ${activeSection === 'about' ? 'active' : ''}" data-section="about">About</button>
            </nav>
            <div class="settings-content" id="settings-content">
              ${this.renderSection(activeSection)}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  renderSection(section) {
    const s = this.state.settings;
    switch (section) {
      case 'editor': return this.renderEditorSettings(s);
      case 'appearance': return this.renderAppearanceSettings(s);
      case 'writing': return this.renderWritingSettings(s);
      case 'ai': return this.renderAISettings(s);
      case 'backup': return this.renderBackupSettings(s);
      case 'shortcuts': return this.renderShortcutsSettings();
      case 'about': return this.renderAbout();
      default: return '';
    }
  }

  renderEditorSettings(s) {
    return `
      <div class="settings-section">
        <h3>Editor Settings</h3>
        <label class="settings-label">
          <span>Font Family</span>
          <select class="settings-input" data-setting="editor.fontFamily">
            <option value="Georgia, serif" ${s.editor?.fontFamily === 'Georgia, serif' ? 'selected' : ''}>Georgia</option>
            <option value="'Times New Roman', serif" ${s.editor?.fontFamily === "'Times New Roman', serif" ? 'selected' : ''}>Times New Roman</option>
            <option value="'Palatino Linotype', serif" ${s.editor?.fontFamily === "'Palatino Linotype', serif" ? 'selected' : ''}>Palatino</option>
            <option value="'Courier New', monospace" ${s.editor?.fontFamily === "'Courier New', monospace" ? 'selected' : ''}>Courier New</option>
            <option value="'Merriweather', serif" ${s.editor?.fontFamily === "'Merriweather', serif" ? 'selected' : ''}>Merriweather</option>
            <option value="'Lora', serif" ${s.editor?.fontFamily === "'Lora', serif" ? 'selected' : ''}>Lora</option>
            <option value="system-ui, sans-serif" ${s.editor?.fontFamily === 'system-ui, sans-serif' ? 'selected' : ''}>System UI</option>
          </select>
        </label>
        <label class="settings-label">
          <span>Font Size</span>
          <div class="settings-range-wrapper">
            <input type="range" class="settings-range

              <option value="5" ${s.backup?.maxVersions === 5 ? 'selected' : ''}>5 versions</option>
              <option value="10" ${(s.backup?.maxVersions || 10) === 10 ? 'selected' : ''}>10 versions</option>
              <option value="25" ${s.backup?.maxVersions === 25 ? 'selected' : ''}>25 versions</option>
              <option value="50" ${s.backup?.maxVersions === 50 ? 'selected' : ''}>50 versions</option>
            </select>
          </label>
        </div>
        <div class="settings-group settings-danger">
          <h4>Danger Zone</h4>
          <p class="settings-hint">These actions cannot be undone.</p>
          <div class="settings-actions">
            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" data-action="clear-all-data">Clear All Data</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  renderShortcutsSettings() {
    const shortcuts = [
      { keys: 'Ctrl/⌘ + S', action: 'Save' },
      { keys: 'Ctrl/⌘ + B', action: 'Bold' },
      { keys: 'Ctrl/⌘ + I', action: 'Italic' },
      { keys: 'Ctrl/⌘ + Z', action: 'Undo' },

      { keys: 'Ctrl/⌘ + ,', action: 'Open Settings' },
      { keys: 'Ctrl/⌘ + N', action: 'New Chapter' },
      { keys: 'Ctrl/⌘ + Shift + N', action: 'New Project' },
      { keys: 'Ctrl/⌘ + F', action: 'Find & Replace' },
      { keys: 'Ctrl/⌘ + Enter', action: 'Insert Scene Break' },
      { keys: 'F11', action: 'Toggle Fullscreen' },
      { keys: 'Escape', action: 'Close Panel / Exit Focus Mode' },
      { keys: 'Ctrl/⌘ + 1', action: 'Heading 1' },
      { keys: 'Ctrl/⌘ + 2', action: 'Heading 2' },
      { keys: 'Ctrl/⌘ + 3', action: 'Heading 3' },
    ];

          <div class="about-features">
            <h4>Features</h4>
            <ul>
              <li>Rich text editing with formatting toolbar</li>

              <li>AI-powered writing assistance</li>
              <li>Multiple themes and customization</li>
              <li>Focus and typewriter modes</li>
              <li>Word count tracking and goals</li>
              <li>Auto-save and version history</li>
              <li>Export to multiple formats</li>
              <li>Fully offline — your data stays on your device</li>
            </ul>
          </div>
          <p class="about-credits">Made with ❤️ for writers everywhere.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;

  afterMount() {
    // Section navigation
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const navItem = e.target.closest('.settings-nav-item');
      if (navItem) {
        this.state.activeSection = navItem.dataset.section;
        this.el.querySelectorAll('.settings-nav-item').forEach(n => n.classList.remove('active'));
        navItem.classList.add('active');
        const content = this.$('#settings-content');
        if (content) {
          content.innerHTML = this.renderSection(this.state.activeSection);
          this.bindSectionEvents();
        }
      }
    });

    // Close button
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.id === 'settings-close' || e.target.classList.contains('settings-overlay')) {
        this.emit('settings-close');
      }
    });

    // Escape key
    this.on(document, 'keydown', (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        this.emit('settings-close');
      }
    });

    this.bindSectionEvents();
  }

  bindSectionEvents() {
    // Range inputs — update display value
    this.el.querySelectorAll('.settings-range').forEach(range => {
      this.on(range, 'input', () => {
        const display = range.parentElement.querySelector('.settings-range-value');
        if (display) {
          const setting = range.dataset.setting;
          let suffix = '';
          if (setting.includes('fontSize') || setting.includes('maxWidth')) suffix = 'px';
          if (setting.includes('paragraphSpacing')) suffix = 'em';
          display.textContent = range.value + suffix;
        }
      });

      this.on(range, 'change', () => {
        this.handleSettingChange(range.dataset.setting, parseFloat(range.value));
      });
    });

    // Select inputs
    this.el.querySelectorAll('select.settings-input').forEach(select => {
      this.on(select, 'change', () => {
        let val = select.value;
        // Try to parse as number
        if (!isNaN(val) && val !== '') val = parseFloat(val);
        this.handleSettingChange(select.dataset.setting, val);

        // Re-render section if AI provider changed
        if (select.dataset.setting === 'ai.provider') {
          const content = this.$('#settings-content');
          if (content) {
            content.innerHTML = this.renderSection(this.state.activeSection);
            this.bindSectionEvents();
          }
        }
      });
    });

    // Text/number inputs
    this.el.querySelectorAll('input.settings-input[type="text"], input.settings-input[type="number"], input.settings-input[type="password"]').forEach(input => {
      this.on(input, 'change', () => {
        let val = input.value;
        if (input.type === 'number') val = parseFloat(val);
        this.handleSettingChange(input.dataset.setting, val);
      });
    });

    // Checkbox toggles
    this.el.querySelectorAll('.settings-checkbox').forEach(cb => {
      this.on(cb, 'change', () => {
        this.handleSettingChange(cb.dataset.setting, cb.checked);
      });
    });

    // Color inputs
    this.el.querySelectorAll('.settings-color').forEach(color => {
      this.on(color, 'change', () => {
        this.handleSettingChange(color.dataset.setting, color.value);
      });
    });

    // Theme buttons
    this.el.querySelectorAll('.settings-theme-btn').forEach(btn => {
      this.on(btn, 'click', () => {
        this.el.querySelectorAll('.settings-theme-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
        btn.classList.add('active');
        this.handle

      });
    });

    // Action buttons
    this.el.querySelectorAll('[data-action]').forEach(btn => {

  handleSettingChange(path, value) {
    // Update nested setting in state
    const parts = path.split('.');
    let obj = this.state.settings;
    for (let i = 0; i < parts.length - 1; i++) {
      if (!obj[parts[i]]) obj[parts[i]] = {};
      obj = obj[parts[i]];
    }
    obj[parts[parts.length - 1]] = value;

    this.emit('setting-changed', { path, value, settings: this.state.settings });
  }

  updateSettings(settings) {
    this.state.settings = settings;
  }

  showTestResult(success, message) {
    const result = this.$('#ai-test-result');
    if (result) {
      result.className = success ? 'test-success' : 'test-error';
      result.textContent = message;
    }
  }
}

// src/ui/components/FindReplace.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class FindReplace extends Component {
  setup() {
    this.state = {
      findText: '',
      replaceText: '',
      matchCase: false,
      wholeWord: false,
      useRegex: false,
      showReplace: false,
      matchCount: 0,
      currentMatch: 0
    };
  }

  template() {
    const { findText, replaceText, matchCase, wholeWord, useRegex, showReplace, matchCount, currentMatch } = this.state;
    return `
      <div class="find-replace-bar">
        <div class="find-row">
          <div class="find-input-wrapper">
            <input type="text" class="find-input" id="find-input" placeholder="Find..."
                   value="${this.escapeAttr(findText)}" autofocus>
            <span class="find-count">${matchCount > 0 ? `${currentMatch}/${matchCount}` : 'No results'}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="find-options">
            <button class="find-option-btn ${matchCase ? 'active' : ''}" id="find-case" title="Match Case">Aa</button>
            <button class="find-option-btn ${wholeWord ? 'active' : ''}" id="find-whole" title="Whole Word">W</button>
            <button class="find-option-btn ${useRegex ? 'active' : ''}" id="find-regex" title="Use Regex">.*</button>
          </div>
          <div class="find-actions">
            <button class="find-btn" id="find-prev" title="Previous Match">↑</button>
            <button class="find-btn" id="find-next" title="Next Match">↓</button>
            <button class="find-btn" id="find-toggle-replace" title="Toggle Replace">${showReplace ? '▼' : '▶'}</button>
            <button class="find-btn find-close-btn" id="find-close" title="Close">✕</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        ${showReplace ? `
          <div class="replace-row">
            <div class="find-input-wrapper">
              <input type="text" class="find-input" id="replace-input" placeholder="Replace..."
                     value="${this.escapeAttr(replaceText)}">
            </div>
            <div class="replace-actions">
              <button class="find-btn" id="replace-one" title="Replace">Replace</button>
              <button class="find-btn" id="replace-all" title="Replace All">All</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ` : ''}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  escapeAttr(str) {
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;');
  }

  afterMount() {
    const findInput = this.$('#find-input');

    this.on(findInput, 'input', (e) => {
      this.state.findText = e.target.value;
      this.emit('find', this.getSearchParams());
    });

    this.on(findInput, 'keydown', (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Enter') {
        if (e.shiftKey) {
          this.emit('find-prev', this.getSearchParams());
        } else {
          this.emit('find-next', this.getSearchParams());
        }
        e.preventDefault();
      }
      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        this.emit('find-close');
      }
    });

    const replaceInput = this.$('#replace-input');
    if (replaceInput) {
      this.on(replaceInput, 'input', (e) => {
        this.state.replaceText = e.target.value;
      });

      this.on(replaceInput, 'keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
          this

---

## [2026-05-07 16:09:41] Run
**USER:** Continue from where you left off.

**AI:**


<thinking>
Continuing from the FindReplace component's afterMount method.

```js
          this.emit('replace-one', this.getSearchParams());
          e.preventDefault();
        }
        if (e.key === 'Escape') {
          this.emit('find-close');
        }
      });
    }

    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const id = e.target.id;
      switch (id) {
        case 'find-prev':
          this.emit('find-prev', this.getSearchParams());
          break;
        case 'find-next':
          this.emit('find-next', this.getSearchParams());
          break;
        case 'find-case':
          this.state.matchCase = !this.state.matchCase;
          e.target.classList.toggle('active');
          this.emit('find', this.getSearchParams());
          break;
        case 'find-whole':
          this.state.wholeWord = !this.state.wholeWord;
          e.target.classList.toggle('active');
          this.emit('find', this.getSearchParams());
          break;
        case 'find-regex':
          this.state.useRegex = !this.state.useRegex;
          e.target.classList.toggle('active');
          this.emit('find', this.getSearchParams());
          break;
        case 'find-toggle-replace':
          this.state.showReplace = !this.state.showReplace;
          this.render();
          break;
        case 'find-close':
          this.emit('find-close');
          break;
        case 'replace-one':
          this.emit('replace-one', this.getSearchParams());
          break;
        case 'replace-all':
          this.emit('replace-all', this.getSearchParams());
          break;
      }
    });

    // Focus the find input
    findInput.focus();
    findInput.select();
  }

  getSearchParams() {
    return {
      findText: this.state.findText,
      replaceText: this.state.replaceText,
      matchCase: this.state.matchCase,
      wholeWord: this.state.wholeWord,
      useRegex: this.state.useRegex
    };
  }

  updateMatchInfo(current, total) {
    this.state.currentMatch = current;
    this.state.matchCount = total;
    const countEl = this.el.querySelector('.find-count');
    if (countEl) {
      countEl.textContent = total > 0 ? `${current}/${total}` : 'No results';
    }
  }

  focus() {
    const input = this.$('#find-input');
    if (input) {
      input.focus();
      input.select();
    }
  }
}

      loading: false,
      mode: 'chat', // 'chat', 'suggest', 'edit'

        { id: 'continue', label: 'Continue writing', icon: '✍️' },
        { id: 'rephrase', label: 'Rephrase selection', icon: '🔄' },
        { id: 'expand', label: 'Expand this scene', icon: '📖' },
        { id: 'dialogue', label: 'Improve dialogue', icon: '💬' },
        { id: 'describe', label: 'Add description', icon: '🎨' },
        { id: 'summarize', label: 'Summarize', icon: '📋' },
        { id: 'brainstorm', label: 'Brainstorm ideas', icon: '💡' },
        { id: 'character', label: 'Develop character', icon: '👤' },
        { id: 'plot', label: 'Plot suggestions', icon: '🗺️' },
        { id: 'consistency', label: 'Check consistency', icon: '🔍' },
      ]
    };
  }

  template() {
    if (!this.state.visible) return '<div class="ai-panel hidden"></div>';

    return `
      <div class="ai-panel">
        <div class="ai-panel-header">
          <h3>AI Assistant</h3>
          <div class="ai-panel-tabs">
            <button class="ai-tab ${this.state.mode === 'chat' ? 'active' : ''}" data-mode="chat">Chat</button>
            <button class="ai-tab ${this.state.mode === 'suggest' ? 'active' : ''}" data-mode="suggest">Suggest</button>
            <button class="ai-tab ${this.state.mode === 'edit' ? 'active' : ''}" data-mode="edit">Edit</button>
          </div>
          <button class="ai-close-btn" id="ai-close">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div class="ai-panel-body">
          ${this.renderMode()}
        </div>
        <div class="ai-panel-input">
          <textarea class="ai-input" id="ai-input" placeholder="${this.getPlaceholder()}"
                    rows="3">${this.state.inputText}</textarea>
          <div class="ai-input-actions">
            <span class="ai-input-hint">Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline</span>
            <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" id="ai-send" ${this.state.loading ? 'disabled' : ''}>
              ${this.state.loading ? '⏳ Thinking...' : '→ Send'}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div

  getPlaceholder() {
    switch (this.state.mode) {
      case 'chat': return 'Ask anything about your story...';
      case 'suggest': return 'Describe what you need suggestions for...';
      case 'edit': return 'Describe how to edit the selected text...';
      default: return 'Type a message...';
    }
  }

  renderMode() {
    switch (this.state.mode) {
      case 'chat': return this.renderChat();
      case 'suggest': return this.renderSuggest();
      case 'edit': return this.renderEdit();
      default: return this.renderChat();
    }
  }

  renderChat() {
    if (this.state.messages.length === 0) {
      return `
        <div class="ai-welcome">
          <p>I'm your writing assistant. I can help with:</p>
          <div class="ai-quick-actions">
            ${this.state.quickActions.map(a => `
              <button class="ai-quick-btn" data-action="${a.id}">
                <span class="ai-quick-icon">${a.icon}</span>
                <span class="ai-quick-label">${a.label}</span>
              </button>
            `).join('')}
          </div>
        </div>
      `;
    }

    return `
      <div class="ai-messages" id="ai-messages">
        ${this.state.messages.map(m => `
          <div class="ai-message ai-message-${m.role}">

            <div class="ai-message-content">
              <div class="ai-message-text">${this.formatMessage(m.content)}</div>

                <div class="ai-message-actions">

                  <button class="ai-msg-action" data-msg-action="insert" data-msg-index="${m.index}">📝 Insert</button>

              <div class="ai-typing-indicator">
                <span></span><span></span><span></span>

          `).join('')}

          <div class="ai-edit-results">
            ${this.state.messages.filter(m => m.role === 'assistant').map(m => `
              <div class="ai

-edit-card">
                <div class="ai-edit-text">${this.formatMessage(m.content)}</div>
                <div class="ai-message-actions">
                  <button class="ai-msg-action" data-msg-action="copy" data-msg-index="${m.index}">📋 Copy</button>
                  <button class="ai-msg-action" data-msg-action="replace" data-msg-index="${m.index}">🔄 Apply Edit</button>
                </div>
              </div>
            `).join('')}
          </div>
        ` : ''}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  formatMessage(content) {
    // Basic markdown-like formatting
    return content
      .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
      .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
      .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
      .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
      .replace(/\*(.*?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')
      .replace(/`(.*?)`/g, '<code>$1</code>')
      .replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
  }

  afterMount() {
    if (!this.state.visible) return;

    // Tab switching
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const tab = e.target.closest('.ai-tab');
      if (tab) {
        this.state.mode = tab.dataset.mode;
        this.render();
        return;
      }

      // Quick actions
      const quickBtn = e.target.closest('.ai-quick-btn');
      if (quickBtn) {
        this.emit('ai-quick-action', { action: quickBtn.dataset.action });
        return;
      }

      // Message actions
      const msgAction = e.target.closest('.ai-msg-action');
      if (msgAction) {
        const action = msgAction.dataset.msgAction;
        const index = parseInt(msgAction.dataset.msgIndex);
        const message = this.state.messages.find(m => m.index === index);
        if (message) {
          this.emit('ai-message-action', { action, content: message.content });
        }
        return;
      }

      // Close
      if (e.target.id === 'ai-close') {
        this.toggle(false);
        this.emit('ai-panel-close');
        return;
      }

      // Send
      if (e.target.id === 'ai-send' || e.target.closest('#ai-send')) {
        this.sendMessage();
        return;
      }
    });

    // Input handling
    const input = this.$('#ai-input');
    if (input) {
      this.on(input, 'keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
          e.preventDefault();
          this.sendMessage();
        }
      });

      this.on(input, 'input', (e) => {
        this.state.inputText = e.target.value;
      });
    }

    // Scroll messages to bottom
    this.scrollToBottom();
  }

  sendMessage() {
    const text = this.state.inputText.trim();
    if (!text || this.state.loading) return;

    const msgIndex = this.state.messages.length;
    this.state.messages.push({
      role: 'user',
      content: text,
      index: msgIndex
    });
    this.state.inputText = '';
    this.state.loading = true;
    this.render();

    this.emit('ai-send', {
      message: text,
      mode: this.state.mode,
      history: this.state.messages
    });
  }

  receiveMessage(content) {
    const msgIndex = this.state.messages.length;
    this.state.messages.push({
      role: 'assistant',
      content: content,
      index: msgIndex
    });
    this.state.loading = false;
    this.render();
  }

  setLoading(loading) {
    this.state.loading = loading;
    this.render();
  }

  setError(error) {
    this.state.loading = false;
    const msgIndex = this.state.messages.length;
    this.state.messages.push({
      role: 'assistant',
      content: `⚠️ Error: ${error}`,
      index: msgIndex
    });
    this.render();
  }

  clearMessages() {
    this.state.messages = [];
    this.render();
  }

  toggle(visible) {
    this.state.visible = visible !== undefined ? visible : !this.state.visible;
    this.render();
  }

  scrollToBottom() {
    const messages = this.$('#ai-messages');
    if (messages) {
      messages.scrollTop = messages.scrollHeight;
    }
  }
}
```

// src/ui/components/StatusBar.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class StatusBar extends Component {
  setup() {
    this.state = {
      wordCount: 0,
      charCount: 0,
      paragraphCount: 0,
      readingTime: '0 min',
      wordGoal: 0,
      wordGoalProgress: 0,
      saveStatus: 'saved', // 'saved', 'saving', 'unsaved', 'error'
      lastSaved: null,
      cursorPosition: { line: 1, col: 1 },
      selectedCount: 0,
      focusMode: false,
      typewriterMode: false
    };
  }

  template() {
    const s = this.state;
    const goalHtml = s.wordGoal

```js
    const goalHtml = s.wordGoal > 0 ? `
      <div class="status-item status-goal">
        <div class="status-goal-bar">
          <div class="status-goal-fill" style="width: ${Math.min(s.wordGoalProgress, 100)}%"></div>
        </div>
        <span>${s.wordCount}/${s.wordGoal} (${Math.round(s.wordGoalProgress)}%)</span>
      </div>
    ` : '';

    const saveIcon = {
      saved: '✓',
      saving: '⏳',
      unsaved: '●',
      error: '⚠️'
    }[s.saveStatus] || '✓';

    const saveText = {
      saved: s.lastSaved ? `Saved ${this.timeAgo(s.lastSaved)}` : 'Saved',
      saving: 'Saving...',
      unsaved: 'Unsaved changes',
      error: 'Save error'
    }[s.saveStatus] || 'Saved';

    return `
      <div class="status-bar">
        <div class="status-left">
          <div class="status-item status-save status-${s.saveStatus}" title="${saveText}">
            <span class="status-icon">${saveIcon}</span>
            <span class="status-text">${saveText}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="status-center">
          ${goalHtml}
        </div>
        <div class="status-right">
          ${s.selectedCount > 0 ? `
            <div class="status-item" title="Selected">
              <span>${s.selectedCount} selected</span>
            </div>
          ` : ''}
          <div class="status-item" title="Words">
            <span>${this.formatNumber(s.wordCount)} words</span>
          </div>
          <div class="status-item" title="Characters">
            <span>${this.formatNumber(s.charCount)} chars</span>
          </div>
          <div class="status-item" title="Reading time">
            <span>~${s.readingTime} read</span>
          </div>
          <div class="status-item status-cursor" title="Cursor position">
            <span>Ln ${s.cursorPosition.line}, Col ${s.cursorPosition.col}</span>
          </div>
          ${s.focusMode ? '<div class="status-item status-mode" title="Focus Mode">🎯</div>' : ''}
          ${s.typewriterMode ? '<div class="status-item status-mode" title="Typewriter Mode">⌨️</div>' : ''}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  formatNumber(n) {
    if (n >= 1000) return (n / 1000).toFixed(1).replace(/\.0$/, '') + 'k';
    return n.toString();
  }

  timeAgo(date) {
    if (!date) return '';
    const seconds = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(date).getTime()) / 1000);
    if (seconds < 5) return 'just now';
    if (seconds < 60) return `${seconds}s ago`;
    const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
    if (minutes < 60) return `${minutes}m ago`;
    const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);
    return `${hours}h ago`;
  }

  updateStats(stats) {
    Object.assign(this.state, stats);
    this.render();
  }

  setSaveStatus(status, lastSaved) {
    this.state.saveStatus = status;
    if (lastSaved) this.state.lastSaved = lastSaved;
    this.render();
  }

  setCursorPosition(line, col) {
    this.state.cursorPosition = { line, col };
    const el = this.el.querySelector('.status-cursor span');
    if (el) el.textContent = `Ln ${line}, Col ${col}`;
  }

  setSelectedCount(count) {
    if (this.state.selectedCount !== count) {
      this.state.selectedCount = count;
      this.render();
    }
  }

  afterMount() {
    // Periodically update "time ago" for save status
    this._timeInterval = setInterval(() => {
      if (this.state.saveStatus === 'saved' && this.state.lastSaved) {
        const el = this.el.querySelector('.status-save .status-text');
        if (el) el.textContent = `Saved ${this.timeAgo(this.state.lastSaved)}`;
      }
    }, 30000);
  }

  destroy() {
    clearInterval(this._timeInterval);
    super.destroy();
  }
}

        ]
      },
      {

        items: [

          { type: 'button', id: 'ordered-list', icon: '1.', title: 'Numbered List', format: 'insertOrderedList' },
        ]
      },
      {
        name: 'align',
        items: [
          { type: 'button', id: 'align-left', icon: '≡', title: 'Align Left', format: 'justifyLeft' },
          { type: 'button', id: 'align-center', icon: '≡', title: 'Align Center', format: 'justifyCenter' },
          { type: 'button', id: 'align-right', icon: '≡', title: 'Align Right', format: 'justifyRight' },
        ]
      },
      {
        name: 'insert',
        items: [
          { type: 'button', id: 'insert-link', icon: '🔗', title: 'Insert Link' },
          { type: 'button', id: 'insert-hr', icon: '—', title: 'Horizontal Rule' },
          { type: 'button', id: 'insert-note', icon: '📌', title: 'Insert Note' },
        ]
      },
      {
        name: 'history',
        items: [
          { type: 'button', id: 'undo', icon: '↩', title: 'Undo (Ctrl+Z)' },
          { type: 'button', id: 'redo', icon: '↪', title: 'Redo (Ctrl+Y)' },
        ]
      }
    ];

    return `
      <div class="toolbar">
        ${groups.map(group => `
          <div class="toolbar-group toolbar-group-${group.name}">
            ${group.items.map(item => {
              if (item.type === 'select') {
                return `
                  <select class="toolbar-select" id="toolbar-${item.id}">
                    ${item.options.map(opt => `
                      <option value="${opt.value}" ${this.state.currentBlock === opt.value ? 'selected' : ''}>
                        ${opt.label}
                      </option>
                    `).join('')}
                  </select>
                `;
              }
              const active = item.format && af.has(item.format) ? 'active' : '';
              return `
                <button class="toolbar-btn ${active} ${item.className || ''}"
                        id="toolbar-${item.id}"
                        title="${item.title}"
                        data-format="${item.format || ''}"
                        data-action="${item.id}">
                  ${item.icon}
                </button>
              `;
            }).join('')}
          </div>
        `).join('')}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  afterMount() {
    // Button clicks
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const btn = e.target.closest('.toolbar-btn');
      if (!btn) return;

      e.preventDefault();
      const action = btn.dataset.action;
      const format = btn.dataset.format;

      if (format) {
        this.emit('toolbar-format', { format, action });
      } else {
        this.emit('toolbar-action', { action });
      }
    });

    // Block type select
    const blockSelect = this.$('#toolbar-block-type');
    if (blockSelect) {
      this.on(blockSelect, 'change', (e) => {
        this.emit('toolbar-block', { block: e.target.value });
      });
    }
  }

  updateActiveFormats(formats) {
    this.state.activeFormats = new Set(formats);
    // Update button states without full re-render
    this.el.querySelectorAll('.toolbar-btn[data-format]').forEach(btn => {
      const format = btn.dataset.format;
      btn.classList.toggle('active', this.state.activeFormats.has(format));
    });
  }

  updateBlockType(block) {
    this.state.currentBlock = block;
    const select = this.$('#toolbar-block-type');
    if (select) select.value = block;
  }
}

    this._saveTimeout = null;
    this._statsTimeout = null;
    this._composing = false;
  }

  template() {
    const focusClass = this.state.focusMode ? 'focus-mode' : '';
    const typewriterClass = this.state.typewriterMode ? 'typewriter-mode' : '';
    const readOnlyAttr = this.state.readOnly ? 'contenteditable="false"' : 'contenteditable="true"';

    return `
      <div class="editor-wrapper ${focusClass} ${typewriterClass}">
        <div class="editor-container">
          <div class="editor-content"
               id="editor-content"
               ${readOnlyAttr}
               spellcheck="true"
               data-placeholder="${this.state.placeholder}"
               role="textbox"
               aria-multiline="true"
               aria-label="Document editor">${this.state.content}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  afterMount() {
    this.editorEl = this.$('#editor-content');
    if (!this.editorEl) return;

    // Input events
    this.on(this.editorEl, 'input', (e) => {
      if (this._composing) return;
      this.handleInput(e);
    });

    this.on(this.editorEl, 'compositionstart', () => {
      this._composing = true;
    });

    this.on(this.editorEl, 'compositionend', (e) => {
      this._composing = false;
      this.handleInput(e);
    });

    // Selection change
    this.on(document, 'selectionchange', () => {
      if (!this.editorEl.contains(document.activeElement) &&
          !this.editorEl.contains(window.getSelection()?.anchorNode)) return;
      this.handleSelectionChange();
    });

    // Keyboard shortcuts
    this.on(this.editorEl, 'keydown', (e) => {
      this.handleKeydown(e);
    });

    // Paste handling
    this.on(this.editorEl, 'paste', (e) => {
      this.handlePaste(e);
    });

    // Drop handling
    this.on(this.editorEl, 'drop', (e) => {
      this.handleDrop(e);
    });

    // Focus/blur
    this.on(this.editorEl, 'focus', () => {
      this.emit('editor-focus');
    });

    this.on(this.editorEl, 'blur', () => {
      this.emit('editor-blur');
    });

    // Initialize undo with current content
    this._lastContent = this.editorEl.innerHTML;
    this.pushUndo();
  }

  handleInput(e) {
    const content = this.editorEl.innerHTML;

    // Debounced undo snapshot
    clearTimeout(this._undoTimeout);
    this._undoTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
      this.pushUndo();
    }, 500);

    // Debounced save
    clearTimeout(this._saveTimeout);
    this._saveTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
      this.emit('editor-change', { content, chapterId: this.state.chapterId });
    }, 1000);

    // Debounced stats update
    clearTimeout(this._statsTimeout);
    this._statsTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
      this.emitStats();
    }, 300);

    // Mark as unsaved immediately
    this.emit('editor-dirty');
  }

  handleSelectionChange() {
    const sel = window.getSelection();
    if (!sel || sel.rangeCount === 0) return;

    const range = sel.getRangeAt(0);
    if (!this.editorEl.contains(range.commonAncestorContainer)) return;

    // Get active formats
    const formats = this.getActiveFormats();
    this.emit('editor-selection', {
      formats,
      collapsed: sel.isCollapsed,
      selectedText: sel.toString(),
      selectedCount: sel.toString().length
    });

    // Get cursor position
    const pos = this.getCursorPosition();
    this.emit('editor-cursor', pos);

    // Focus mode: dim non-active paragraphs
    if (this.state.focusMode) {
      this.updateFocusMode(range);
    }

    // Typewriter mode: scroll to cursor
    if (this.state.typewriterMode) {
      this.scrollToCursor();
    }
  }

  handleKeydown(e) {
    // Ctrl/Cmd shortcuts
    const mod = e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey;

    if (mod) {
      switch (e.key.toLowerCase()) {
        case 'b':
          e.preventDefault();
          this.execFormat('bold');
          return;
        case 'i':
          e.preventDefault();
          this.execFormat('italic');
          return;
        case 'u':
          e.preventDefault();
          this.execFormat('underline');
          return;
        case 'z':

            this.redo();

            this.undo();

          return;
        case 'y':
          e.preventDefault();
          this.redo();
          return;
        case 's':
          e.preventDefault();
          this.emit('editor-save', { content: this.editorEl.innerHTML, chapterId: this.state.chapterId });
          return;
      }
    }

    // Tab handling

      e.preventDefault();
      if (e.shiftKey) {
        this.emit('toolbar-action', { action: 'outdent' });
      } else {
        // Insert tab or indent list

        document.execCommand('insertHTML', false, '&emsp;');
      }
      return;
    }

    // Enter handling for special blocks
    if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
      const block = this.getCurrentBlock();
      if (block && block.tagName === 'BLOCKQUOTE') {
        // Double enter exits blockquote
        const text = block.textContent;
        if (text.endsWith('\n') || text === '') {
          e.preventDefault();
          const p = document.createElement('p');
          p.innerHTML = '<br>';
          block.parentNode.insertBefore(p, block.nextSibling);
          this.setCursorTo(p);
          return;
        }
      }
    }

    // Shift+Enter for soft line break
    if (e.key === 'Enter' && e.shiftKey) {
      e.preventDefault();
      document.execCommand('insertLineBreak');
      return;
    }
  }

  handlePaste(e) {
    e.preventDefault();

    // Get plain text or HTML
    const html = e.clipboardData.getData('text/html');
    const text = e.clipboardData.getData('text/plain');

    if (html) {
      // Clean HTML - strip unwanted tags and styles
      const cleaned = this.cleanPastedHTML(html);
      document.execCommand('insertHTML', false, cleaned);
    } else if (text) {
      // Convert plain text to paragraphs
      const paragraphs = text.split(/\n\n+/).map(p => {
        const lines = p.split(/\n/).join('<br>');
        return `<p>${lines}</p>`;
      }).join('');
      document.execCommand('insertHTML', false, paragraphs || text);
    }

    this.handleInput();
  }

  cleanPastedHTML(html) {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.innerHTML = html;

    // Remove script, style, meta tags
    div.querySelectorAll('script, style, meta, link, head, title').forEach(el => el.remove());

    // Remove all style attributes and classes
    div.querySelectorAll('*').forEach(el => {
      el.removeAttribute('style');
      el.removeAttribute('class');
      el.removeAttribute('id');

      // Convert unsupported tags to spans or paragraphs
      const tag = el.tagName.toLowerCase();
      const allowed = ['p', 'br', 'strong', 'b', 'em', 'i', 'u', 's', 'del',
                        'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6',
                        'blockquote', 'ul', 'ol', 'li', 'a', 'hr'];
      if (!allowed.includes(tag)) {
        // Replace with span or unwrap
        const span = document.createElement('span');
        span.innerHTML = el.innerHTML;
        el.replaceWith(span);
      }
    });

    // Convert b to strong, i to em
    div.querySelectorAll('b').forEach(el => {
      const strong = document.createElement('strong');
      strong.innerHTML = el.innerHTML;
      el.replaceWith(strong);
    });
    div.querySelectorAll('i').forEach(el => {
      const em = document.createElement('em');
      em.innerHTML = el.innerHTML;
      el.replaceWith(em);
    });

    return div.innerHTML;
  }

  handleDrop(e) {
    // Only allow text drops
    if (!e.dataTransfer.types.includes('text/plain')) {
      e.preventDefault();
    }
  }

  // Formatting
  execFormat(command, value) {
    this.editorEl.focus();
    document.execCommand(command, false, value || null);
    this.handleInput();
    this.handleSelectionChange();
  }

  formatBlock(tag) {
    this.editorEl.focus();
    document.execCommand('formatBlock', false, `<${tag}>`);
    this.handleInput();
    this.handleSelectionChange();
  }

  getActiveFormats() {
    const formats = [];
    try {
      if (document.queryCommandState('bold')) formats.push('bold');
      if (document.queryCommandState('italic')) formats.push('italic');
      if (document.queryCommandState('underline')) formats.push('underline');
      if (document.queryCommandState('strikethrough')) formats.push('strikethrough');
      if (document.queryCommandState('insertUnorderedList')) formats.push('insertUnorderedList');
      if (document.queryCommandState('insertOrderedList')) formats.push('insertOrderedList');
      if (document.queryCommandState('justifyLeft')) formats.push('justifyLeft');
      if (document.queryCommandState('justifyCenter')) formats.push('justifyCenter');
      if (document.queryCommandState('justifyRight')) formats.push('justifyRight');
    } catch (e) {
      // queryCommandState can throw in some browsers
    }

    // Check block type
    const block = this.getCurrentBlock();
    if (block) {
      const tag = block.tagName.toLowerCase();
      if (['h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'blockquote'].includes(tag)) {
        formats.push(tag);
      }
    }

    return formats;
  }

  getCurrentBlock() {
    const sel = window.getSelection();
    if (!sel || sel.rangeCount === 0) return null;

    let node = sel.anchorNode;
    while (node && node !== this.editorEl) {
      if (node.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE) {
        const tag = node.tagName.toLowerCase();
        if (['p', 'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 

---

## [2026-05-07 17:57:22] Run
**USER:** Continue from where you left off.

```js
'h4', 'h5', 'h6', 'blockquote', 'li', 'ul', 'ol', 'div'].includes(tag)) {
          return node;
        }
      }
      node = node.parentNode;
    }
    return null;
  }

  getCursorPosition() {
    const sel = window.getSelection();
    if (!sel || sel.rangeCount === 0) return { line: 1, col: 1 };

    const range = sel.getRangeAt(0);
    const preRange = document.createRange();
    preRange.selectNodeContents(this.editorEl);
    preRange.setEnd(range.startContainer, range.startOffset);
    const textBefore = preRange.toString();

    const lines = textBefore.split('\n');
    return {
      line: lines.length,
      col: lines[lines.length - 1].length + 1
    };
  }

  setCursorTo(element) {
    const sel = window.getSelection();
    const range = document.createRange();
    range.selectNodeContents(element);
    range.collapse(true);
    sel.removeAllRanges();
    sel.addRange(range);
  }

  // Undo/Redo
  pushUndo() {
    const content = this.editorEl.innerHTML;
    if (content === this._lastContent) return;

    this._undoStack.push({
      content: this._lastContent,
      selection: this.saveSelection()
    });

    // Limit stack size
    if (this._undoStack.length > 100) {
      this._undoStack.shift();
    }

    this._redoStack = [];
    this._lastContent = content;
  }

  undo() {
    if (this._undoStack.length === 0) return;

    const current = {
      content: this.editorEl.innerHTML,
      selection: this.saveSelection()
    };
    this._redoStack.push(current);

    const prev = this._undoStack.pop();
    this.editorEl.innerHTML = prev.content;
    this._lastContent = prev.content;
    this.restoreSelection(prev.selection);
    this.handleInput();
  }

  redo() {
    if (this._redoStack.length === 0) return;

    const current = {
      content: this.editorEl.innerHTML,
      selection: this.saveSelection()
    };
    this._undoStack.push(current);

    const next = this._redoStack.pop();
    this.editorEl.innerHTML = next.content;
    this._lastContent = next.content;
    this.restoreSelection(next.selection);
    this.handleInput();
  }

  saveSelection() {
    const sel = window.getSelection();
    if (!sel || sel.rangeCount === 0) return null;

    const range = sel.getRangeAt(0);
    const preRange = document.createRange();
    preRange.selectNodeContents(this.editorEl);
    preRange.setEnd(range.startContainer, range.startOffset);
    const start = preRange.toString().length;

    preRange.setEnd(range.endContainer, range.endOffset);
    const end = preRange.toString().length;

    return { start, end };
  }

  restoreSelection(saved) {
    if (!saved) return;

    const sel = window.getSelection();
    const range = document.createRange();

    let charIndex = 0;
    let startNode = null, startOffset = 0;
    let endNode = null, endOffset = 0;

    const walker = document.createTreeWalker(
      this.editorEl,
      NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,
      null,
      false
    );

    let node;
    while (node = walker.nextNode()) {
      const nextIndex = charIndex + node.length;

      if (!startNode && saved.start >= charIndex && saved.start <= nextIndex) {
        startNode = node;
        startOffset = saved.start - charIndex;
      }

      if (!endNode && saved.end >= charIndex && saved.end <= nextIndex) {
        endNode = node;
        endOffset = saved.end - charIndex;
      }

      charIndex = nextIndex;
      if (startNode && endNode) break;
    }

    if (startNode && endNode) {
      range.setStart(startNode, startOffset);
      range.setEnd(endNode, endOffset);
      sel.removeAllRanges();
      sel.addRange(range);
    }
  }

  // Stats
  emitStats() {
    const text = this.editorEl.innerText || '';
    const words = text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0);
    const paragraphs = this.editorEl.querySelectorAll('p, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, blockquote');
    const wordCount = words.length;
    const charCount = text.length;
    const paragraphCount = paragraphs.length;
    const readingTime = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(wordCount / 250)) + ' min';

    this.emit('editor-stats', {
      wordCount,
      charCount,
      paragraphCount,
      readingTime
    });
  }

  // Focus mode
  updateFocusMode(range) {
    if (!this.state.focusMode) return;

    // Find the current paragraph
    let node = range.startContainer;
    while (node && node !== this.editorEl) {
      if (node.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE && 
          ['P', 'H1', 'H2', 'H3', 'H4', 'H5', 'H6', 'BLOCKQUOTE', 'LI'].includes(node.tagName)) {

---

## [2026-05-07 17:58:03] Run
**USER:** Continue from where you left off.

**AI:**


<thinking>
Continuing from the Editor component's updateFocusMode method.

```js
        // Remove previous focus highlights
        this.editorEl.querySelectorAll('.focus-active').forEach(el => {
          el.classList.remove('focus-active');
        });
        node.classList.add('focus-active');
        return;
      }
      node = node.parentNode;
    }
  }

  setFocusMode(enabled) {
    this.state.focusMode = enabled;
    this.editorEl.closest('.editor-wrapper').classList.toggle('focus-mode', enabled);
    if (!enabled) {
      this.editorEl.querySelectorAll('.focus-active').forEach(el => {
        el.classList.remove('focus-active');
      });
    }
  }

  setTypewriterMode(enabled) {
    this.state.typewriterMode = enabled;
    this.editorEl.closest('.editor-wrapper').classList.toggle('typewriter-mode', enabled);
    if (enabled) this.scrollToCursor();
  }

  scrollToCursor() {
    const sel = window.getSelection();
    if (!sel || sel.rangeCount === 0) return;

    const range = sel.getRangeAt(0);
    const rect = range.getBoundingClientRect();
    const wrapper = this.editorEl.closest('.editor-wrapper');
    if (!wrapper) return;

    const wrapperRect = wrapper.getBoundingClientRect();
    const targetY = wrapperRect.top + wrapperRect.height / 3;
    const diff = rect.top - targetY;

    wrapper.scrollBy({ top: diff, behavior: 'smooth' });
  }

  // Content management
  setContent(content, chapterId) {
    this.state.content = content;
    this.state.chapterId = chapterId;
    if (this.editorEl) {
      this.editorEl.innerHTML = content;
      this._lastContent = content;
      this._undoStack = [];
      this._redoStack = [];
      this.pushUndo();
      this.emitStats();
    }
  }

  getContent() {
    return this.editorEl ? this.editorEl.innerHTML : this.state.content;
  }

  getPlainText() {
    return this.editorEl ? this.editorEl.innerText : '';
  }

  insertHTML(html) {
    this.editorEl.focus();
    document.execCommand('insertHTML', false, html);
    this.handleInput();
  }

  insertText(text) {
    this.editorEl.focus();
    document.execCommand('insertText', false, text);
    this.handleInput();
  }

  replaceContent(oldText, newText) {
    const content = this.editorEl.innerHTML;
    if (content.includes(oldText)) {
      this.pushUndo();
      this.editorEl.innerHTML = content.replace(oldText, newText);
      this._lastContent = this.editorEl.innerHTML;
      this.handleInput();
    }
  }

  getSelectedText() {
    const sel = window.getSelection();
    return sel ? sel.toString() : '';
  }

  replaceSelection(text) {
    const sel = window.getSelection();
    if (!sel || sel.rangeCount === 0) return;
    
    this.pushUndo();
    const range = sel.getRangeAt(0);
    range.deleteContents();
    
    const frag = document.createRange().createContextualFragment(text);
    range.insertNode(frag);
    
    range.collapse(false);
    sel.removeAllRanges();
    sel.addRange(range);
    
    this.handleInput();
  }

  focus() {
    if (this.editorEl) this.editorEl.focus();
  }

  destroy() {
    clearTimeout(this._saveTimeout);
    clearTimeout(this._statsTimeout);
    clearTimeout(this._undoTimeout);
    super.destroy();
  }
}

// src/ui/components/FindReplace.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class FindReplace extends Component {
  setup() {
    this.state = {
      visible: false,
      showReplace: false,
      findText: '',
      replaceText: '',
      caseSensitive: false,
      wholeWord: false,
      useRegex: false,
      matchCount: 0,
      currentMatch: 0,
      matches: []
    };
    this._highlights = [];
  }

  template() {
    if (!this.state.visible) return '<div class="find-replace hidden"></div>';

    const s = this.state;
    return `
      <div class="find-replace">
        <div class="find-replace-row">
          <div class="find-input-wrap">
            <input type="text" id="find-input" class="find-input" 
                   placeholder="Find..." value="${this.escapeAttr(s.findText)}"
                   autocomplete="off" spellcheck="false">
            <span class="find-count">${s.matchCount > 0 ? `${s.currentMatch}/${s.matchCount}` : 'No results'}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="find-options">
            <button class="find-opt-btn ${s.caseSensitive ? 'active' : ''}" 
                    data-opt="caseSensitive" title="Match Case">Aa</button>
            <button class="find-opt-btn ${s.wholeWord ? 'active' : ''}" 
                    data-opt="wholeWord" title="Whole Word">W</button>
            <button class="find-opt-btn ${s.useRegex ? 'active' : ''}" 
                    data-opt="useRegex" title="Use Regex">.*</button>

              <button class="find-btn" data-action="replace-all" title="Replace All">All</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ` : ''}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  escapeAttr(str) {
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;');
  }

  afterMount() {
    if (!this.state.visible) return;

    const findInput = this.$('#find-input');
    const replaceInput = this.$('#replace-input');

    if (findInput) {
      this.on(findInput, 'input', (e) => {
        this.state.findText = e.target.value;
        this.performFind();
      });

      this.on(findInput, 'keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
          e.preventDefault();
          if (e.shiftKey) {
            this.findPrev();
          } else {
            this.findNext();
          }
        }
        if (e.key === 'Escape') {
          this.close();
        }
      });

      // Auto-focus
      setTimeout(() => findInput.focus(), 50);
      findInput.select();
    }

    if (replaceInput) {
      this.on(replaceInput, 'input', (e) => {
        this.state.replaceText = e.target.value;
      });

      this.on(replaceInput, 'keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
          e.preventDefault();
          this.replaceCurrent();
        }
        if (e.key === 'Escape') {
          this.close();
        }
      });
    }

    // Button clicks
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const btn = e.target.closest('[data-action]');
      if (!btn) return;

      const optBtn = e.target.closest('[data-opt]');
      if (optBtn) {
        const opt = optBtn.dataset.opt;
        this.state[opt] = !this.state[opt];
        optBtn.classList.toggle('active');
        this.performFind();
        return;
      }

      const action = btn.dataset.action;
      switch (action) {
        case 'next': this.findNext(); break;
        case 'prev': this.findPrev(); break;
        case 'replace': this.replaceCurrent(); break;
        case 'replace-all': this.replaceAll(); break;
        case 'toggle-replace':
          this.state.showReplace = !this.state.showReplace;
          this.render();
          break;
        case 'close': this.close(); break;
      }
    });
  }

  open(withReplace = false) {
    this.state.visible = true;
    this.state.showReplace = withReplace;

    // Pre-fill with selected text
    const sel = window.getSelection();
    if (sel && sel.toString().length > 0 && sel.toString().length < 100) {
      this.state.findText = sel.toString();
    }

    this.render();
  }

  close() {
    this.clearHighlights();
    this.state.visible = false;
    this.state.matches = [];
    this.state.matchCount = 0;
    this.state.currentMatch = 0;
    this.render();
    this.emit('find-close');
  }

  performFind() {
    this.clearHighlights();

    const query = this.state.findText;
    if (!query) {
      this.state.matchCount = 0;
      this.state.currentMatch = 0;
      this.updateCount();
      return;
    }

    this.emit('find-request', {
      query,
      caseSensitive: this.state.caseSensitive,
      wholeWord: this.state.wholeWord,
      useRegex: this.state.useRegex
    });
  }

  setMatches(matches) {
    this.state.matches = matches;
    this.state.matchCount = matches.length;
    this.state.currentMatch = matches.length > 0 ? 1 : 0;
    this.updateCount();
    this.highlightMatches();
    if (matches.length > 0) {
      this.scrollToMatch(0);
    }
  }

  highlightMatches() {
    // This emits to the editor to handle highlighting
    this.emit('find-highlight', { matches: this.

```js
state.matches, current: this.state.currentMatch - 1 });
  }

  clearHighlights() {
    this.emit('find-clear-highlights');
  }

  findNext() {
    if (this.state.matchCount === 0) return;
    this.state.currentMatch = (this.state.currentMatch % this.state.matchCount) + 1;
    this.updateCount();
    this.scrollToMatch(this.state.currentMatch - 1);
    this.highlightMatches();
  }

  findPrev() {
    if (this.state.matchCount === 0) return;
    this.state.currentMatch = this.state.currentMatch <= 1 ? this.state.matchCount : this.state.currentMatch - 1;
    this.updateCount();
    this.scrollToMatch(this.state.currentMatch - 1);
    this.highlightMatches();
  }

  replaceCurrent() {
    if (this.state.matchCount === 0) return;
    this.emit('find-replace-one', {
      matchIndex: this.state.currentMatch - 1,
      replaceText: this.state.replaceText
    });
    this.performFind();
  }

  replaceAll() {
    if (this.state.matchCount === 0) return;
    this.emit('find-replace-all', {
      findText: this.state.findText,
      replaceText: this.state.replaceText,
      caseSensitive: this.state.caseSensitive,
      wholeWord: this.state.wholeWord,
      useRegex: this.state.useRegex
    });
    this.performFind();
  }

  scrollToMatch(index) {
    this.emit('find-scroll-to', { index });
  }

  updateCount() {
    const countEl = this.el.querySelector('.find-count');
    if (countEl) {
      countEl.textContent = this.state.matchCount > 0
        ? `${this.state.currentMatch}/${this.state.matchCount}`
        : 'No results';
    }
  }
}

// src/ui/components/Sidebar.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class Sidebar extends Component {
  setup() {
    this.state = {
      visible: true,
      width: 280,
      activeTab: 'chapters', // chapters, notes, outline
      chapters: [],
      activeChapterId: null,
      projectTitle: '',
      dragState: null,
      isResizing: false
    };
  }

  template() {
    if (!this.state.visible) {
      return `<div class="sidebar collapsed">
        <button class="sidebar-toggle" data-action="toggle-sidebar" title="Show Sidebar">▶</button>
      </div>`;
    }

    const s = this.state;
    return `
      <div class="sidebar" style="width: ${s.width}px">
        <div class="sidebar-header">
          <h2 class="sidebar-title" title="${this.escapeAttr(s.projectTitle)}">${this.escapeHTML(s.projectTitle)}</h2>
          <button class="sidebar-toggle" data-action="toggle-sidebar" title="Hide Sidebar">◀</button>
        </div>
        <div class="sidebar-tabs">
          <button class="sidebar-tab ${s.activeTab === 'chapters' ? 'active' : ''}" data-tab="chapters">Chapters</button>
          <button class="sidebar-tab ${s.activeTab === 'notes' ? 'active' : ''}" data-tab="notes">Notes</button>
          <button class="sidebar-tab ${s.activeTab === 'outline' ? 'active' : ''}" data-tab="outline">Outline</button>
        </div>
        <div class="sidebar-content">
          ${this.renderTabContent()}
        </div>
        <div class="sidebar-resize-handle"></div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  escapeHTML(str) {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.textContent = str || '';
    return div.innerHTML;
  }

  escapeAttr(str) {
    return (str || '').replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;');
  }

  renderTabContent() {
    switch (this.state.activeTab) {
      case 'chapters': return this.renderChapters();
      case 'notes': return this.renderNotes();
      case 'outline': return this.renderOutline();
      default: return '';
    }
  }

  renderChapters() {
    const chapters = this.state.chapters || [];
    return `
      <div class="chapter-list">
        <div class="chapter-list-header">
          <button class="btn-small" data-action="add-chapter" title="Add Chapter">+ Chapter</button>
        </div>
        <div class="chapter-items" id="chapter-items">
          ${chapters.length === 0 ? '<div class="empty-state">No chapters yet</div>' : ''}
          ${chapters.map((ch, i) => `
            <div class="chapter-item ${ch.id === this.state.activeChapterId ? 'active' : ''}"
                 data-chapter-id="${ch.id}"
                 data-index="${i}"
                 draggable="true">
              <span class="chapter-drag-handle" title="Drag to reorder">⠿</span>
              <span class="chapter-number">${i + 1}.</span>
              <span class="chapter-title">${this.escapeHTML(ch.title || 'Untitled')}</span>
              <span class="

          `).join('')}

      </div>
    `;
  }

  renderNotes() {
    return `
      <div class="notes-panel">
        <div class="notes-header">
          <button class="btn-small" data-action="add-note" title="Add Note">+ Note</button>
        </div>
        <div class="notes-list" id="notes-list">
          <div class="empty-state">Notes for the current chapter will appear here</div>
        </div>
        <div class="notes-editor">
          <textarea id="note-textarea" class="note-textarea" placeholder="Write a note..."></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  renderOutline() {
    return `
      <div class="outline-panel">
        <div class="outline-header">
          <span class="outline-label">Document Outline</span>
        </div>
        <div class="outline-list" id="outline-list">
          <div class="empty-state">Headings in your document will appear here</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  getTotalWords() {
    return (this.state.chapters || []).reduce((sum, ch) => sum + (ch.wordCount || 0), 0);
  }

  afterMount() {
    if (!this.state.visible) {
      this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
        const btn = e.target.closest('[data-action="toggle-sidebar"]');
        if (btn) this.toggle();
      });
      return;
    }

    // Tab switching
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const tab = e.target.closest('[data-tab]');
      if (tab) {
        this.state.activeTab = tab.dataset.tab;
        this.render();
        return;
      }

      const action = e.target.closest('[data-action]');
      if (action) {
        this.handleAction(action.dataset.action, action.dataset);
        return;
      }

      // Chapter selection
      const chapterItem = e.target.closest('.chapter-item');
      if (chapterItem && !e.target.closest('.chapter-action-btn')) {
        const chapterId = chapterItem.dataset.chapterId;
        this.selectChapter(chapterId);
      }
    });

    // Double-click to rename
    this.on(this.el, 'dblclick', (e) => {
      const chapterItem = e.target.closest('.chapter-item');
      if (chapterItem) {
        e.preventDefault();
        this.startRename(chapterItem.dataset.chapterId);
      }
    });

    // Drag and drop for chapter reordering
    this.setupDragDrop();

    // Sidebar resize
    this.setupResize();
  }

  handleAction(action, dataset) {
    switch (action) {
      case 'toggle-sidebar':
        this.toggle();
        break;
      case 'add-chapter':
        this.emit('chapter-add');
        break;
      case 'rename-chapter':
        this.startRename(dataset.chapterId);
        break;
      case 'delete-chapter':
        this.emit('chapter-delete', { chapterId: dataset.chapterId });
        break;
      case 'add-note':
        this.emit('note-add');
        break;
    }
  }

  selectChapter(chapterId) {
    if (chapterId === this.state.activeChapterId) return;
    this.state.activeChapterId = chapterId;

    // Update active class without full re-render
    this.el.querySelectorAll('.chapter-item').forEach(item => {
      item.classList.toggle('active', item.dataset.chapterId === chapterId);
    });

    this.emit('chapter-select', { chapterId });
  }

  startRename(chapterId) {
    const item = this.el.querySelector(`.chapter-item[data-chapter-id="${chapterId}"]`);
    if (!item) return;

    const titleEl = item.querySelector('.chapter-title');
    const currentTitle = titleEl.textContent;

    const input = document.createElement('input');
    input.type = 'text';
    input.className = 'chapter-rename-input';
    input.value = currentTitle;

    titleEl.replaceWith(input);
    input.focus();
    input.select();

    const finish = () => {
      const newTitle = input.value.trim() || 'Untitled';
      const span = document.createElement('span');
      span.className = 'chapter-title';
      span.textContent = newTitle;
      input.replaceWith(span);

      if (newTitle !== currentTitle) {
        this.emit('chapter-rename', { chapterId, title: newTitle });
      }
    };

    input.addEventListener('blur', finish);
    input.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Enter') {
        e.preventDefault();
        input.blur();
      }
      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        input

```js
.value = currentTitle;
        input.blur();
      }
    });
  }

  setupDragDrop() {
    const container = this.$('#chapter-items');
    if (!container) return;

    let draggedEl = null;
    let draggedId = null;
    let placeholder = null;

    this.on(container, 'dragstart', (e) => {
      const item = e.target.closest('.chapter-item');
      if (!item) return;

      draggedEl = item;
      draggedId = item.dataset.chapterId;
      item.classList.add('dragging');

      e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move';
      e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', draggedId);

      placeholder = document.createElement('div');
      placeholder.className = 'chapter-drop-placeholder';

      setTimeout(() => {
        item.style.opacity = '0.4';
      }, 0);
    });

    this.on(container, 'dragover', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move';

      const afterElement = this.getDragAfterElement(container, e.clientY);

      if (placeholder.parentNode) {
        placeholder.remove();
      }

      if (afterElement) {
        container.insertBefore(placeholder, afterElement);
      } else {
        container.appendChild(placeholder);
      }
    });

    this.on(container, 'dragend', (e) => {
      if (draggedEl) {
        draggedEl.classList.remove('dragging');
        draggedEl.style.opacity = '';
      }
      if (placeholder && placeholder.parentNode) {
        placeholder.remove();
      }
      draggedEl = null;
      draggedId = null;
    });

    this.on(container, 'drop', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();

      if (placeholder && placeholder.parentNode) {
        placeholder.remove();
      }

      if (!draggedEl) return;

      const afterElement = this.getDragAfterElement(container, e.clientY);
      const items = [...container.querySelectorAll('.chapter-item:not(.dragging)')];
      let newIndex;

      if (afterElement) {
        newIndex = items.indexOf(afterElement);
      } else {
        newIndex = items.length;
      }

      draggedEl.classList.remove('dragging');
      draggedEl.style.opacity = '';

      this.emit('chapter-reorder', {
        chapterId: draggedId,
        newIndex
      });

      draggedEl = null;
      draggedId = null;
    });
  }

  getDragAfterElement(container, y) {
    const items = [...container.querySelectorAll('.chapter-item:not(.dragging)')];

    return items.reduce((closest, child) => {
      const box = child.getBoundingClientRect();
      const offset = y - box.top - box.height / 2;

      if (offset < 0 && offset > closest.offset) {
        return { offset, element: child };
      }
      return closest;
    }, { offset: Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY }).element;
  }

  setupResize() {
    const handle = this.el.querySelector('.sidebar-resize-handle');
    if (!handle) return;

    let startX, startWidth;

    const onMouseMove = (e) => {
      const newWidth = Math.max(200, Math.min(500, startWidth + (e.clientX - startX)));
      this.state.width = newWidth;
      this.el.querySelector('.sidebar').style.width = newWidth + 'px';
      this.emit('sidebar-resize', { width: newWidth });
    };

    const onMouseUp = () => {
      document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
      document.removeEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp);
      document.body.style.cursor = '';
      document.body.style.userSelect = '';
      this.state.isResizing = false;
    };

    this.on(handle, 'mousedown', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      startX = e.clientX;
      startWidth = this.state.width;
      this.state.isResizing = true;
      document.body.style.cursor = 'col-resize';
      document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
      document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
      document.addEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp);
    });
  }

  toggle() {
    this.state.visible = !this.state.visible;
    this.render();
    this.emit('sidebar-toggle', { visible: this.state.visible });
  }

  setChapters(chapters) {
    this.state.chapters = chapters;
    if (this.state.activeTab === 'chapters') {
      this.render();
    }
  }

  setActiveChapter(chapterId) {
    this.state.activeChapterId = chapterId;
    this.el.querySelectorAll('.chapter-item').forEach(item => {
      item.classList.toggle('active', item.dataset.chapterId === chapterId);
    });
  }

  updateOutline(headings) {
    const list = this.$('#outline-list');
    if (!list) return;

    if (headings.length === 0) {
      list.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state">Headings in your document will appear here</div>';
      return;
    }

    list.innerHTML = headings.map(h => `
      <div class="outline-item outline-level-${h.level}" data-heading-id="${h.id}">
        <span class="outline-tag">H${h.level}</span>
        <span class="outline-text">${this.escapeHTML(h.text)}</span>
      </div>
    `).join('');

// src/ui/components/Toolbar.js

import { Component } from '../component.js';

export class Toolbar extends Component {
  setup() {
    this.state = {
      activeFormats: new Set(),
      currentBlock: 'p',
      visible: true
    };
  }

  template() {
    if (!this.state.visible) return '<div class="toolbar hidden"></div>';

    const fmt = (cmd, label, title, icon) => {
      const active = this.state.activeFormats.has(cmd) ? 'active' : '';
      return `<button class="toolbar-btn ${active}" data-command="${cmd}" title="${title}">${icon || label}</button>`;
    };

    const blockOptions = [
      { value: 'p', label: 'Paragraph' },
      { value: 'h1', label: 'Heading 1' },
      { value: 'h2', label: 'Heading 2' },
      { value: 'h3', label: 'Heading 3' },
      { value: 'h4', label: 'Heading 4' },
      { value: 'h5', label: 'Heading 5' },
      { value: 'h6', label: 'Heading 6' },
      { value: 'blockquote', label: 'Quote' }
    ];

    return `
      <div class="toolbar">
        <div class="toolbar-group">
          <select class="toolbar-select" id="block-select" title="Block Type">
            ${blockOptions.map(o => `<option value="${o.value}" ${this.state.currentBlock === o.value ? 'selected' : ''}>${o.label}</option>`).join('')}
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="toolbar-divider"></div>
        <div class="toolbar-group">
          ${fmt('bold', 'B', 'Bold (Ctrl+B)', '<strong>B</strong>')}
          ${fmt('italic', 'I', 'Italic (Ctrl+I)', '<em>I</em>')}
          ${fmt('underline', 'U', 'Underline (Ctrl+U)', '<u>U</u>')}
          ${fmt('strikethrough', 'S', 'Strikethrough', '<s>S</s>')}
        </div>
        <div class="toolbar-divider"></div>
        <div class="toolbar-group">
          ${fmt('insertUnorderedList', '•', 'Bullet List', '•≡')}
          ${fmt('insertOrderedList', '#', 'Numbered List', '1.')}
          ${fmt('indent', '→', 'Indent', '→')}
          ${fmt('outdent', '←', 'Outdent', '←')}
        </div>
        <div class="toolbar-divider"></div>
        <div class="toolbar-group">
          ${fmt('justifyLeft', 'L', 'Align Left', '≡')}
          ${fmt('justifyCenter', 'C', 'Align Center', '≡')}
          ${fmt('justifyRight', 'R', 'Align Right', '≡')}
        </div>
        <div class="toolbar-divider"></div>
        <div class="toolbar-group">
          <button class="toolbar-btn" data-command="createLink" title="Insert Link">🔗</button>
          <button class="toolbar-btn" data-command="insertImage" title="Insert Image">🖼</button>
          <button class="toolbar-btn" data-command="insertHR" title="Horizontal Rule">―</button>
        </div>
        <div class="toolbar-divider"></div>
        <div class="toolbar-group">
          <button class="toolbar-btn" data-command="removeFormat" title="Clear Formatting">⊘</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  afterMount() {
    if (!this.state.visible) return;

    // Block type select
    const blockSelect = this.$('#block-select');
    if (blockSelect) {
      this.on(blockSelect, 'change', (e) => {
        const value = e.target.value;
        this.emit('toolbar-command', { command: 'formatBlock', value });
      });
    }

    // Button clicks
    this.on(this.el, 'click', (e) => {
      const btn = e.target.closest('.toolbar-btn');
      if (!btn) return;

      e.preventDefault();
      const command = btn.dataset.command;

      if (command === 'createLink') {
        this.handleLink();
        return;
      }

      if (command === 'insertImage') {
        this.handleImage();
        return;
      }

      if (command === 'insertHR') {
        this.emit('toolbar-command', { command:

  handleLink() {

  handleImage() {
    const url = prompt('Enter image URL:');

    this.state.activeFormats = new Set(formats);
    // Update without full re-render
    this.el.querySelectorAll('.toolbar-btn[data-command]').forEach(btn => {
      const cmd = btn.dataset.command;
      btn.classList.toggle('active', this.state.activeFormats.has(cmd));
    });
  }

  updateBlockType(blockType) {
    this.state.currentBlock = blockType;
    const select = this.$('#block-select');
    if (select) select.value = blockType;
  }
}
